name: Senate Update via Common Good VA
subject: Mitch McConnell couldn’t be happier right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
This race will determine Senate control | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGmyJI-3Nugkt6w2u0y9Ur59OUUd4Xp5ySyHELCEbxEss2DA_mGjL9kT6H1Tnri-4l7TxFMeiobqeoWif_W6WQ_lQdbVH8G5IRYKOjZlVF_4tRN3XsDI33XtaFbf896qE7gx-xVmIRknokIiKVOCtnexW6efyVOP1-vzzfQrLnPolmFxuuM0D7W7gh-zW-BM-6eBFPrhYjtUAHzkg4hXBJ53AP36A0N7Z8bANTha7J8mY5yaKUw4XvYV9AWUkWHVKT4O2ZCUQ_WdTewBvA8Q2Goat-pxBom79QuscnSrQH998ctA9ft_Fyub4nVdt9VcqgQ/3fz/Jp8ZdJkyRDKq-PPm5SVgyg/h0/5itDNx4cFlTAU6G7mK-TTQBVmBm90SLCKh9mhP0du5c)
Derek, EVERYTHING just changed for control of the Senate — and Mitch McConnell _couldn’t_ be happier.

A new poll shows Catherine Cortez Masto (D) LOSING in the race which could decide Senate control. _The Cook Political Report_ just _downgraded_ her chances of winning and a GOP extremist backed by Mitch McConnell, Ted Cruz AND Donald Trump announced his run to defeat her and flip the Senate.

That’s why we set a $50,000 goal to make sure Catherine has the resources to fund the ads, phone banks and field teams she needs to keep Nevada – and the Senate – blue. **[Derek, can we count on you to split $25 right now between Catherine's team and Common Good VA to help Catherine win in Nevada and defend our Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGmyJI-3Nugkt6w2u0y9Ur59afPQ6eQMZz272MDNYquBVrAXBVbzXTsuoudgZVVcxM9vsWg9HqD0G3cqh1T7LWKYExnclunCf3FIieJu4vG5mpEyIXT6EM9j8-72lmp2G3FFQpONn5Bx_hlMy9kdjUBiTFfwXNEMEnJgD_K2KdPc6-Fii-qQDZrDq_bm0bCZRBBowSeKAkK7UoZEn8dDKi80Lhpb6RXltkeqHPglJAcYdvbYxu7me9vVwaipE0ZmyJGf10hkeqFHQcnIpyH9FgquAMNuol71a4Qg4Bsa-aiGQSoKJkGdLzFWjhlqty_FjeHF8sv1PM_AKOx92vA_5fWo/3fz/Jp8ZdJkyRDKq-PPm5SVgyg/h1/C8-ThTnkkvCu-gRI3AFOzE4iLtUMKeKz3dvA9xlyn8k)**

We’ll be blunt, this is HORRIBLE news for Democrats. With the Senate majority _razor-thin_ with a 50-50 split, we can’t afford to lose a single race. But right now, Republicans' chances of winning are SURGING in Nevada where Donald Trump BARELY lost in 2020.

Defending the Senate will come down to defending this seat – but the momentum is not on our side! Losing this seat will hand Mitch McConnell control of the Senate and the power to obstruct everything from voting rights to a Biden nominee on the Supreme Court.

The ONLY way Catherine can defend this critical battleground seat and our Senate majority is if grassroots Democrats like you join this fight with an immediate donation. [**Please, before our midnight deadline, split a $25 donation between Catherine's team and Common Good VA to defeat McConnell’s handpicked candidate and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGmyJI-3Nugkt6w2u0y9Ur59vxdbEMDH7x_OT1ndv-WM6zJGPmb9_dQin4DdK8aE0G14SHFheGBfoDzrxrQqrJbLPWqPoijRQeOPXPR0T1GjrQv7oVLxMF0h0LzmtUm7x_i_decxMv8KsUp8knoH6K_EMSFk-pHFUd1pzxqcDmVewbZ-CHtD-L-1zKsQGooHDwpq8QUueFwEWdVYByY0tyQ-xBvN9gpldUGDYFxJucDUvplzNJU997Q7u6E1hcDvCrW5AH2InYS2nxOTYBjVmBIT2NN3CiSDouLxLKOB9AJPS3Jq-gp9pZ4aJs9wqskhzIQ/3fz/Jp8ZdJkyRDKq-PPm5SVgyg/h2/VBypYPVQBLS7nY1CdUq8hjAcKOFOmexFJ6FA5u2a1O4) **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGmyJI-3Nugkt6w2u0y9Ur59afPQ6eQMZz272MDNYquBVbFTK5mal-DV_GiXqgAZbiiAZRoRpBk2mQiMkxTJnNcanJaOEo9cogcxDVMNnjOyTkRaQyUwY3HQTye0fpHA9jogDFItXECzeGhavthOAM96LJqEB77Cgrqeme_QsV7iG-Tz5oEJA2-jA8t4YTmEt0qC_erhiCUg7yazq8n8VtsX768p-JeMuq-TZ8Ps3uHsiA4o5x0E6HSs2WJitvOoin3scq-WthF4Um2d7Q-3NzOWsb5ZZkdzBBHehi-WP0MN8wvzjw2YJplEBGUDUKQhz_vbuUjNZ3WUXiOHwLCQDgiA/3fz/Jp8ZdJkyRDKq-PPm5SVgyg/h3/pz53giSbGdHhdxHZ_RutaSjIifHuwQ33-dOefMJvQqY)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Stand with FL to secure our border!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Time to close the border |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=33abc3bbcc&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Our Southern border is WIDE OPEN and Biden is rolling out the welcome mat to hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants.

_Florida is fighting back. I'm asking you to help me join the fight!_

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=d6b66ba70e&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto, a Democrat who believes in open borders!**

Just last week, over 12,000 Haitians made their way over 2000 miles from Haiti to Texas.

Why are these people coming? Because Biden is trying to break American immigration law and change voting patterns by illegal immigration.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=174c60176c&e=afa21b7626)
---
| It's not about hating immigrants for me. I married a LEGAL immigrant. But, as Gov. DeSantis said, this situation is a public safety danger.

This from his own website:

_“We’ve got to take every effort we can to make sure that we’re protecting the people of Florida, and that’s what we’re doing here today,” DeSantis said at a press conference in Fort Myers, where he also announced the state is suing President Joe Biden’s administration over its immigration practices.

DeSantis also tapped former North Florida U.S. Attorney Larry Keefe to be the state’s “public safety czar,” a position whose responsibilities include carrying out the governor’s new executive order, lobbying the Legislature and advising the governor on “relevant issues.” His annual salary was not immediately disclosed.

The actions in Florida on Tuesday come as the situation at the U.S-Mexico border gets national attention amid a surge in border crossings and as immigration becomes a key issue heading into the 2022 midterm elections.

DeSantis’ executive order comes after Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas said between 10,000 and 12,000 Haitians were released into the U.S. until their pending asylum cases are heard by an immigration judge.

Another 5,000 Haitians are being processed by DHS and 3,000 Haitians are in detention. About 4,000 Haitians were deported by plane between September 19 and September 27, according to DHS statistics._

I applaud Gov. DeSantis. He is using what power he has to resist Biden's incompetence and destruction.

**But that's not enough. The Federal government shouldn't be doing very much, but guarding our borders is one thing we must do better!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0af7267bb2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Biden would rather spread false claims about our brave Border Patrol, than fix the broken border. That's the truth.**

Biden can't get anything right. DeSantis gets everything right. We need to bring Florida's America First policies to DC!

I need to defeat Darren Soto to get there. He's a big open borders Biden cheerleader. Help me beat him!

_I will stand up for America against Biden. Darren Soto will not._

Help me bring America First policies to Congress! [Help me get elected and close the border!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=41de176581&e=afa21b7626)

Lets put a real check on Biden. [Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=80e6a45c61&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=58bb0f7cdd&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8c4751d420&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f4aefd5115&e=afa21b7626)
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=c58c8ea152) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=c58c8ea152).

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Upcoming Events for Culp For Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=ByQPaz&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ECxzGc4&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/028f5874-529f-4e4c-a66e-756d74c52381.png]

My upcoming events for October

I want to first thank everyone who stopped by our booth at the Central WA State Fair in Yakima, WA.

We were overwhelmed by the support and encouragement we received and are so grateful for the volunteers who took time out of their lives to come to help out in our booth. Thank you!

We'll be back in Yakima, WA on October 9th at 6 pm.

I'll be attending and speaking at the 6th annual Constitution Day Dinner put on by the Yakima County Republican Liberty Caucus and held at the Red Lion Yakima Center. For more details on this event and to purchase tickets click here. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SZxOXF&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EhAcdK&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/705b4f98-d926-4a35-9973-a99dcf0a0973.jpg]
On October 12th I'll be in Grant Co and have the honor of speaking at the Republican Women of Grant County's meeting.

The event will be held at 6 pm and the location is:
Lake City 4 Square Church, 333 N. Central,
Moses Lake, WA 98837

This event is open to the public so everyone is welcome to attend. We'll also have Culp for Congress Gear available at both events.

We'll continue to update you via email and our social media accounts of events as we add them to our schedule so keep an eye out for when we're in your local area!

Honored to serve.

Stand up for America. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SZxOvq&mc=rl&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EMdXwdP&]

Loren

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: Let's Take Back the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🚩 Congressman Jake LaTurner is fighting hard for our conservative values in Washington DC. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

Congressman Jake LaTurner proudly represents the great people of Eastern Kansas and he's fighting for our conservative values in Washington DC.
---
| Right now we are seeing exactly what happens when Democrats control the House, Senate, and White House: **Reckless radical policies being rammed through on partisan lines.**

When Jake first announced his campaign for Congress, he released his
[Contract With Kansas](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=06ef98939b&e=1050d051da), which outlines his promises.

_**Here are his main priorities:**_
* Co-Sponsor Constitutional Amendment for **Term Limits**
* Protect Our Country, **Build the Wall**
* Balance the Budget, **No Tax Increases**
* Fight for **Work Requirements and Drug Testing for Welfare Recipients**
* **Fight for Life** , Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness
* Fight to Ensure Kansas is Always Represented on the Ag Committee
* Live and Raise His Family in Kansas

Jake is fighting hard to save our Country because he wants to leave America a better place for his four young children.

body:

Fellow American,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f2881d1d5974546b32c3cda9eb404da&_e=KOjMyleMsUflZ1tL8EQuVZ1PLrQZM6AAAb9M4ca42Yd3P1bKo281atmBDgZTBnRu3dsS0qTROSaJBrTtcCYFyg5X9Z7RK5wa_B8qGYjuPfD5t4z6jmfoTfofMk5uYOjonxvba-AwMNTV_skewHx-Q79bFZCYEqlV2kxZthLwDJ57r50iXI5HEPWsWc3BPI-Vl9KJ6MHI5Ii6WAnRLXj6CL3-qykZ0nlCWM445K6P2hb7NdIQsRUNPbCYS8c24szp1EZP2s2w-vd7ufstfNUT97vqw_NtgM25rvEHOtLCV9lV-SWfrtCHQeXHsoU63304GtUcsKr3omiKT3ZKJ5GaDbtKTJNFYXBmg-2LnzM8f5l9EX2dnOvCyGKK6EFbz9TGaNbetmYg6Pvh1NE4FDaRMcTEi4edQetBT1fMWinWcb_aYkZXOK6U3YtkQhGi5dOLkHKUuWCe36BYioYCaYauhQ%3D%3D)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

I appreciate your consideration!

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=6f2881d1d5974546b32c3cda9eb404da&_e=KOjMyleMsUflZ1tL8EQuVZ1PLrQZM6AAAb9M4ca42Yd3P1bKo281atmBDgZTBnRu3dsS0qTROSaJBrTtcCYFyg5X9Z7RK5wa_B8qGYjuPfD5t4z6jmfoTfofMk5uYOjonxvba-AwMNTV_skewHx-Q79bFZCYEqlV2kxZthLwDJ57r50iXI5HEPWsWc3BPI-Vl9KJ6MHI5Ii6WAnRLXj6CL3-qykZ0nlCWM445K6P2hb7NdIQsRUNPbCYS8c24szp9vPgz_KdbovQwpjiqvSw7iof7rqUt_dGnVnR8xr_KbKeEz9_NY_AyhekwNduFFyG9-VvSoYFltEI-DwzLtC3QVoeP1w7c4lL1s3jp9PCZr_8PGafTuTgqFEKCwMWH6VaGShwu4cVbBts_QkhY4YWb8oguRHLFt2W4zL9CgFGFL8lcBZrF0SeQbQuBgD4RYb1K7zNXv_oeekSJ_ukO5kI9w%3D%3D)

body:
| | Friend

Governor Mike DeWine doesn’t want to just mask your kids. He also wants to brainwash them with critical race theory.

So far, more than half of Ohio’s students are forced to wear masks and all of DeWine’s school board appointees support teaching CRT in Ohio classrooms.

DeWine thinks _he_ knows what’s best for Ohio’s kids. Jim Renacci believes that parents know best.

The future for Ohio’s children has never looked more bleak.

If you agree with Renacci that parents decide what goes on children's faces and in their minds, then please consider donating today.

subject: Peter, We begged. We pleaded. And then we failed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
| | | First we begged you to give $5 to take back the Majority.

Then we pleaded with you to chip in less than $10 to make our end-of-month goal.

And then we failed to meet our goal.
**Plain and simple: we are dangerously underfunded. And if more than 10 people on this list ignore this email, we will have NO resources to take back the House and protect top-contested seats. ** _Our accountants gave us until MIDNIGHT to raise the $2,000 we need - can you chip in help?_

subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0fmjgpmv1lndos89hgt5soeememed5gq66uigu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdie0o74c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb0qd8rtgk19qiajjrv8g87llme4af98bhm29438_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdie0o74c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj5hq92k6htp7giorc5ta7q33og7eu0e8ngujio8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdie0o74c3h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: GOP Presidential
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our natio
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvohi6p4n0epmfbafrcciunk4a5umiuaksi85sro_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdie4or4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqfqacpm7hrugqh83t2rtnirrv8as4bthd2cjfko_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdie4or4c9h2bs)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I 've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn77ohm3ur65s02jr9oppoa8j3q8q26keded6dso_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cdie4or4c9h2bs)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: I Visited Our Southern Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, I visited Del Rio, Texas to see the crisis Biden has created at the border.
Peter,**I just got back from Del Rio, Texas. I wanted to see Biden 's Border Crisis first hand. ** [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-r/) **It was shocking. I met with our brave and overworked Border Patrol agents and toured the area where just a few weeks ago over 15,000 illegal Haitian migrants crossed into the United States and camped out under the international bridge.** |
---

_(AP Photo/Eric Gay)_
---

[According to the Border Patrol, many of these illegal immigrants were released into the United States. Biden's Secretary of Homeland Security admitted to letting this happen.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-y/)
Our immigration system is broken. And President Biden's open border policies are making the crisis worse.
I supported President Trump's idea of building the wall. In Congress, I voted to fund the project.
**Joe Biden has not only halted the construction of the wall but now is tearing down sections of the wall that were not completed because he canceled the project.**
_Here are some shocking statistics: _
**• Over 1.2 million illegal immigrants have been encountered at our southern border since Joe Biden took office (that doesn't count the illegal immigrants who went undetected) **
**• Border Patrol agents in the Del Rio sector encountered immigrants from 90 different nationalities. Securing our border is a matter of National Security. **
**• The Del Rio sector, which is one of nine, has over 860 crossings per day. Border Patrol agents in Del Rio apprehended several illegal immigrants right in front of me! **
**Joe Biden is putting the men and women of Border Patrol in an impossible position. Biden 's open border tone is encouraging more illegal crossings. **
It's critical that we provide our Border Patrol with the necessary resources to do their jobs, secure our border, and end Biden's Border Crisis.
[**The Democrats in Washington continue to ignore the crisis. We need to elect more conservatives to win back the House so we can have the votes to secure our border. Can you help? **](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-j/)
Bryan
--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman
[Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-t/)

[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-d/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-h/)

[ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zllkjjl-l-n)

STEIL FOR WISCONSIN
1818 MILTON AVE. #1448
JANESVILLE, WI 53545 [Read our Privacy Policy](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-k/) You are receiving this email as you are subscribed for expressing interest in campaign updates from Steil for Wisconsin Inc.

For internal use only: RD344 [Preferences](https://steilforwisconsininc.updatemyprofile.com/j-zllkjjl-C89B6A88-idtjvlhlh-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-u-zllkjjl-idtjvlhlh-x/)

Indiana Democrats' team of staffers, fellows, and interns are working to make sure we are prepared for the upcoming elections by reaching Hoosiers in all 92 counties more consistently. We have the candidates, leadership, and messaging that can take back our state. name: Adam Schiff

body:
Donald Trump is holding a rally in Iowa tomorrow to spread his Big Lie, stir up controversy, and fire up his right-wing base. |
#
Derek, Donald Trump is holding a rally in Iowa tomorrow, effectively beginning his 2024 presidential run. And, although it is impossible to fathom, he’s more popular there than ever: **_“Donald Trump’s favorability ratings are his highest in any Iowa Poll”_**
_—The Des Moines Register, 10/4/21_ Make no mistake about it — Donald Trump is almost certainly running for president in 2024. His Iowa rally all but confirms it. This week, _The Washington Post_ reported Trump is constantly telling his inner circle “I’m running” — and it’s only a matter of time until he announces it publicly. He’s fundraising at the same frenetic pace as 2020, building a new political apparatus, and amassing more than $100 million in campaign funds for his next run. Our democracy barely survived Trump’s first-term assault on the Constitution and rule of law. It may not survive a second. **With Trump’s first Iowa rally of the 2024 election less than 24 hours away, we need to prepare right now to defeat him convincingly. Will you contribute $10 or $25 to help ensure Democrats maintain control of Congress next year? Mitch McConnell, Kevin McCarthy, and virtually every Congressional Republican have given Trump the keys to their party in order to stay in power — but Trump isn’t satisfied after his humiliating defeat in 2020.
**He’s out for revenge, and that spells trouble for Democrats if we don’t mount a strong defense of our majorities in the midterms.** Trump is galvanizing his cult following by endorsing far-right GOP candidates for battleground races and clearing the field of Republican primary challengers for the presidential nomination.
We can’t let Trump build the momentum for a third presidential run without a fight. If we fail to take this seriously, we’ll be giving him a bigger head start for the White House than any candidate ever — because in the modern history of the United States, no one-term president has ever pivoted for another White House run after suffering the kind of ignominious defeat the way that Trump did.
This isn’t just about 2024 — **it’s about whether we’ll have what it takes to keep our majorities in the midterms to prevent a Republican-controlled Congress from overturning the 2024 presidential election if they lose. And it’s about whether we’ll be able to preserve our democracy.**
**Derek, can you pitch in to my campaign to help respond to Trump’s first rally of the 2024 campaign, and build the resources we’ll need to defend and expand our slim Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate?**

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: my team hates Fridays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Let’s show them the meaning of TGIF
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37243261/310500878/-2023814932?refcode=20211008.2_TM_10BE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Y3ZjFhNC0zNzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhyl9ry3C1thuvUSJW0hv3JdeV3VlSDrWt31OGNwME4=)

| | Most people LOVE Fridays, Derek. My finance team, on the other hand ... does not.

They tell me that Fridays are consistently our worst fundraising days — _so much so that they’re considering pulling down our ads for the remaining Fridays of our campaign!_

I told them to give this team one more chance to prove them wrong, and they agreed. **So, here’s my challenge to you: we need to raise $150,000 by midnight tonight — if we do, we’ll be able to keep our ads on the air heading into the weekend.**

But this is a tall order, Derek _(most Fridays, we only hit about half that),_ so I need all hands on deck.

_[**Can I count on you to step up today? If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to make your first contribution, this is it — we are literally at risk of cutting our ads.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37243262/310500881/-2023814932?refcode=20211008.2_TM_10BE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Y3ZjFhNC0zNzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhyl9ry3C1thuvUSJW0hv3JdeV3VlSDrWt31OGNwME4=)_ | | | **[DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37243264/310500882/-2023814932?refcode=20211008.2_TM_10BE&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Y3ZjFhNC0zNzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uhyl9ry3C1thuvUSJW0hv3JdeV3VlSDrWt31OGNwME4=)**

clean_body: Let’s show them the meaning of TGIF | | | = | | Most people LOVE Fridays, Derek. My finance team, on the other hand ... does not. They tell me that Fridays are consistently our worst fundraising days — so much so that they’re considering pulling down our ads for the remaining Fridays of our campaign! I told them to give this team one more chance to prove them wrong, and they agreed. So, here’s my challenge to you: we need to raise $150,000 by midnight tonight — if we do, we’ll be able to keep our ads on the air heading into the weekend. But this is a tall order, Derek (most Fridays, we only hit about half that), so I need all hands on deck. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, I know we can hit this critical fundraising threshold. Let’s do this, Terry =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: I'm inviting my fake "conservative" opponent to join the Democrat primary
body:
My opponent, J.D. Vance, recently stated he wishes to seize and tax the assets of the Ford Foundation...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013eN3Kg942vr6VJyNJhj_VunnBW5ymvWP-Kiqu5EoIu_OT5ZCwDBedumY5nO8VPaHS132Z8M15aCbocFyq4O-P-bXHCQf_Hdm4_DSs7TjxVWT2dpXCSsRC9ZgQxRcurhGp2Tsln1qSNTU3CKHsX5-T6kfPlG9q75gaYdPZao09D5wkMCWJfdDgA==&c=oRyCLWopnnn56nhsIus8s3uJ7c2ZdtxZSHSz5S7Y8LFsgAr2izTD6Q==&ch=ujNfstsbdtvv1lGB1ENF-1knIXGJpYektEMnRDsTRj273YrMojue-Q==)
---
| Peter,
My opponent, J.D. Vance, recently stated he wishes to seize and tax the assets of the Ford Foundation...
This is not conservative.
This is not a position of limited government, free speech, and free markets.
No... This is something AOC or Nancy Pelosi would agree with. I'm not sure J.D. Vance understands the philosophy of limited government, the ideas of our Founding Fathers, or the principles of liberty.
This is why I am inviting him to join the Democratic primary where he belongs.
[If you want to elect a hardcore constitutional conservative to the U.S. Senate, please send my campaign a donation of $20.22, $50, $100, or more >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013eN3Kg942vr6VJyNJhj_VunnBW5ymvWP-Kiqu5EoIu_OT5ZCwDBedumY5nO8VPaHS132Z8M15aCbocFyq4O-P-bXHCQf_Hdm4_DSs7TjxVWT2dpXCSsRC9ZgQxRcurhGp2Tsln1qSNTU3CKHsX5-T6kfPlG9q75gaYdPZao09D5wkMCWJfdDgA==&c=oRyCLWopnnn56nhsIus8s3uJ7c2ZdtxZSHSz5S7Y8LFsgAr2izTD6Q==&ch=ujNfstsbdtvv1lGB1ENF-1knIXGJpYektEMnRDsTRj273YrMojue-Q==)
You and I CANNOT send another politician to the Swamp who wants to increase taxes and use the government to punish people they don't like.
J.D Vance wants to tax the Ford Foundation for supporting causes that we BOTH do not agree with... But what if Nancy Pelosi applied this same idea to other tax-exempt organizations such as churches or National Right to Life?
Vance's knee-jerk reaction to use the government to tax his opponents is dangerous. It also reveals he is not qualified to run in the GOP primary.
I need your help, Peter.
[Please help me WIN this primary so a REAL conservative can represent you in the U.S. Senate. clean_body: My opponent, J.D. Vance, recently stated he wishes to seize and tax the assets of the Ford Foundation... | | | | | | == | Peter, My opponent, J.D. Vance, recently stated he wishes to seize and tax the assets of the Ford Foundation... This is not conservative. This is not a position of limited government, free speech, and free markets. No... This is something AOC or Nancy Pelosi would agree with. I'm not sure J.D. Vance understands the philosophy of limited government, the ideas of our Founding Fathers, or the principles of liberty. This is why I am inviting him to join the Democratic primary where he belongs. == You and I CANNOT send another politician to the Swamp who wants to increase taxes and use the government to punish people they don't like. J.D Vance wants to tax the Ford Foundation for supporting causes that we BOTH do not agree with... But what if Nancy Pelosi applied this same idea to other tax-exempt organizations such as churches or National Right to Life? Vance's knee-jerk reaction to use the government to tax his opponents is dangerous. It also reveals he is not qualified to run in the GOP primary. I need your help, Peter. == == == == == == == == The stakes are high. We have a choice between voting for fake conservatives or a real champion of the Constitution and the America-First movement. name: Ralph Northam
subject: Hala will be the key piece to our Democratic majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/6T17omOY3qs-CjjnbB0w5CEWsWO6NfMKjcW-RZMl8qk=/yx2dZHh6jqMUtvnlk150_C-hEsKG7USnSqX3EYXc_cE=)
---
Friend, Today, I'm reaching out to you about my friend Hala Ayala's campaign for Lt. Governor. **Election Day in Virginia is only 25 days away** , and we need an all-out push to make sure Hala is elected as Virginia's first woman, first Afro-Latina, and first mother as Lt. Governor. [**I 'm proud to support a history-making candidate like Hala. So if you're with me, I'm going to ask you to contribute $10 today to elect Hala. She needs to hit her $30,000 goal before the end of the month to be well-prepared for this final part of the campaign.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6T17omOY3qs-CjjnbB0w5CEWsWO6NfMKjcW-RZMl8qk=/yx2dZHh6jqMUtvnlk150_C-hEsKG7USnSqX3EYXc_cE=) I know you're busy, friend, so I'll get right to it. **Hala is a proven leader as Chief Deputy Whip of the House of Delegates.** Under her leadership as part of our Democratic majority, our Commonwealth has greatly benefited -- expanding Medicaid to 400,000+ Virginians, expanding background checks, and more. **Hala will be the key piece of our Democratic majority. **With our narrow Democratic majority in the Senate, the Lt. name: Kathy Barnette
subject: My Story
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZ2498G702qCUbGY-priHi8O_29GRY2_oxypDL_-XuZ-e9Hp5HUgfQt6bNOvVrDq6slcq33POVSN303SB-f98OOCLkeE9i2kRJqtfvho3ZVY8AuZC8aWCWFQOBWFtS5VXyj35cAypukgGQgfuByGUc_PmGmyPv4UNqSLv7sf3EX0nJxU3_MV4w==&c=RVTG8MNyNwENpHcRaibOewrwSqY_B4spJFYQUmM3j1tJZhnjH_9H3g==&ch=fYokebn59UBHNTfAf9T7ga9rna5n7WrxosH-dFXwKuWjo74VDwEKFA==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| For anyone who doesn't know about my background, I wanted to take the time today to retell the story of my roots, and tell you about why this story has shaped the values that I hold near and dear to this day. But first, to help me share this story with more Pennsylvanians and Americans, will you take a moment to help my team and me spread the word?
---
| | | [HELP US HERE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZ2498G702qCUbGY-priHi8O_29GRY2_oxypDL_-XuZ-e9Hp5HUgfQt6bNOvVrDq6slcq33POVSN303SB-f98OOCLkeE9i2kRJqtfvho3ZVY8AuZC8aWCWFQOBWFtS5VXyj35cAypukgGQgfuByGUc_PmGmyPv4UNqSLv7sf3EX0nJxU3_MV4w==&c=RVTG8MNyNwENpHcRaibOewrwSqY_B4spJFYQUmM3j1tJZhnjH_9H3g==&ch=fYokebn59UBHNTfAf9T7ga9rna5n7WrxosH-dFXwKuWjo74VDwEKFA==)
---
| I come from the humblest of beginnings... Growing up on a pig farm in rural, southern Alabama, my family and I had no running water, had an outhouse in the back, and by all accounts were as poor as can be.
In addition, as most of you likely know by now, I also came into this world under some heartbreaking circumstances... It's still hard for me to say to this day, but my mother was the victim of a rape when she was just a child.
Yet even though the circumstances of my upbringing may have been some of the most tragic and destitute imaginable, they didn't stop me from living out my American Dream.
I was still able to graduate college, serve in the Army Reserves, publish a book, and do what I'm most proud of - start a loving family of my own.
I'm living proof of the American Dream, and it's why I'm running for the United States Senate in 2022.
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZ2498G702qCUbGY-priHi8O_29GRY2_oxypDL_-XuZ-e9Hp5HUgfQt6bNOvVrDq6slcq33POVSN303SB-f98OOCLkeE9i2kRJqtfvho3ZVY8AuZC8aWCWFQOBWFtS5VXyj35cAypukgGQgfuByGUc_PmGmyPv4UNqSLv7sf3EX0nJxU3_MV4w==&c=RVTG8MNyNwENpHcRaibOewrwSqY_B4spJFYQUmM3j1tJZhnjH_9H3g==&ch=fYokebn59UBHNTfAf9T7ga9rna5n7WrxosH-dFXwKuWjo74VDwEKFA==)
---
| I know that without a secure border to keep us safe, secure elections to make our voices heard, and a secure economy to help us achieve prosperity, the Dream that I lived could disappear for GOOD.
And I also know that without Pro-Life values being fought for in Washington, countless stories like mine might be lost forever to the Left's radical abortion agenda...
We're at a crucial moment in history - and we need someone who will fight for our values, and someone who has lived them.
If you help me get to work on this front, we'll make HISTORY in the process - when I take on the radical Democrat agenda in Washington, I'll do so as the first Black Republican woman EVER elected to the US Senate!
Thank you for hearing my story, and for helping me in this battle to take our country back by SAVING the American Dream!
---
| | | [JOIN THE MISSION](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IZ2498G702qCUbGY-priHi8O_29GRY2_oxypDL_-XuZ-e9Hp5HUgfQt6bNOvVrDq6slcq33POVSN303SB-f98OOCLkeE9i2kRJqtfvho3ZVY8AuZC8aWCWFQOBWFtS5VXyj35cAypukgGQgfuByGUc_PmGmyPv4UNqSLv7sf3EX0nJxU3_MV4w==&c=RVTG8MNyNwENpHcRaibOewrwSqY_B4spJFYQUmM3j1tJZhnjH_9H3g==&ch=fYokebn59UBHNTfAf9T7ga9rna5n7WrxosH-dFXwKuWjo74VDwEKFA==)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Add your name if you agree we must pass the Build Back Better Act →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

**$20,000+.**
That’s the amount of money other developed countries, including Denmark and Norway, are spending per toddler on child care.
**$500.**
That’s the amount of money the United States spends per toddler on child care.
**Now, my progressive colleagues and I are fighting to change this by passing President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda.**
If the Build Back Better Act is passed, most American families will continue receiving $3,000 to $3,600 in tax credits for each of their children. That means millions of children will be lifted out of poverty — cutting child poverty in half. This is an enormous triumph for working families. If you agree, please:
[**Add your name here if you support passing President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda and extending the Child Tax Credit.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37250553/310527531/176248071?refcode2=9957ef68-4528-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211008-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU3ZWY2OC00NTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MykJxoC5BhTTJO1fF9rXPTdsldi1swrB97vhFCL4D40=&emci=e30cf762-4528-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=9957ef68-4528-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=24719896)
Look — this isn’t hard. Our country has the resources to fund comprehensive child care, Medicare expansion, paid family and medical leave, create millions of green jobs, and so much more. That’s why President Biden’s $3.5T Build Back Better Act is completely paid for.
**But what is lacking is the political will, both from Republicans and conservatives in the Democratic Party.**
I’m reaching out to ask for your support so that we can show everyone opposing the Build Back Better Act that the progressive ideas in this plan are enormously popular.
[**Please, add your name here to say that you support President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda and the Child Tax Credit. Your support is so important as we get closer and closer to a vote on this transformative legislation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37250554/310527532/176248071?refcode2=9957ef68-4528-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211008-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU3ZWY2OC00NTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MykJxoC5BhTTJO1fF9rXPTdsldi1swrB97vhFCL4D40=&emci=e30cf762-4528-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=9957ef68-4528-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=24719896)
Thank you for reading, and thank you for your support.
\- Mondaire

name: James Carville
subject: Hard work and sweat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37251129/310529258/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yzk3ZjlhNC00NjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YfTwOEylraA3OpnX-Kau9fjpmbLYBBecif4OCYfX6w0=)
Friends — Before you log off for the weekend, I wanted to send a note outlining one of the most powerful ways you can support Democrats right now. Since Democrats regained control of the Senate, we’ve been moving quickly to pass legislation to help Americans across the country. We passed a $1.9 trillion stimulus bill to jumpstart our economy, speed up vaccinations, and support families with an expanded Child Tax Credit — _all without a single Republican vote!_ But I’ve seen some scary polls in recent months that should set off alarm bells for Democrats. If we’re not able to turn the tide in some states, we could find ourselves looking at Mitch McConnell in the majority when the Senate reconvenes after the upcoming midterms. **So back to the part where you can help. Defend the Senate has a big fundraising goal to hit this month and every dollar they raise will help elect Democrats and defend our Senate majority.** [_**So I’m personally asking: Will you chip in to Defend the Senate to help protect our Democratic Senate majority? clean_body: | = Friends — Before you log off for the weekend, I wanted to send a note outlining one of the most powerful ways you can support Democrats right now. Since Democrats regained control of the Senate, we’ve been moving quickly to pass legislation to help Americans across the country. We passed a $1.9 trillion stimulus bill to jumpstart our economy, speed up vaccinations, and support families with an expanded Child Tax Credit — all without a single Republican vote! But I’ve seen some scary polls in recent months that should set off alarm bells for Democrats. If we’re not able to turn the tide in some states, we could find ourselves looking at Mitch McConnell in the majority when the Senate reconvenes after the upcoming midterms. So back to the part where you can help. Defend the Senate has a big fundraising goal to hit this month and every dollar they raise will help elect Democrats and defend our Senate majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This isn’t the time for Democrats to get complacent or ambivalent. name: Team Franchot
subject: PHOTOS: On the Campaign Trail in September
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
September was another action-packed month for Team Franchot, and we’re very excited to share with you everything we’ve been up to! Below, we’ll show you a photo recap featuring the many wonderful communities that we’ve reached. If you’ve met with us at one of our events, then chances are you could see yourself in one of our photos!
Over the past weeks, Peter Franchot has been hard at work traveling across the state to build our people-powered movement. From Mountain Maryland to the Eastern Shore, it’s clear to us everywhere we go on the campaign trail that Marylanders are fired up and ready to change the way that government does business in 2022. To everyone who joined us this September, we’d like to give you our warmest thanks for your support. And to those who have yet to meet with us -- we can’t wait to see you soon!
We’re incredibly excited for everything we have in store for the Fall season. If you’re able, will you chip in to help Peter Franchot stay ahead in this competitive race? Starting off our October fundraising period with a groundswell of grassroots donations is precisely the boost we need to make sure we can hit our October fundraising goal. We’re looking to get 99 new grassroots donations by 11:59 PM tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]Thank you,
Team Franchot
Here’s our recap of September:
On September 2, Peter visited families in the Annapolis Gardens and Bowman Court communities whose homes were damaged in the storm and tornado from the day prior.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 4, Peter celebrated the incredible diversity of our state by visiting the Festival of India in West Friendship. He spoke to festival goers about the steps he’ll take as Governor to ensure that we make Diversity, Equity and Inclusion a foundational element of state government.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On Labor Day, Team Franchot was out in force to honor our labor unions during the Howard County Labor Day Picnic.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 14, Peter joined Delegate Ben Brooks for his action-packed event in Baltimore.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 15, Peter spoke to the Baltimore City Central Committee about his bold vision for the future of our state during their virtual meeting.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 16, Peter visited Prince George’s County to support his friend, County Executive Angela Alsobrooks, for her event in Glenarden.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]The next day, he had an excellent time visiting the Anne Arundel County Fair and chatting with good friends like Delegate Heather Bagnall.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 18, Peter traveled to Harford County to meet with elected officials and local leaders to discuss how he’ll partner with them to kickstart the county’s economic growth and secure a brighter and stronger future for our working families. Special thanks to Trish Heidenreich, Councilman Andre V. Johnson, Mayor Bill Martin and Delegate Steve Johnson for spending your day with us!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 19, Peter started off the day bright and early with a morning service at City of Praise Family Ministries in Landover. Special thanks to Bishop and Pastor Peebles for their invitation and hospitality.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]Afterwards, he joined the District 39 Democratic Club for their picnic in Montgomery Village, where he spoke to voters about his bold vision for the future of the state.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]We finished off the weekend with an action-packed Bull and Oyster Roast in Salisbury, where Peter was joined by friends like Mayor Jacob Day, Delegate Norm Conway, Councilman Josh Hastings, and Commissioner Josh Nordstrom. Warm thanks to Dave Layfield for hosting us!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 21, Peter attended the Montgomery County Rental Alliance Forum, where he spoke about the urgent steps we need to take to help our struggling families who are facing eviction during this crisis.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 24, Peter had a great evening joining Majority Leader Steny Hoyer for his Annual Bull Roast in Mitchellville, and he also ran into good friends like Delegate Heather Bagnall and Attorney General Brian Frosh.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 26, Peter headed to Ellicott City to attend an action-packed event with friends and supporters. He spoke about the steps he’ll take to secure a brighter future for Howard County, and for all of Maryland.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]Later that day, Team Franchot was on the ground to attend a picnic hosted by the Southwest Baltimore County Democratic Club.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 28, Peter joined his friend, Senator Melony Griffith, for her event in Annapolis with supporters.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 29, Peter had a great time speaking with Prince George’s County Councilmember Tom Dernoga for his virtual community conversation.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]On September 30, Peter rounded out an action-packed month by spending time with supporters at an event in Columbia, where he ran into his good friend Delegate Darryl Barnes. Warm thanks to Elisha Pulivarti and Rajan Natarajan for hosting us!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/septemberinreview?amount=20.22]
By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/f1e79c4d-e022-ec11-981f-501ac510a405/557cdbb5-4728-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdjZGJiNS00NzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FXB5_igzRSr7_b74HGqOQ63kAtKk17EzAqpImKTETh8=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Team Cranley
subject: Who do YOU want overseeing the redistricting process in 4 years?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
It’s time to make a change. | Friend, This is a long but important email about redistricting in Ohio, and, ultimately, it’s about a choice we have to make for the future of our state. **_[Will you take just a few minutes to read it, then chip in $25 (or whatever is right for you!) to help flip our state blue?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37251992/310532530/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.3856b267-4828-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&mc=ea.3856b267-4828-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODU2YjI2Ny00ODI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=im3nnLwzmqt-aP_9BApbTtyuRyWtF1UNbgK7GfNOWSE=)_** Despite Ohio voters making it _very_ clear in both 2015 and 2018 that it was time to rein in gerrymandering, our state’s redistricting committee just passed maps that heavily favor Republicans. In fact, experts say 70% of our state senate seats are likely to go for Republicans. _(That means they’ll hold onto their supermajorities in both houses of the legislature.)_ But here’s the important catch: Because the maps passed without bipartisan support, Ohio laws say we have to redraw maps in just 4 years. **We will have a chance to do this again, but unless we take action now, you can be sure Republicans will rig the maps in their favor again.** So right now, we have a decision to make as a state. We can sit back and watch this all unfold — and *hope* that in four years Republicans do the right thing. Or, we can take action today and make sure the next time Ohio draws maps, we have a leader who is committed to protecting our democratic process in our state. John Cranley is that leader. And today, he needs your help to bring fairness, accountability, and trust to Columbus. **_[We need you to join our fight. Please, donate $25 to make sure Democrats have a say in the redistricting process>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37251993/310532533/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.3856b267-4828-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&mc=ea.3856b267-4828-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODU2YjI2Ny00ODI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=im3nnLwzmqt-aP_9BApbTtyuRyWtF1UNbgK7GfNOWSE=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ _**[Donate clean_body: It’s time to make a change. | Friend, This is a long but important email about redistricting in Ohio, and, ultimately, it’s about a choice we have to make for the future of our state. = Despite Ohio voters making it very clear in both 2015 and 2018 that it was time to rein in gerrymandering, our state’s redistricting committee just passed maps that heavily favor Republicans. In fact, experts say 70% of our state senate seats are likely to go for Republicans. (That means they’ll hold onto their supermajorities in both houses of the legislature.) But here’s the important catch: Because the maps passed without bipartisan support, Ohio laws say we have to redraw maps in just 4 years. We will have a chance to do this again, but unless we take action now, you can be sure Republicans will rig the maps in their favor again. So right now, we have a decision to make as a state. We can sit back and watch this all unfold — and hope that in four years Republicans do the right thing. Or, we can take action today and make sure the next time Ohio draws maps, we have a leader who is committed to protecting our democratic process in our state. John Cranley is that leader. And today, he needs your help to bring fairness, accountability, and trust to Columbus. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thanks, Team Cranley = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. My friend, I'm working to elect Eric Lynn to Congress, and Eric mentioned he's been in touch with you about the campaign. **Every time I talk with Eric, I 'm impressed by his vast experience and pragmatism. He really understands how to get things done in Washington, but more importantly, he understands our local community in Pinellas County.** As great of a candidate as Eric is, this is not going to be an easy race. Republicans have indicated that Florida's 13th district will be a top target for them in 2022. Whoever wins the GOP primary will be a hard-right, Trump Republican, and we expect this will be one of the most competitive campaigns in the country. _**Republicans are conspiring to gerrymander this district to make it easier for them to win.**_ [**My friend, we can 't win this race without your support. Please click here to donate and do your part to keep this seat blue.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jqULl_Lia3Ag1XafBpEVkJ_7a25YcJmJ1WBWbV5SWnQ=/6h0GZ6Rts0e591NeMTJO9pOZM0wq-OmtFh4KjiVrVEA=) Eric is a proven leader and has earned the trust of President Obama, multiple Secretaries of Defense, and countless world leaders during his time as a public servant. I trust him to fight for us in Washington, to improve the lives of everyone in Pinellas County, and to stand up for American values worldwide. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. ****** **** With your help, we will win this campaign, keep the Democratic House Majority, and fight for progress! Thanks in advance for your help, Abby Olmstead Campaign Manager Eric Lynn for Congress =** | Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress Eric Lynn for Congress PO Box 16991 St. Petersburg FL 33733 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

body:
Last night I had the honor to speak to one of the largest College...

---
| | Dear Friend,
This week I had the honor to speak to one of the largest College Republican chapters in the country, the University of Georgia College Republicans.
---
---
I told these great young patriots that there's no room for weak-kneed, self-interested politicians in the Republican Party. It's time for a new generation of bold conservative trailblazers to retake America from the liberal DC swamp and return it to the people.
---
---
---
Our America First message is resonating with those young and old and our campaign is rapidly building momentum to take back Georgia's 6th District from the radical left.
President Trump [gave our campaign a shout out](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zmbFkFZUmPT_QsR5bihDXZWVpjyn8ocEcvacvqQlXbO8n6qOZr_Q8fLsubp_CtxMxIoGWjvTxPEDviJHmWTpdMpH0DaRllZ7a-axIf8U5cH_n50z4ck9OJT6pfsdWE_jHnRoWT_NIZefaqMMt7xTo8h6ZeGDifSFCV3YqOZVP0K-zS763uXD93hxsupFxOJV&c=B3Vusp5fwVEvNnSW0mB24SNcib1J5DhExfPgHtAg22tXkO95EUO3UA==&ch=iL7fd5XyirZFdv38KcIyKEbHlQMMG98YKjT3JnS1KhHialcWtoHtRg==) at his rally in Perry last month, and shortly thereafter the Biden Administration identified Georgia's 6th Congressional District as one of the 13 most vulnerable seats that could flip from Democrat to Republican in 2022.

name: Farah Melendez
subject: Nikki just asked me if you can make a $10 donation
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

Nikki and I spoke briefly this morning about our campaign strategy moving forward. I want to give you an inside look.

We’re at a critical juncture right now. Ron DeSantis is doubling down on his war against the Biden Administration, and we know that Republican donors big and small will be fired up. That’s why your $10 contribution is so important.

I can’t emphasize this enough, team. We can’t afford even a momentary lapse in our fundraising if we want to defeat DeSantis next year.

Supporters like you are the reason we can keep pace with Ron DeSantis and build a winning campaign. Please click here to chip in $10 or whatever you can spare to help us stop DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=106farah]

I know that it’s easy to lose hope right now, so I can’t thank you enough for sticking with us. Together, we’re going to break Florida’s corrupt system, defeat DeSantis, and bring something new to
Tallahassee.

Thanks for being on our team!

Farah Melendez
Campaign Manager

body:
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37258688/310542308/-2023814932?refcode=20211008.3_EW_10BF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTYwYjI5NC00YzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9gX29ktERSq_8pcFBfqiu-VMLryZXWvC5Bp8OOfHWHM=)

| | Derek, it’s an old truism in politics. Fridays are really bad for raising money.

After a long work week, everyone is daydreaming about that glass of red wine or that football game on Sunday.

We get it, but Derek, but with less than a month before Election Day and polls showing a tied race, we can’t afford to take a single day off.

[**Will you chip in anything you can afford right now? name: Beth Kloser
subject: Here’s what happened in Texas!
body:
We had an amazing launch in Texas this weekend

| | Friend, **This past weekend, Texas showed up. ** We just launched our program to register hundreds of thousands of young Texans in the next two election cycles and encourage millions more to turn out to vote. We heard from leaders and young Texans about the challenges young people are facing, and we’re ready to transform Texas’ future. **If our launch in Texas showed us one thing, it’s that our future is bright. ** Our statewide launch was a resounding success and our message was loud and clear: We are building a government that serves us and we are doing it with our vote. We need allies in our fight to protect our voting rights, not adversaries. Our Texas events were a prime opportunity to speak to the leaders on our side and we can’t wait to do it again on a national scale. [**Join us: Become a NextGen volunteer to be on the frontlines of progressive change in Texas and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37261654/310548261/788955735?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZjNGNjYi01MDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQKOoQT9LElAxcY-xZfFKnELstnyBIHynzoqYY3VZno=&emci=de3f9da0-b227-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a96c4ccb-5028-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=6787172) **Here’s what happened at our Texas launch:**
* We started our statewide tour in the Rio Grande Valley, meeting with and listening to local leaders in McAllen, which culminated in our Houston People’s Hearing.
* Along the way, we registered voters at the University of Texas Rio Grande Valley, rallied alongside activists at the Houston Women’s March, and established an essential foundation to organize young voters across Texas in 2022 and beyond.
* At the Houston People’s Hearing, we had a fantastic conversation with a number of our leaders, including NextGen America founder Tom Steyer, former U.S. Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Julián Castro, Congresswoman Sheila Jackson Lee, and Congressman Al Green.

The power of young Texans is palpable and undeniable. We felt it in the energy folks brought to Houston. Our launch sparked the necessary dialogue between young voters in Texas and our leaders, setting Texas on a path that works for all of us. **And here’s the best part — our Texas launch was just the beginning.** From here, we’re going to register and mobilize millions of young voters in Texas and around the country. [**Will you join us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37261655/310548262/-777128206?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZjNGNjYi01MDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQKOoQT9LElAxcY-xZfFKnELstnyBIHynzoqYY3VZno=&emci=de3f9da0-b227-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a96c4ccb-5028-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=6787172) | [Volunteer with us](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37261657/310548264/1595524789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTZjNGNjYi01MDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQKOoQT9LElAxcY-xZfFKnELstnyBIHynzoqYY3VZno=&emci=de3f9da0-b227-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=a96c4ccb-5028-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=6787172 "Sign up to text")

clean_body: We had an amazing launch in Texas this weekend | | Friend, This past weekend, Texas showed up. We just launched our program to register hundreds of thousands of young Texans in the next two election cycles and encourage millions more to turn out to vote. We heard from leaders and young Texans about the challenges young people are facing, and we’re ready to transform Texas’ future. If our launch in Texas showed us one thing, it’s that our future is bright. Our statewide launch was a resounding success and our message was loud and clear: We are building a government that serves us and we are doing it with our vote. We need allies in our fight to protect our voting rights, not adversaries. Our Texas events were a prime opportunity to speak to the leaders on our side and we can’t wait to do it again on a national scale. Here’s what happened at our Texas launch: We started our statewide tour in the Rio Grande Valley, meeting with and listening to local leaders in McAllen, which culminated in our Houston People’s Hearing. Along the way, we registered voters at the University of Texas Rio Grande Valley, rallied alongside activists at the Houston Women’s March, and established an essential foundation to organize young voters across Texas in 2022 and beyond. At the Houston People’s Hearing, we had a fantastic conversation with a number of our leaders, including NextGen America founder Tom Steyer, former U.S. Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Julián Castro, Congresswoman Sheila Jackson Lee, and Congressman Al Green. The power of young Texans is palpable and undeniable. We felt it in the energy folks brought to Houston. Our launch sparked the necessary dialogue between young voters in Texas and our leaders, setting Texas on a path that works for all of us. And here’s the best part — our Texas launch was just the beginning. From here, we’re going to register and mobilize millions of young voters in Texas and around the country. | "Sign up to text" Thank you, Beth Kloser Texas State Director NextGen America | NextGen America** 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: Team Cooper
subject: About North Carolina’s redistricting process
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We deserve free and fair elections. That will only happen with nonpartisan legislative maps. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37261875/310549187/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzBlOGYxMS01MTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQyyYI5UarSDXHb3p3n-0hOwLXpwyImoLcL3PlCKzmI=&emci=3d12ef33-4e28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=bc0e8f11-5128-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)
Peter, _Redistricting starts NOW._ North Carolina’s redistricting committees have begun meeting to start the process of drawing new legislative maps. We need them to know from day one that we _demand_ a fair, transparent, and nonpartisan process — _unlike last time._ Although the committees held a series of public hearings _before_ they began drawing maps, there isn’t yet a plan to hold a similar series _after_ the maps are released. **We think this is unacceptable.** **[North Carolinians deserve to be heard. Sign Roy’s petition immediately to call on the committees to guarantee that they’ll hold hearings across North Carolina after drafting our legislative maps>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37261878/310549190/148367135?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzBlOGYxMS01MTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQyyYI5UarSDXHb3p3n-0hOwLXpwyImoLcL3PlCKzmI=&emci=3d12ef33-4e28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=bc0e8f11-5128-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37261880/310549193/148367135?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzBlOGYxMS01MTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQyyYI5UarSDXHb3p3n-0hOwLXpwyImoLcL3PlCKzmI=&emci=3d12ef33-4e28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=bc0e8f11-5128-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)**
---
This can’t be a repeat of last time. Back in 2019, our old legislative maps got thrown out in court for their blatant partisan gerrymandering that gave some voters more of a say in our elections than others.
Peter, we can bet that Republicans in the legislature will take every opportunity to conduct this redistricting process _without_ meaningful public input — **that’s the only way they’ll be able to gerrymander the maps in their favor yet again.**
**[We deserve to be heard. Add your name right now to demand public hearings after the new maps are released>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37261881/310549196/148367135?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzBlOGYxMS01MTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQyyYI5UarSDXHb3p3n-0hOwLXpwyImoLcL3PlCKzmI=&emci=3d12ef33-4e28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=bc0e8f11-5128-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1049176)**
Thanks for standing with us,
Team Cooper

We need a champion in Congress, too. We need Erika Benfield. I know Erika. As a small-business owner, she understands how tough this pandemic has been on our economy. She will always work to protect small businesses and the communities they serve. We need Erika Benfield in Congress to rein in government and unleash prosperity. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: [Co-signers needed] My open letter urging Senators Manchin and Sinema to abolish the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
It's going to take a lot of signatures to make a difference
#

Folks,
When our democracy doesn't work for working people, it doesn't work, period.
That's why it's absurd to me that we have Democrats in the Senate who refuse to get on board with abolishing the filibuster.
I can promise you this: If I'm elected to serve as Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator, I will be a much-needed Democratic vote to abolish the Jim Crow filibuster. But working families need relief now, so I'm taking a different approach.
**I'm writing an open letter to Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to urge them to reconsider their stance on the filibuster, and I'm hoping to get a lot of co-signers to join me.**
[Will you read my letter to Senators Manchin and Sinema below and add your name to join me in urging them to abolish the filibuster?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37263140/310555267/2138276158?refcode2=44271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211008-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDI3MTgyOS01NDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CWVkJtujHy5MVK5Y4C_oP6RbaxzISBKzxM7LB_8PH1w=&emci=41271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=44271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18034979)
It's going to take a lot of signatures to make a difference, so I hope you will sign your name today.
Thank you,
Malcolm
**[SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37263141/310555268/2140569918?refcode2=44271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211008-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDI3MTgyOS01NDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CWVkJtujHy5MVK5Y4C_oP6RbaxzISBKzxM7LB_8PH1w=&emci=41271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=44271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18034979)**
Dear Senator Joe Manchin and Senator Kyrsten Sinema,
I'm writing to express my concern over your repeated refusal to join your fellow Democrats in moving to abolish the filibuster.
The very concept of the filibuster undermines the principle of majority rule.
It has been repeatedly used to silence working class voters by allowing a minority of Senators to block movement on vital legislation overwhelmingly supported by the American people.
So as your fellow American and as a working-class person, I implore you to rethink your decision to stall much-needed progress by supporting this un-democratic rule.
**The filibuster is way past its expiration date, and a majority of Americans — including 2 in 5 independents and 1 in 3 Republicans — support getting rid of it.**
The choices are clear: It's the filibuster or a functioning democracy that works for working people.
Either we get rid of this Jim Crow relic, or we continue to let Republicans block real progress that will save lives. It's that simple.
As the representative of the third-poorest House district in Pennsylvania, I can tell you that we absolutely cannot afford to wait around for the GOP to get on board with helping people.
We've tried working with them on health care, climate, wages, voting rights, and so much more.
They're not interested in bipartisanship — so it's past time for a different approach.
Getting rid of the filibuster will allow Democrats to bring real relief to working families across this country.
You don't want to go down in history as the Senators who stalled on this much-needed change, so please, I urge you to be a part of the solution rather than the problem.
Bravery is a renewable resource. Now is the time to be brave.
Respectfully,
Malcolm Kenyatta
**[SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37263142/310555269/2140569918?refcode2=44271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=em211008-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDI3MTgyOS01NDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CWVkJtujHy5MVK5Y4C_oP6RbaxzISBKzxM7LB_8PH1w=&emci=41271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=44271829-5428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18034979)**
