I'm writing an open letter to Senators Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema to urge them to reconsider their stance on the filibuster, and I'm hoping to get a lot of co-signers to join me. It's going to take a lot of signatures to make a difference, so I hope you will sign your name today. Thank you, Malcolm Dear Senator Joe Manchin and Senator Kyrsten Sinema, I'm writing to express my concern over your repeated refusal to join your fellow Democrats in moving to abolish the filibuster. The very concept of the filibuster undermines the principle of majority rule. It has been repeatedly used to silence working class voters by allowing a minority of Senators to block movement on vital legislation overwhelmingly supported by the American people. So as your fellow American and as a working-class person, I implore you to rethink your decision to stall much-needed progress by supporting this un-democratic rule. The filibuster is way past its expiration date, and a majority of Americans — including 2 in 5 independents and 1 in 3 Republicans — support getting rid of it. The choices are clear: It's the filibuster or a functioning democracy that works for working people. Either we get rid of this Jim Crow relic, or we continue to let Republicans block real progress that will save lives. It's that simple. As the representative of the third-poorest House district in Pennsylvania, I can tell you that we absolutely cannot afford to wait around for the GOP to get on board with helping people. We've tried working with them on health care, climate, wages, voting rights, and so much more. They're not interested in bipartisanship — so it's past time for a different approach. Getting rid of the filibuster will allow Democrats to bring real relief to working families across this country. You don't want to go down in history as the Senators who stalled on this much-needed change, so please, I urge you to be a part of the solution rather than the problem. Bravery is a renewable resource. Now is the time to be brave. Respectfully, Malcolm Kenyatta * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, to unsubscribe. By submitting your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic campaign updates from Malcolm PAC. Msg & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info, STOP to stop receiving messages.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Morgan?=
subject: Join the Ohio AFL-CIO Day of Action TOMORROW!
body:
Events in Grove City, Chillicothe, and Athens! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a9d30ff5a674/join-a-local-labor-day-celebration-tomorrow-5022365?e=400a181d5a)
---
| | |
---
| | | | [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=75661a7ea0&e=400a181d5a)
---
Watch Allison's message to union members and everyone who supports working families throughout the 15th district!
---
|
---
| **Allison knows how important unions are to workers, their families and the nation.** She has always been a champion for labor and working people, introducing legislation to expand collective bargaining rights (including to her own staff in the Ohio legislature) and walking in picket lines and standing in solidarity with workers throughout the pandemic.

**Both Allison and I grew up in strong union households, and we learned an important lesson early:_progress is always won, never given_** _._ And we'll only win by standing together against Mike Carey's extreme anti-worker agenda.

_**Can you join the Ohio AFL-CIO's Day of Action for Allison tomorrow, ?**_
---
|
---
| [Help us WIN with the Ohio AFL-CIO](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3b012efbcc&e=400a181d5a "Help us WIN with the Ohio AFL-CIO")
---
| To build an economy that works for everyone, we must recenter working people as the foundation for growth and prosperity. Workers deserve the same freedom CEOs have: the freedom to negotiate a fair return on our work.**In Congress, I will proudly vote for the Protecting the Right to Organize Act (PRO Act)** and other legislation that protects and expands the rights of workers to join together and improve their working conditions and safety.
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c5edf873d2&e=400a181d5a)
---
| Expanding and protecting union jobs and the right to organize is especially critical to Ohio’s working women. **Women represented by labor unions earn an average of $212 more per week than women in nonunion jobs,** and union women experience a smaller gender wage gap with greater access to critical benefits that can ensure their long term financial security and well-being. **In Ohio, the union wage advantage is large enough to cover the costs of full-time child care for an infant in a qualified daycare center.**
---
| [Volunteer with the Ohio AFL-CIO](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a3e0dd0c70&e=400a181d5a "Volunteer with the Ohio AFL-CIO")
---
| There’s nowhere in the world with more productive, harder working people than Ohio. But for too many who put in well over a full day’s work, it’s becoming harder to pay the rent, cover the cost of healthcare, and take care of their families.

We need to invest in jobs that can’t be outsourced, like energy production and advanced manufacturing. We should create good-paying jobs by making infrastructure investments in transportation, utilities, school buildings, job training, and affordable housing, while making it easier for everybody to commute. We need to _**do right by Ohio workers**_ who haven’t seen a raise in way too long, by increasing the federal minimum wage and by ensuring tax cuts go to working families instead of the wealthy and well-connected.

But to accomplish _any_ of that, we need to talk to every single voter we can between now and Election Day. **The AFL-CIO and their members KNOW how critical voter engagement is, and they are doing the hard work of making change. Will you join them?**
---
| [Support Allison and Ohio Workers ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=e69a54a980&e=400a181d5a "Support Allison and Ohio Workers ")

**Now, Mark Brnovich (Arizona's current AG) is trying to enforce a law prohibiting certain abortions — even though federal courts have already held that the law is UNCONSTITUTIONAL.**

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: It All Comes Down to This
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Tim Walz' approval ratings are falling fast. Americans are fed up with government mandates - from Joe Biden down to their tyrannical governors. Even the largest public sector union in Minnesota has [come out against vaccine mandates](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkJlXgL9munRxDe4oeb2MwSCYBZU9caZ9uYY9jEQYWdLI0oncATN-wZTpTHxWe-WYbAocA5aetYHQkqnKaiqoG88zHYGoU2XvF3LaSxugyc4WKJz7fWqoj7HfXt9Az4VSBA&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=2). **So why is Walz playing politics with our freedoms?** The Governor and Legislature are tasked to pass a $250 Million Frontline Workers Pay Bill and now Walz is waffling on calling the Special Session. He's most likely worried that his repeated lies and disinformation campaign is spelling political trouble for him. Mandating vaccines doesn't work well when people are waking up to his lies. Look at this recent fear mongering lie he made to the Strib: **We can't trust what this man says! More and more Minnesotans are starting to see through the lies.** Last week our team made 18,330 calls to voters across the state to bring real heat on politicians in St Paul. This was done because of **your support**! Politicians who refuse to get on board the Stop Vaccine Mandates train are in real trouble. The same swamp dwellers who told us we would not be able to End Walz' Emergency Powers before, are now underestimating the power we bring to the table on stopping mandates. We proved them wrong in June and we'll do it again! Action 4 Liberty doesn't waste time cozying up to the Swamp in St Paul. We go directly to the people. Because in the end of the day, politicians care about one thing: elections. We take our message to their voters. And that's what makes our programs work! This battle to Stop Vaccine Mandates is as important as they come. That's why our team is making calls around the clock. Hiring field staff is key to success - but it's not cheap. And I fear we won't be able to keep this up without your help. It all comes down to this... **We just rented a home near the Capitol to house all these young liberty professionals we brought in to fight for your rights. Please help us continue expanding these field operations by donating today.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=3)
---
We aren't like any other political organization out there. We go right for the jugular when it comes to political pain. And the Swamp has attacked us for it.
**Politicians had the House Sergeant-at-Arms[call us](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYwrP-O24yBG3Zu1qoe22Hi&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=4) and tell us to take down contact info for legislators on social media. We ignored their request.**
**Then the Democrat Party hired a Minneapolis Law Firm to file a[baseless campaign finance](https://www.action4liberty.com/dfl_s_fake_complaint_against_us_dismissed_by_cfb?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=5) complaint against us. We fought back and it was dismissed!**
**And recently, the Democrats cozied up to the top brass at the[State Fair to remove our "King Walz"](https://www.action4liberty.com/king_walz_sign_goes_back_up_on_state_fair_booth?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=6) sign from our booth. We sent them a letter from our lawyer, printed up a new sign and stuck it right back up on top!**
I learned from an early age two things: 1) do what you believe is right and 2) don't back down to bullies!
Our pressure campaign will continue on. We will NEVER BACK DOWN! Our field staff will continue making calls around the clock and our social media ads will continue to reach tens of thousands of Minnesota voters.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=7)
The Swamp would like to see us fail. And they will get this wish if we can't continue funding our field operations. So I need your help.
**Peter, help my team continue phone calls, doorknocks and running ads to Stop Vaccine Mandates in Minnesota!**
We're getting our message out to tens of thousands Minnesotans a week and we need your help by [**donating today**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=8). Don't let the Swamp win - your health freedom is at stake.
[**Please make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to Stop the Walz-Biden Vaccine Mandates.**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=9)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=10).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=11).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=don_t_let_walz_win_retarget&n=12), software for leaders.

subject: Does Joe Biden still have your support?

body:
Joe Biden has been working hard to fulfill campaign promises, but the GOP has been blocking any attempt to carry out his plan to put this country back on track. This time, they’re hoping that he’ll fail to pass the Build Back Better Act. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37264539/310559803/-2098736573?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYwYTUyZC01ODI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gW743LJJqDI7FlD7fDfZ6w6Qv6nXUoZyshN5cc3eEjA=&emci=8f2de252-4428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fa60a52d-5828-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21852952) | Hi Peter, Joe Biden has been working hard to fulfill campaign promises, but the GOP has been blocking any attempt to carry out his plan to put this country back on track. ---
Peter, this bill would be the largest expansion of the national safety net since the 1960’s. It includes:
* Incentives for green policies in order to **tackle climate change,** which has had exceptionally disastrous effects on our communities this year
* **Lowered prescription drug prices** so that quality healthcare is accessible to all and treated as a human right
* **Two free years of community college** for all students so that family income is not a barrier to higher education
* An **extended child tax credit** to lift millions of children and families out of poverty
* **Paid family and medical leave** for the first time in American history, ensuring that working class folks can spend time with their loved ones and focus on their health when they need it

The Build Back Better Act is the single most important piece of legislation for the working class, and the direction our country goes in hinges on its passage. **So, Peter, we have to ask – do you support the Build Back Better Act? **
| [LET US KNOW HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37264542/310559806/1220293420?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYwYTUyZC01ODI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gW743LJJqDI7FlD7fDfZ6w6Qv6nXUoZyshN5cc3eEjA=&emci=8f2de252-4428-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=fa60a52d-5828-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=21852952)
---

Team Palmer
* * *
David Palmer is running for Congress in Illinois’ 13th Congressional District. After years of hearing from entrenched D.C. politicians who care more about re-election than sticking up for the people they represent, David is ready to serve, listen, and do everything he can to make life better for the people here in Central Illinois. **Our campaign runs on support from people like you, not special interests, so anything you can chip in will help give Illinoisans a leader they can count on.** [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37264543/310559807/-2035484793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTYwYTUyZC01ODI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gW743LJJqDI7FlD7fDfZ6w6Qv6nXUoZyshN5cc3eEjA=) Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | Friends,
Pennsylvania's elections for Commonwealth Court Judge are approaching on November 2nd. As my friends and supporters, I want to make you aware of Stacy Wallace, who I believe is an outstanding candidate for the Commonwealth Court. As the November 2nd election nears, she needs our support.
---
| I strongly support Stacy Wallace in her candidacy for judge. She has served Pennsylvania for nearly two decades in the legal field, and she is ready to serve all of Pennsylvania as a judge. Stacy is not just talented in her legal career, but also has a strong record of community service.
Stacy Wallace is a woman who exhibits a great work ethic and strong heart. With her grassroots perspective, she will undoubtedly be a voice for all of Pennsylvania. She encourages conservative female candidates, including me, to stand in the face of adversity as it reads in Proverbs 31:25, "She is clothed in strength and dignity, and laughs without fear of the future." With her grassroots perspective and heart for others, she will undoubtedly be a voice for all of Pennsylvania.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: How I got my start in public service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, This is a longer email, but I hope you'll read it. This week marked the anniversary of the start of my campaign in 2016, and I wanted to take the time to explain why I'm in the Senate, working for people like you, friend. I first got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that children like my son Ben, who experiences severe disabilities, would be fully included in their communities and have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. I know from experience how important things like affordable health care, paid family leave, and home-based care are, especially for families like mine. But many Americans cannot afford the support they need. **That's why I am fighting to ensure that all Americans, regardless of personal circumstances, have the opportunity and resources to succeed.** Thanks to our Democratic majority, we've been able to pass critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan, helping to curb the pandemic, provide economic relief to the American people, and lower health care costs. But we aren't stopping there – I will continue working across party lines to strengthen the state’s economy, keep our country safe, and make it easier for New Hampshire families to make ends meet. I’m writing today because it has been my honor to represent New Hampshire in the U.S. Senate, but there's still much work to be done. I only won my last election by 1,017 votes, making me a real target for Republicans who are already spending BIG to rally their base and tarnish my record. My team and I are no strangers to tough fights, but if we're going to win this, we will need the resources to do it. I hate asking for money. However, my campaign is off to a slow start this month, and we need the funds to fight back against Republican attacks. **[Will you please rush $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help us win in New Hampshire and protect our vulnerable Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37267228/310569267/-214106137?refcode=e20211008_mwh-publicservice-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWMwOTRlYS01ZDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDAjIB72mnxVg4xxUGcdj82tp7NbJGFpWrG12Kyaqq0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37267229/310569268/-214106137?refcode=e20211008_mwh-publicservice-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWMwOTRlYS01ZDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TDAjIB72mnxVg4xxUGcdj82tp7NbJGFpWrG12Kyaqq0=)

name: James Carville
subject: Did you see the new poll?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
You won’t believe who is ahead
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37267477/310569885/-2023814932?refcode=20211008.4_JC_10BG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ4MTQ1ZS01ZDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xay-RPC3MWfmdrS8_wraPmIGG_a29BqHX0K4ww6pGyQ=)

| | Derek, did you see the most recent poll in the Virginia governor’s race?

**The latest poll from Emerson is a virtual tie. Terry is 49 and Trump’s guy Youngkin has 48.**

A poll this close would be bad news at any time, but, right now, when Virginia voters are already voting early, a poll like this could be a game changer. Glenn Youngkin could finally get the push he needs to pull ahead of Terry once and for all.

We can’t let it happen, Derek.

But if Terry gets a massive influx of grassroots support right away, he’ll be able to turn the tide back in his direction by getting voters out during the critical early vote period.

There’s just one problem — Fridays are tough fundraising days on campaigns. You know it, I know it, Terry knows it. People just don’t donate the same way they do the rest of the week. This all adds up to a perfect storm.

**[Will you chip in right now? clean_body: You won’t believe who is ahead | | | = | | Derek, did you see the most recent poll in the Virginia governor’s race? The latest poll from Emerson is a virtual tie. Terry is 49 and Trump’s guy Youngkin has 48. A poll this close would be bad news at any time, but, right now, when Virginia voters are already voting early, a poll like this could be a game changer. Glenn Youngkin could finally get the push he needs to pull ahead of Terry once and for all. We can’t let it happen, Derek. But if Terry gets a massive influx of grassroots support right away, he’ll be able to turn the tide back in his direction by getting voters out during the critical early vote period. There’s just one problem — Fridays are tough fundraising days on campaigns. You know it, I know it, Terry knows it. People just don’t donate the same way they do the rest of the week. This all adds up to a perfect storm. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your quick response, James Carville =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs8t719cpcm3vc6ltgsbmivqva9pougmr99gmcq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cti66o34c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo520e7fl7csqtg8ijojn41m6geur3sdk05kjn78_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cti66o34c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhuca1ltc4msume83oirb765cvtl50u2fq0s3og0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cti66o34c3h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Giffords.org
subject: (Bump) Arlington, Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Four victims were shot but all 1,800 students at that school are permanently changed by their experience.
#

Friends,
**On Wednesday, an active shooter was reported at a high school in Arlington, Texas.**
Four victims were shot but all 1,800+ students and teachers at that school are permanently changed by their experience.
You can probably guess how Texas Senator Ted Cruz reacted...He offered his **prayers** for the students and teachers who had to run for their lives that day.
He went on to say there have been “far too many [shootings] at far too many schools.”
We can at least agree on that.. But we DISAGREE on what comes next.
Cruz seems to think we should wait for this problem to somehow fix itself—while WE believe it’s time for the Senate to finally take meaningful action to prevent shootings like this from happening in the future, starting with universal background checks.
Whose side are YOU on?
[**Make a difference in the fight to stop gun violence by making a $3 contribution to Giffords today. We’ll put your donation to work immediately by pressuring the Senate to pass the House’s background checks bill.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211008-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1081_3935704_zecucx&akid=1081%2E3935704%2Ezecucx)
As schools are reopening for in-person learning after the COVID-19 pandemic, we cannot let a return to school shootings threaten our kids’ lives.
What will it take for the Senate to act?
Pressure, and lots of it.
That’s why we must use our collective voices to call on the Senate to pass universal background checks to prevent gun violence.
[**And we need your support to do it so please, make a $3 donation to Giffords today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-oct21?refcode=em211008-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1081_3935704_zecucx&akid=1081%2E3935704%2Ezecucx)
We couldn’t do this work without your support, so thank you for whatever you can afford to give.
Team Giffords

clean_body: Four victims were shot but all 1,800 students at that school are permanently changed by their experience. Friends, On Wednesday, an active shooter was reported at a high school in Arlington, Texas. Four victims were shot but all 1,800+ students and teachers at that school are permanently changed by their experience. You can probably guess how Texas Senator Ted Cruz reacted...He offered his prayers for the students and teachers who had to run for their lives that day. He went on to say there have been “far too many [shootings] at far too many schools.” We can at least agree on that.. But we DISAGREE on what comes next. Cruz seems to think we should wait for this problem to somehow fix itself—while WE believe it’s time for the Senate to finally take meaningful action to prevent shootings like this from happening in the future, starting with universal background checks. Whose side are YOU on? As schools are reopening for in-person learning after the COVID-19 pandemic, we cannot let a return to school shootings threaten our kids’ lives. What will it take for the Senate to act? Pressure, and lots of it. That’s why we must use our collective voices to call on the Senate to pass universal background checks to prevent gun violence. We couldn’t do this work without your support, so thank you for whatever you can afford to give. Team Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
This is not real leadership, Peter.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37270504/310580302/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWNiMjlhNC02MzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T7f4cx4j_6Lq4RtlzBCW5SVSmJpHyE-OpY6AqW9G7gw=)

Peter, I am horrified by my opponent’s recent remarks.

**Winsome Sears has refused to publicly state her vaccination status** — she went so far as to say it was time to “leave people be” on the subject.

It’s no question: This election is a life or death matter.

My extreme opponent’s blatant disregard for science has real consequences for Virginians. Misinformation and evasiveness has no place in our Commonwealth.

This is my pledge to you, Peter: As your Lt. Governor, I will always listen to the science — _because it is what’s best for Virginia and the only way to build back better from this pandemic._

**I was proud to get vaccinated, because leadership is standing up for what is right, leading by example, and prioritizing the well‐being of your peers.**

Winsome Sears has shown her true colors — _and none of these qualities._

[**This proves the importance of this election. As we move closer to Election Day next month, I need your support. Can I count on your $3 donation toward our $30,000 October goal? name: Patty Murray
subject: New Hampshire is on the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Republicans only have to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and Mitch McConnell is laser-focused on New Hampshire.
#
My friend Maggie Hassan from New Hampshire won her last Senate race by only 1,017 votes. Her reelection this cycle could be just as close.
Republicans only have to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and Mitch McConnell is laser-focused on New Hampshire. GOP megadonors are already spending millions to unseat Maggie Hassan and replace her with a rubber stamp for McConnell's far-right agenda.

The fact is, so many of the big steps that we’ve taken to make Virginia a thriving and welcoming state for everyone — from expanding Medicaid to comprehensive voting rights protections — are at risk. Listen, if we don't elect Democratic leaders again this year, all of Virginia's progress could be reversed. Glenn Youngkin and his fellow right-wing extremists are proudly campaigning on rolling back all of the progress Virginia has made over the past few years under Democratic leadership and majorities. We have a great slate of candidates on the ballot this year. I believe that my friends Terry McAuliffe, Hala Ayala, and Mark Herring have a good shot of winning their races if folks get out to vote — but even if we do all we can to ensure their victories, they can’t govern alone. If we really want to protect Virginia’s progress, we need a majority in the House of Delegates, too. **[I’ll be honest, Derek, my friends over at the DPVA are worried about momentum starting to slow down, so they asked me to reach out to strong Democrats like you. body:
As long as we’re in this together, Mark is going to win — because we have something our opponents don’t: people like you.
#

Friends —
Next week, volunteers will be texting Arizonans with a simple, but important question:
**“Do you support Mark Kelly’s re-election to the U.S. Senate?”**
Today, we are asking you the same question, because we’re looking for as many responses as possible:

Both Sharice Davids and I know that members of Nevada and Kansas’ LGBTQ+ communities are invaluable and make our states great. As a staunch advocate for LGBTQ+ rights, I fought hard to pass the Equality Act alongside my friend Sharice. **Sharice Davids knows firsthand how personal this fight is for millions of Americans and that _guaranteeing equal rights for everyone is just common sense._** To be honest with you, that belief won’t be all that popular if we lose control of the House. subject: I'm heading to the border

body:
96
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/2021-october-
border-visit-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct
8hf Friend — On Fridays, we usually send out our newsletter to
share some good news and updates about the campaign. Today, I want to
share something a little different.

In a few minutes, I'll be landing
in Brownsville, TX. From there, I'm traveling to the border to see the
crisis that President Biden and his enablers, chief among them Raphael
Warnock, have created.

They’ve created a crisis by opening our
borders, all but ending immigration enforcement, and pushing amnesty
for millions who are here illegally. When you promise those things,
people listen — and our border has been overwhelmed as a result.

To
me, it’s simple. We should return to President Trump’s immigration
policies that worked: Secure the border, enforce the law, finish the
wall, and zero amnesty.

With your help, that’s exactly what I’ll
fight for in the U.S. Senate. Be on the lookout for additional updates
regarding this trip and what we see while we’re at the border.

Thank
you for your continued support.
https://winred.votegaryblack.com/gary-black-for-senate-inc/2021-october

I

absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.

Raphael Warnock has
already stockpiled $10 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S.
Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat
will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who
can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails
are a vital part of our efforts.

With one conservative vote, we can
restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America
back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I continued to fight back against Joe Biden's unconstitutional, unscientific vaccine mandate. I also called out Twitter for their hypocritical "community standards" when people disagree with socialist policies in Congress.
As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ABAxZO-l7Cc1PZjwqslzk0aePW2hzX4LbYVKi_hP1MlQr7d0Ay72KxVt8awGnl1fsIh4dPUZUOSvjhJBP3ycLC4C6kVQACg9rSUocnPk8i9DY7R6QNFYZceTySSL9WC-iLEbPdMrGL-yETmn_fyhaj8uF02PDFG6HVoBLRQOoQ=&c=1hjcSSGjqDCQzRhP69kBr7-TNpr_XUubtNntpYxpPY-vf0OKsg8juQ==&ch=MHHQ0gnIEvBYQQOsX7GzpiYbbfr3ib9ap5L8Z88Uj6N-IJnz3MeF8Q==), [Twitter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ABAxZO-l7Cc1PZjwqslzk0aePW2hzX4LbYVKi_hP1MlQr7d0Ay72IzdFBpLwkNopEN2qMylPKEODKVRbxCzZXcDoKIIGpp50dMV_vxS3_RgxRep6dfV67Sa_Ecz5YbZOtpaQ2i1_GuUlNVO2qu71scR-L8cH-ue&c=1hjcSSGjqDCQzRhP69kBr7-TNpr_XUubtNntpYxpPY-vf0OKsg8juQ==&ch=MHHQ0gnIEvBYQQOsX7GzpiYbbfr3ib9ap5L8Z88Uj6N-IJnz3MeF8Q==), and [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ABAxZO-l7Cc1PZjwqslzk0aePW2hzX4LbYVKi_hP1MlQr7d0Ay72IzdFBpLwkNoI8GvMGgkm7PJKLc5KvnkP-9wyv3FDUrYptJBjLYbstO18pj_Af81bpHBg-dTPfZarQ_5MDipK-AWP27F_h_Gr471WPGlMNlCkVMNs1W4HYA=&c=1hjcSSGjqDCQzRhP69kBr7-TNpr_XUubtNntpYxpPY-vf0OKsg8juQ==&ch=MHHQ0gnIEvBYQQOsX7GzpiYbbfr3ib9ap5L8Z88Uj6N-IJnz3MeF8Q==).

Thousands of employees are being fired and even more are scared to re-enter the workforce because they don't want to choose between a job or the vaccine. Businesses should not comply with Joe's unconstitutional order.

| | | [SIGN THE PETITION. FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S MANDATE.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ABAxZO-l7Cc1PZjwqslzk0aePW2hzX4LbYVKi_hP1MlQr7d0Ay72DLRL976pmZkEO0ddmR4SxLD0otTgxLA14jtED9_-VpdG9x7UJICn-YyFIv92bObUHPkL8-ItqvWGupU7zpe-o6FeZGpLabFBXVCuIb-NwQlXxc2hJYaOk8TQkKgB_hCATJPjwcgGj7gokIsVRKjCY1MAN_7-xZHzZv4BxZXA21as-oH-obumjo-pJWG70y3K_RIpnEYDBUM8YvcUvHzkCPTrZpR3U25s2v8x56RTIkSndRGqrEdX0oOtlnirYPGWf1OPHdpMhXDFAo8ntEnSEtenWD8CXgZtw6wua5VJ9Pz&c=1hjcSSGjqDCQzRhP69kBr7-TNpr_XUubtNntpYxpPY-vf0OKsg8juQ==&ch=MHHQ0gnIEvBYQQOsX7GzpiYbbfr3ib9ap5L8Z88Uj6N-IJnz3MeF8Q==)

| So I introduced a bill to stop this mandate in its tracks - it's called the Prevent Unconstitutional Vaccine Mandates for Interstate Commerce Act.
My bill will stop the federal government from requiring Americans to provide proof of COVID-19 vaccination to engage in interstate commerce or travel.
The last thing that Americans need right now is a mandate that prevents them from returning to work or keeping the job they have now. Americans should have the right to make the best decision for themselves when it comes to getting the COVID vaccine.
Not only that, but this mandate is likely HURTING trust in the vaccine. On every single level, it's the wrong move.
Biden's vaccine mandate is a cheap, unconstitutional overreach of governance and I'm going to fight back against it.
Will you join me?
---

clean_body: This email is going to be short | | | Hey team, This email is going to be short, because sometimes leadership is about calling things what they are. Our district, IL-07, is one of the most unequal districts in America. In just a 30 minute drive, you can go from Streeterville, where the life expectancy is 90 years, south to Englewood where it is 60 years. 30 years of life lost in just 30 minutes. We cannot go on letting politicians pretend that this is the way things have to be. The status quo is not working for our communities. We, the people of IL-07, are being forgotten by Congress, and I'm running to make sure none of us are forgotten any longer. **** If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Just because it’s the status quo doesn't mean we can’t change it—we just need leaders with the courage to do so. Onwards, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

As I monitor our fundraising efforts and talk to Democrats who are running for office, I’m seeing a worrying trend: Democrats are less engaged this year even as the Republican efforts to take back the majority gain momentum.
[_**Are you less engaged now than you were in 2020?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37272746/310587076/1319649650?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDFkNjQwNC02YTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9bfCr-wuuL-R3fA6npyvdtGF1eblhEXM1WgE_Tiaw8=&emci=3af56c76-5316-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d41d6404-6a28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=30464261)

A recent poll shows that Republicans are more enthusiastic about the 2022 midterms than Democrats—by double digits:
| | **Enthusiasm for Republicans in the 2022 midterm elections outpaces Democrats by double digits, with most GOP voters also remaining loyal to former President Donald Trump, a new poll reveals.**

_-MSN_
---
I get it. Your unprecedented enthusiasm and financial resources propelled Democrats to victory in 2018 and 2020, and now you want to disconnect and relax. **But if Democrats don’t get re-engaged fast, all of that work will go down the drain when Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy take back the majority.**

[_**Today, I’m asking you for advice. I want to hear your thoughts on how we can engage grassroots activists as we work to protect the fragile House majority.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37272752/310587089/1319649650?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDFkNjQwNC02YTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9bfCr-wuuL-R3fA6npyvdtGF1eblhEXM1WgE_Tiaw8=&emci=3af56c76-5316-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=d41d6404-6a28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=30464261)

subject: Ahead of Donald Trump's rally tomorrow, your response is missing! [11:59 p.m. deadline]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter, Donald Trump is staging a political comeback tour that runs through Iowa. He's ready to dismantle Democrats' majorities in Congress and protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley (R-IA) – **which is why Trump is holding a rally with Sen. Grassley in Iowa TOMORROW!**
Trump's dangerous, anti-democratic extremism is now the de facto brand of Republicanism, which is why Sen. Grassley recently DEFENDED the former president's attempts to overturn the 2020 election results. With so much at stake – from voting rights to reproductive freedoms – we cannot sit on the sidelines as Trump and Sen. Grassley rally their supporters and attempts to dismantle our Democratic Senate majority.
Last year, Democrats mobilized by the MILLIONS to kick Trump out and take back the Senate. Today, ahead of Trump touching down in Iowa to rally his extremist base, we need supporters like you to continue speaking out. **We've set a goal to reach 600 survey respondents before 11:59 p.m. so that we can show the GOP that Americans are done with Trump and his extremism – but your response is still missing. **
**Please, will you tell us: Do you approve of Donald Trump?**
| | **SURVEY: DO YOU APPROVE OF DONALD TRUMP?**

name: Max Steiner
subject: My time as a peacekeeper in the Middle East.
body:
When I saw members of the Republican Party -- including my opponent Doug LaMalfa -- undermining our free and fair election last year, I knew I had to do something about it. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37273506/310589691/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UzMmM1Yy02YjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmAb4TbQBgHh4duzB8MZa4-EH6VVGt5ltCBTccn-AQQ=)
I’ll be direct, friend.

In this email, I'm going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37273507/310589692/-209993060?refcode=em-10821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UzMmM1Yy02YjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmAb4TbQBgHh4duzB8MZa4-EH6VVGt5ltCBTccn-AQQ=)** toward my grassroots campaign. But first, let me tell you a bit about my background in diplomacy, and why it relates to my campaign for Congress against Doug LaMalfa.

I served as a peacekeeper in the Sinai Peninsula for 15 months, implementing the Egyptian-Israeli peace treaty, patrolling the border, and working with security personnel. The treaty demilitarized the Sinai in the 1970's, and still acts as a buffer between the two countries. It's one of the rare examples of US diplomatic leadership working.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37273508/310589693/-209993060?refcode=em-10821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UzMmM1Yy02YjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmAb4TbQBgHh4duzB8MZa4-EH6VVGt5ltCBTccn-AQQ=)
_Peacekeeping on the Israeli border._
Peacekeeping may sound benign, but it's actually fairly dangerous -- peacekeepers have been targeted by insurgents, and some even lost their lives as recently as 2020 after an equipment failure. 272 US and partner personnel have died there since 1982.

**If elected, I would be one of the only members with "boots on the ground" experience in the Sinai, but this is about far more than that.**

When I saw members of the Republican Party -- including my opponent Doug LaMalfa -- undermining our free and fair election last year, I knew I had to do something about it. Going from trying to preserve a fragile peace in the Sinai to seeing blatant disregard for our democracy from within our own country was something I couldn't ignore. That’s why I’m running, and it’s why I'm asking you to step up and join me:

**[I'm running for Congress to bring my experience in the Army and as a former Foreign Service Officer to bear on US policy. But more importantly, I'm making it my mission to stop any far-right seditionist from returning to Congress next year, starting with Doug LaMalfa in CA-01. Will you chip in $3 to support our grassroots effort?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37273509/310589694/-209993060?refcode=em-10821-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UzMmM1Yy02YjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmAb4TbQBgHh4duzB8MZa4-EH6VVGt5ltCBTccn-AQQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37273510/310589695/-209993060?refcode=em-10821-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2UzMmM1Yy02YjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmAb4TbQBgHh4duzB8MZa4-EH6VVGt5ltCBTccn-AQQ=)

name: Tom Nelson
subject: Taxing the rich and lowering prescription drug prices should not be controversial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | Team,

America is supposed to be a country where our representatives act in the interest of voters, but corporate Democrats like Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin are proving that, too often, that’s not the case.

Taxing the rich and lowering prescription drug prices are wildly popular issues across the political spectrum, but since corporations and big donors don’t like it, corporate Democrats are blocking these provisions in President Biden’s agenda.

**While they pose as “moderates” the truth of the matter is that their positions are extreme and out of touch with the American people.

By electing me, you can ensure that Wisconsin will have a representative who will stand up to special interests instead of slavishly doing their bidding at all of our expense. But unlike those corporate Dems, I’m not funded by corporate PACs.**

[Help me stand up to big money in politics by chipping in here to support my grassroots campaign. name: Connor Boyack
subject: BREAKING: Biden declares war on concerned parents
body:
Here’s a solution to fight back.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z06loj0odg77f8nn5f6ve7qqbvpocr8km93nkmog_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfed5he6qm8p72euoncspnm9rbctdjehgm5ddlchhrdd3j6ur71c3im1im9c5nmurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eapmccbgmdg60shhcopb1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpj6eoj0cli69oh5u)
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zljf88jlib59h2iq1nrc72uhcf1odubtsp8o5cqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cth60pb4cjh2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

This is bad news.

Biden's FBI is going to start investigating concerned parents protesting at local school board meetings.

Why are parents angry?
* Schools are teaching**radical leftist indoctrination to kids **as young as kindergarten.
* **Antifa****** has even infiltrated schools as teachers.
* _Even more horrifying, sexually explicit books have been found in grade school libraries!_

Parents have every right to be angry at what's happening to education. _While no parent should ever become violent_ , protest is a fundamental right of every person, parents included.

Here's a solution to fight back.

**I am the author of the popular Tuttle Twins series of books. The Tuttle Twins teaches kids about liberty, limited government, free markets, and personal responsibility. **

My goal is to distribute another 1 MILLION books to families, libraries, and schools.

[**Can you donate $10, $20, $50, or more and help me distribute Tuttle Twins to fight back against the indoctrination? Click here to donate >>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z15sg0ptreulqu8p23g6acs0n0i2q39tn2l2meo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cth60pb4cjh2bs)

[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5n07pu5jcsqn66rjn5ndu4036uob2sjuu67gfjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cth60pb4cjh2bs)

I founded the Tuttle Twins when I realized how bad the direction of education was headed. That was 10 years ago. It's only gotten worse.

This is an ambitious goal. But offering alternatives is a necessary step to taking back our education. We cannot rely on banning CRT or radical Antifa teachers. We have to offer positive alternatives that present the ideas of liberty to kids.

And the best part? Kids LOVE reading the Tuttle Twins. They enjoy it. It's fun and educational.

[**One more important point ... All online donations are being matched by one of our biggest supporters, John P. You can double your impact! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.***](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2tn6s8kisi56qthnj2av5pt45p1eq3spp9mr18o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cth60pb4cjh2bs)

**Every $10 raised distributes a single book. **

[**Donate $10 to Distribute 1 Book >>
Donate $20 to Distribute 2 Books >>
Donate $50 to Distribute 5 Books >>
Donate $100 to Distribute 10 Books >>
Donate $250 to Distribute 25Books >>
Donate $500 to Distribute 50 Books >>
Donate $1,000 to Distribute 100 Books >>
Donate Any Amount >>**](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgpqidkkl8nc2va35j6grt2golmf0hglft3u2vs0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cth60pb4cjh2bs)

You can be the reason a kid grows up to defend our liberty, Friend.

This is an urgent call to action to help me fight back against the war on parents being waged by the Biden administration.

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
President, Libertas Institute
Author, Tuttle Twins

We’ve been on the road for 30 days now, and **we’ve made it to 35 counties** so far, connecting Dr. Martin with supporters like you to learn what matters most to Tennesseans. Dr. Martin isn’t running to be a voice for corporations, or a small group of wealthy donors. He’s running for _all_ of us. That’s why this tour is such an important part of our campaign, because if we’re going to bring Tennessee the leadership it deserves, we’ve got to first listen to its people. We’ve been working around the clock all across the state since this tour began, but Dr. Martin has said time and again that meeting with Tennesseans and listening to their concerns hardly feels like work — it’s just a natural part of becoming a leader, and one that Dr. Martin welcomes.
Gov. Bill Lee, on the other hand, has completely forgotten what leadership means. He and other elected leaders have ignored Tennesseans everywhere, and pushed aside their needs. Families like yours and mine have been abandoned in favor of lies, culture wars, and conspiracy theories.
We’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives, no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you’re raised. We’re bringing power back to the people, and that’s what this 95 County Tour is all about.

subject: Trump’s schemes BACKFIRE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
critical update on the state of 2024
| | | We need your immediate attention.

**FIRST: **

Republicans narrowed our Democratic House Majority to a razor-thin margin -- _they only need to flip**FIVE** seats to retake power. _

**THEN:**

Trump jumped into action and promised to return to the White House if his right-wing cronies **DESTROY** Speaker Pelosi's House Majority.

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

**NOW:**

body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37274675/310593167/-783841476?refcode=email_fr_20211008KMad_EEE_180DO_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZTFjNzkxLTZmMjgtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TKJJuBXQoqYTzAoBtEZr8P97BR-Spv9-LonsFcKm4t8=)

Educators and allies, Kim Melnyk started out as a public school teacher, and when she saw that parents and teachers were being ignored and her kids were getting shortchanged, she decided to run for the School Board. After defeating a right-wing incumbent by just 1.6%, Kim got to work, raising teacher pay and implementing full day kindergarten. She listened to parents, worked with educators, and looked out for students. That's the sort of story that inspires us, and that we all need to hear more often. Watch her ad here: **** | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37274676/310593168/-783841476?refcode=email_fr_20211008KMad_EEE_180DO_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1NzI0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ZTFjNzkxLTZmMjgtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TKJJuBXQoqYTzAoBtEZr8P97BR-Spv9-LonsFcKm4t8=)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Bad news...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our Republican opponent wrote themselves a $3 MILLION check to boost their campaign.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211008-2929-header&t=1&akid=2929%2E434096%2ElM_O1M)
Peter, this is not really how I wanted to end the week.
**The Philadelphia Inquirer just reported that our Republican opponent wrote themselves a $3 MILLION check to boost their campaign.** They’re spending the first million right out of the gate on a big TV ad campaign statewide.
Just to put that in context, our entire campaign raised $2.7 million over the last three months. More than anyone else in PA has raised in any quarter so far! We’ve had more than 150,000 people chip in. But one self-funder candidate was just able to write themselves a check and instantly top our total.
I wish it weren’t this way, Peter. But in the last midterms, 8-in-10 Senate races were won by the candidate who spent the most. So we have to compete dollar for dollar. The good news is that there’s more of us, and strength in numbers.
[**Help us respond to this $3 million check — make a $5 donation now to turn PA blue. Every donation matters, whether big or small. We’re in it together.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32614?refcode=em20211008-2929&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2929%2E434096%2ElM_O1M)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32614?refcode=em20211008-2929&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2929%2E434096%2ElM_O1M)**
CNN says Pennsylvania is the number one toss-up race on the Senate map. Plus the latest poll shows we’re the ONLY Democrat who beats all the Republicans.
The bad news is that our Republican opponents are going to be extremely well funded. The good news is that we have 150,000+ grassroots supporters — and if everyone gives a little bit we can compete with any self-funders on the other side.
[**Add a $5 donation today to help us respond to this $3 million Republican cash surge today.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32614?refcode=em20211008-2929&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2929%2E434096%2ElM_O1M)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32614?refcode=em20211008-2929&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=41&akid=2929%2E434096%2ElM_O1M)**
I’m so grateful to be in this campaign with all of you. Together we can match anything they throw our way.
John

John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211008-2929-footer&t=42&refcode2=2929_434096_lM_O1M&akid=2929%2E434096%2ElM_O1M)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=43&akid=2929%2E434096%2ElM_O1M)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=44&akid=2929%2E434096%2ElM_O1M)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| | Hi Derek,

In these chaotic times, if you’re not paying attention to politics all the time, it’s hard to know what’s true.

I’ve been paying attention for a long time, and my friends in Virginia asked me to reach out to you today.

Terry McAuliffe’s opponent brags about his five-time endorsement by Trump — as if that were a good thing. This guy is spending millions of dollars of his own money to trash Terry, who is a popular, successful former governor.

**Terry McAuliffe has the knowledge, experience, and a proven record of fighting for quality education for everyone, expanding access to health care, and achieving economic success for Virginians.**

In Terry’s words, backed up by his prior action: “We've got to think big and be bold to create a better future for all Virginians. I'm ready to deliver that kind of leadership.”

The Trump-wanna-be is wrong for Virginians on every level. His name might as well be Glenn Trumpkin.

He’s promised to ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood. And he spreads dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric and has actually _encouraged_ Virginians not to get vaccinated.

That is not leadership.

**Terry McAuliffe is an experienced leader who’ll fight for the expansion of economic opportunities for all Virginians.**

Terry will fight for women’s access to reproductive health care. And he’ll fight for educators and students, health care workers, and all the folks who keep Virginia going.

**The choice is clear.**

Do you want someone who thrives on negativity and wants to suppress women’s reproductive rights?

Or do you want someone with a proven record of lifting Virginians?

**There’s a lot more work to be done, and Terry McAuliffe has the will and the skill to get it done.**

clean_body: | | | = | | Hi Derek, In these chaotic times, if you’re not paying attention to politics all the time, it’s hard to know what’s true. I’ve been paying attention for a long time, and my friends in Virginia asked me to reach out to you today. Terry McAuliffe’s opponent brags about his five-time endorsement by Trump — as if that were a good thing. This guy is spending millions of dollars of his own money to trash Terry, who is a popular, successful former governor. Terry McAuliffe has the knowledge, experience, and a proven record of fighting for quality education for everyone, expanding access to health care, and achieving economic success for Virginians. In Terry’s words, backed up by his prior action: “We've got to think big and be bold to create a better future for all Virginians. I'm ready to deliver that kind of leadership.” = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The Trump-wanna-be is wrong for Virginians on every level. His name might as well be Glenn Trumpkin. He’s promised to ban abortion and defund Planned Parenthood. And he spreads dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric and has actually encouraged Virginians not to get vaccinated. That is not leadership. Terry McAuliffe is an experienced leader who’ll fight for the expansion of economic opportunities for all Virginians. Terry will fight for women’s access to reproductive health care. And he’ll fight for educators and students, health care workers, and all the folks who keep Virginia going. The choice is clear. Do you want someone who thrives on negativity and wants to suppress women’s reproductive rights? Or do you want someone with a proven record of lifting Virginians? There’s a lot more work to be done, and Terry McAuliffe has the will and the skill to get it done. Derek, if you’re a person of any age, race, or gender who wants someone with a proven record of leading and inspiring Virginians with positive action to make a better world for everyone, I’m asking you to join me in helping Terry McAuliffe win this race. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I hope you and your family are well. Whatever you do, don’t give up. We’ll get through this. Wishing you all the best, -Carole = =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Paul Schimpf
subject: Schimpf from the Trail 10/8/21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P
body:
| [](http://www.schimpf4illinois.com/?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_7_21&n=1)
---
Friend, Last week, President Biden was supposed to come to Illinois but it was rescheduled for yesterday. We knew our governor wouldn't miss the opportunity to be seen next to this president. Between the two of them, one is trying to build up support for vaccine mandates and a social spending plan and infrastructure package that would cost $4.5 trillion, and the other thinks supporting special interest groups, increasing spending and taxes, and letting criminals off the hook making our communities less safe is what good leadership looks like. Together, those two are failing at leadership and Illinoisans deserve better. **Over the last week from Iroquois County to Williamson County to DuPage County, I shared with people what real leadership would look like—protecting the rights of parents and their children, finding real solutions to our crime problems in Chicago, and putting the interests of the people of Illinois first not special interests.** Being on the campaign trail and visiting every corner of this state is a grind, but leaders don't sit on the sideline. I'm stepping up for you so we can renew Illinois! S/F, Paul Schimpf
* * *
**Volunteer of the Week** This week's volunteer to single out is Jeremy Jones. A fellow Jarhead, Jeremy is our director for Montgomery County. He also is handling getting our signage out in areas between Springfield and the Metro East. Thank you, Jeremy, for your friendship and support!
* * *
**In the News** I joined "Part of the Answer with Dan Ehrman" on WIND AM 560 to talk about our campaign and my experience as a veteran, prosecutor, and state senator. [Listen to my conversation with Dan here.](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=dabz21sZeA93ZDGdYSsoJv1cumRLjORtAyXvom-hYxm4USEN7J49-D1G9X6x3CIbzzOjCJOXRw_qxAzlEaXD7Q&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_7_21&n=2)
* * *
**Social Media Spotlight** Illinoisans had a lot to say on how Governor Pritzker is complicit in Cook County State's Attorney Kim Foxx's lack of authority to keep residents safe. You can trust I will stand with our law enforcement and work to keep our kids, neighborhoods, and communities safe. [Comment, share, or like our post here!](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6tVgirLU9XjeyDlXT2NtRv9aKztbX_-_I_c_F8kqjFqAWySNaMOhvZvewbMs3orqCzbtmzOZYlov-LWiZyFr6R4&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_7_21&n=3)
* * *
**Get Involved** Want to make a direct impact on our campaign? **[Pitch in $5, $25, $50, or $100 NOW](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/donate?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_7_21&n=4)** so we can share our above Facebook post on Pritzker's lack of leadership with more people across Illinois! Have a hand in helping our digital advertising efforts today! ___
Paid for by Citizens for Schimpf · P.O. Box 16, Waterloo, IL, 62298\. A copy of our report, filed with the State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL, will be available for download or purchase from them. We do not pay for email addresses. We have your email address either because you signed up for our list at an event, you entered your email address online, or you gave your email address to Paul.
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/unsubscribe?e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_7_21&n=5).
You can also keep up with Paul Schimpf on [Twitter](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEGmWwYfQ_yWb41Zx1QyVyU&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_7_21&n=6) or [Facebook](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6g5cWifaQHs4q1ylFw89qVcMpLCIQGbbcgOLvTMfF-ic&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_7_21&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.schimpf4illinois.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=1469e37fec1f8638fc00965d010776f6&utm_source=schimpf4illinois&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=schimpf_from_the_trail_10_7_21&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **\- October 8****, 2021-** **\- American Rescue Plan Continues to Deliver for Indiana -** President Joe Biden's American Rescue Plan is still delivering for Hoosier families across Indiana. This time, the Rescue Plan is set to deliver $540 million to help alleviate the state's childcare crisis. Hoosiers and childcare providers have been dealing with a childcare crisis for far too long, and Democrats are delivering. This investment includes pay raises and bonuses for workers, facility updates, and funding providers to keep the doors open. Democrats are getting this done for families and children. **About 55% of Hoosier families currently live in a childcare desert. **President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats want to continue to deliver for Hoosiers - no matter the Zip code - and it's why we look forward to passing the American Jobs Plan and the plan to eliminate childcare deserts across the state. **It's worth remembering that every single Indiana Republican said "NO" to the American Rescue Plan and voted against this much-needed relief during COVID-19. **It seems as though the INGOP will stick to their extreme partisanship no matter the harm it does to Indiana. **\- Indiana Republicans Choosing Partisanship Over People -** Indiana Republicans are never short on providing proof they value their own self-interests over creating a better future for Hoosier families. U.S. Senators Mike Braun and Todd Young are the latest Republicans to discard their Hoosier values in favor of their Party's extreme partisanship. Todd Young supported the $2 trillion Trump tax cut for big corporations and America's richest in 2017, but he's now opposed to paying the tab and raising the debt ceiling.
> .[@SenToddYoung](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37276345/310600939/1517159736?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw&FFF.10.08.21.=FFF.10.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWM0N2YzMy03MzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SvOwPCQL5jpkx_zcNn1Nj1smVD3nUyrjQccdzGyCA0=&emci=c32a0522-6f27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=91c47f33-7328-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4925535) was happy to vote for Donald Trump’s $2 trillion tax cut for big corporations and America’s richest, but he won’t pay the bill. Like the [@indgop](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37276346/310600940/-897725887?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw&FFF.10.08.21.=FFF.10.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWM0N2YzMy03MzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SvOwPCQL5jpkx_zcNn1Nj1smVD3nUyrjQccdzGyCA0=&emci=c32a0522-6f27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=91c47f33-7328-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4925535), Young’s partisanship has become extreme and it’ll harm the future of Hoosier families. [https://t.co/2zA14SLx8l](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37276347/310600941/-1243503801?FFF.10.08.21.=FFF.10.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWM0N2YzMy03MzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SvOwPCQL5jpkx_zcNn1Nj1smVD3nUyrjQccdzGyCA0=&emci=c32a0522-6f27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=91c47f33-7328-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4925535) — Indiana Democrats (@INDems) [October 5, 2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37276348/310600942/-419459608?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw&FFF.10.08.21.=FFF.10.08.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWM0N2YzMy03MzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0SvOwPCQL5jpkx_zcNn1Nj1smVD3nUyrjQccdzGyCA0=&emci=c32a0522-6f27-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=91c47f33-7328-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=4925535)
The Republicans' partisanship on this issue is so extreme that even Senator Braun admitted that his INGOP does not practice what it preaches when it comes to fiscal spending. During the Trump administration, Republicans added $7.8 trillion to the national debt in just four years. Despite this fact, Mike Braun still refuses to pay for the Republicans' reckless overspending. Why? Republicans like Young and Braun value political games and partisanship over being responsible about the nation's commitments. Indiana Democrats are tired of the INGOP's political stunts and are ready to deliver for Hoosier families. This is accomplished by passing President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda, including the American Rescue Plan that is still providing relief for Hoosier families (see childcare above). Indiana Republicans' partisanship is hypocritical and is diminishing Indiana's future. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- October 8, 2021- \- American Rescue Plan Continues to Deliver for Indiana - President Joe Biden's American Rescue Plan is still delivering for Hoosier families across Indiana. This time, the Rescue Plan is set to deliver $540 million to help alleviate the state's childcare crisis. Hoosiers and childcare providers have been dealing with a childcare crisis for far too long, and Democrats are delivering. This investment includes pay raises and bonuses for workers, facility updates, and funding providers to keep the doors open. Democrats are getting this done for families and children. About 55% of Hoosier families currently live in a childcare desert. President Joe Biden and Indiana Democrats want to continue to deliver for Hoosiers - no matter the Zip code - and it's why we look forward to passing the American Jobs Plan and the plan to eliminate childcare deserts across the state. It's worth remembering that every single Indiana Republican said "NO" to the American Rescue Plan and voted against this much-needed relief during COVID-19. It seems as though the INGOP will stick to their extreme partisanship no matter the harm it does to Indiana. \- Indiana Republicans Choosing Partisanship Over People - Indiana Republicans are never short on providing proof they value their own self-interests over creating a better future for Hoosier families. U.S. Senators Mike Braun and Todd Young are the latest Republicans to discard their Hoosier values in favor of their Party's extreme partisanship. Todd Young supported the $2 trillion Trump tax cut for big corporations and America's richest in 2017, but he's now opposed to paying the tab and raising the debt ceiling. . was happy to vote for Donald Trump’s $2 trillion tax cut for big corporations and America’s richest, but he won’t pay the bill. Like the , Young’s partisanship has become extreme and it’ll harm the future of Hoosier families. — Indiana Democrats (@INDems) The Republicans' partisanship on this issue is so extreme that even Senator Braun admitted that his INGOP does not practice what it preaches when it comes to fiscal spending. During the Trump administration, Republicans added $7.8 trillion to the national debt in just four years. Despite this fact, Mike Braun still refuses to pay for the Republicans' reckless overspending. Why? Republicans like Young and Braun value political games and partisanship over being responsible about the nation's commitments. Indiana Democrats are tired of the INGOP's political stunts and are ready to deliver for Hoosier families. This is accomplished by passing President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda, including the American Rescue Plan that is still providing relief for Hoosier families (see childcare above). Indiana Republicans' partisanship is hypocritical and is diminishing Indiana's future. The time is now to deliver for Hoosier families and to bring forward solutions to today's most-pressing problems - and Democrats are ready to answer this call. \- Opportunities - \- Hispanic Heritage Month - Power of the Black and Brown Vote ** State of the Latino Community INDems Celebrate Hispanic Heritage Month \- Election Law Update - Join Indiana Democratic Party for a legislative update on election law 2021 session. Please let us know if you need special accommodations by Thursday 10/07/21. body:
Redistricting is officially done as Governor Eric Holcomb signed the new legislative maps bill into law earlier this week. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470882?e=1acd9bb3d6)

| _**New Maps**_ Redistricting is officially done as Governor Eric Holcomb signed the new legislative maps bill into law earlier this week. As we’ve discussed over the last few weeks, Indiana legislative leaders ran a textbook redistricting process that focused on population, not political outcomes. The new districts will take affect for the 2022 elections, so there is no change in your representation at the state or federal levels at this point.

With redistricting behind us, we can start to look at the 2022 landscape. Your Indiana Republican Party has been working nonstop, laying the foundation for a successful 2022 cycle. We have to reelect our Hoosier Marine Senator Todd Young and send our conservative Republican Congressional delegation back to Washington. Republicans are well positioned to win back control of the House and Senate and stop the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer socialist agenda. I know Indiana Republicans will work hard through Election Day to make this happen!

Thanks
Kyle

_**Photo:** Gov. Holcomb signs HB 1581 completing the redistricting process._

**Governor Holcomb** ceremonially signed legislation that creates an Electric Vehicles Production Commission as part of the celebration of Stellantis's investment and growth in Indiana. **Governor Holcomb's** forward thinking will help pave the way or further Hoosier innovation.

The Republicans are outspending us 2-1 on TV in the Attorney General’s race, and a new poll shows us in a dead heat with 10% of voters remaining undecided. Everything is at stake, and that’s why I’m coming to you with 25 days to go until the election and asking for your help.
[**Can you please rush in a donation of $25 so we can put it all on the line in these last 25 days to protect our Attorney General’s office from a Trump Republican?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37277338/310604566/1453093246?refcode=E11753-20211008-25Days-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjA2ZTQ5MS03NjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=REw68_qccCl86FZEuX8JnS2zbHMP9-W8F7DPvgE6_6k=)

\-- Mark Herring

| The momentum in this campaign is on our side. Washingtonians are fed up with the failed leadership of Patty Murray. 30 years of broken promises is far too long.
The thousands of hard working people I have met all across Washington State are eager for fresh faces and new ideas. I will always put my constituents, not DC insiders, first.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: It's time to Build Back Better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Add your name to show your support for infrastructure, universal pre-K, expanding the child tax credit, paid family leave, investments to fight climate change, and lowering prescription drug prices.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37278450/310607035/1796049497?refcode=EM_PET_211008BBB_N_CD_4_NG_N_Logo&fn=Derek&ln=Willis&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzllNDFmZC03OTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E6kvY1rT7sVllpdWe7K6rRzlel1k-WrTsTq945iZJO0=)
---
Derek,

If I were serving in Congress right now, I'd be working to deliver President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda for the American people. Corporate special interests spent much of September trying to get Democrats to abandon this agenda, but Democrats re-affirmed that they are fighting for the policies people here in Western Pennsylvania need and support, including:
* Rebuilding our infrastructure
* Universal pre-K
* Expanding the child tax credit
* Paid family leave
* Investments to fight climate change
* Expanding Medicare and lowering prescription drug prices

Now, we need to elect Representatives who are serving hard-working Americans, not powerful corporations and special interests. We're closer than ever to making our promises a reality, but we can't let up — Republicans and their special interest allies are doing everything they can to slow the process and water down the bill.
