name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Breaking - Statistical Breakdown of Maricopa Fraud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Here's what you need to know |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=75fa0d6af2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

We are on the verge of cracking the case in Arizona. The Maricopa County Audit demonstrated beyond a shadow of a doubt that there was fraud in Arizona.

And I am writing you today with _statistical_ evidence that that is the case.

**My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud Trump-endorsed Republican running for Secretary of State in Arizona and leading the vanguard of the biggest grassroots movement of the millennium – Election integrity.**

_And my background is in investigation and process. I am a former criminal investigator, first responder, and business owner with a Six-Sigma Certification._
Let me tell you why this is important. This is the key to understanding what happened in Maricopa.

_Investopedia_ defines the Six Sigma Certification as follows:

_The name Six Sigma has its origins in a statistical method of modeling a manufacturing process that is as free as possible of errors or defects. In statistics, six sigma indicates a likelihood of 3.4 defects per million things produced. This is the ultimate level to strive for, ensuring error-free delivery of a product 99.99966% of the time._

_Six Sigma training, therefore, focuses on the development of management processes that reliably lead to virtually defect-free results in manufacturing or in any business activity. It uses a number of statistical and data analysis tools to reach its objective._

“As free as possible of errors or defects.”

**Does that seem like our election in 2020 to you? Of course not. Now let me break down exactly how this type of Six-Sigma analysis plays out in Maricopa.**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2ca3f9e565&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Think to yourself: _What does it take to reach 99.99966% error-free elections?_
To see where we are going, we must first ask where we have been. So let me highlight some key examples out of Maricopa which _in and of themselves_ are sufficient to identify significant sources of fraud.

**There was a .049047% margin in the election in Maricopa. This means that if the some of all potential sources of error which could attribute to a margin equal to or greater than .049047% means that the whole election is in jeopardy.**

**_If, however, there are any SINGLE sources of potential error that surpass the same margin, than this provides crystal clear evidence that the fraud goes far deeper than any of us had thought previously._**

Ok, so let’s break this down:
* 13.61% of ballots had corrupted images.
* 12.22% of Ballots didn’t receive any entry records
* 2.76% of ballots lacked legal provenance
* 1.65% ballots were illegally photocopied.
* 8.13% of voters votes were missing
* 1.43% of in person votes were recorded as mail in
* 14.36% of votes were potentially suppressed
* 1.64% were qualified as mixed bad votes
* 50.96% of election files were deleted.

Folks, with these kinds of numbers we can forget about the election being a “Six Sigma” election in terms of confidence in the election.

**This is why we must secure the ballot and eliminate potential sources of fraud. **

**_This is why I am pushing to establish additional ballot security practices, eliminate mail-in voting, and track down with intent to convict any perpetrators of _criminal_ wrongdoing in the election._**

We must audit the second largest county in Arizona and we are building a huge movement to make this happen. I have a petition with over 33,000 signatures (and growing!) to audit this critical county.

**We must also secure our state. We need someone who understands process engineering, who understands the statistical significance of the Democrats fraud, and who is capable of applying a Six Sigma approach to elections to guarantee the future of elections in Arizona, and elections in America.**

[And to do this I need your support. Our grassroots movement is growing, but we need all the help we can get.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=876d04d132&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Please chip in with a donation of $25, $50, $100, or more today! Every dollar you donate will help bring us closer to protecting and locking down our elections in Arizona and around the Country._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fa98e6e013&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a9daae6011&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6b2048138e&e=44b8c466b0)

| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=93554efb6d&e=44b8c466b0).

Friend,

It's simple.

We need Oil and Gas jobs to remain in America.

Right now, natural gas prices are higher than they've been in a decade, directly reflecting the disastrous energy policies of the Biden Administration and their focus on America Last.

What does this mean?

By relying on foreign adversaries to provide fuel for our country, millions of American families are forced to pay more to heat their homes, fuel their cars, and power their businesses. body:
The FBI thinks so. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/fbi-parents-schools-2472882?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=29d1f76d3e&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

I have more perilous news about the Swamp's dangerous and out-of-control hatred for conservatives.

Now, the FBI will investigate "threats" towards school officials:

[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=8ea43d6f3b&e=645b3b1338)

The DOJ and the FBI are upset that conservative parents have been speaking their minds at school board meetings.

They have been protesting vile, anti-White Critical Race Theory, and mask mandates for children.

_And make no mistake: the plan is label those conservative protestors as "domestic terrorists."_

Just like they did after the mostly-peaceful January 6 protests, the feds are trying to criminalize dissent against the authoritarian Biden Regime, and I'm one of the only members of Congress who is fighting back.

[**So join me in the fight today with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9e1986fb3d&e=645b3b1338).

Do you think the FBI can be trusted after their constant persecution of conservatives?

_The same FBI that planted at least one informant/agitator, and likely many more, in the crowd on January 6_.

Their agitator even entered the Capitol Building, which Democrats say was an act of "terrorism."

Not only did they set up Trump supporters that day, but they've been after us for years.

We've known it since they illegally spied on President Trump's campaign.

_The FBI has gone totally rogue, and cannot be trusted to honestly "investigate" the "threat" of conservative parents in schools_.

[**Help me ensure accountability from the FBI and DOJ by chipping into my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=0badcc9b09&e=645b3b1338).

[**With a generous campaign donation today, you too can be an accountability partner to the rogue FBI**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=5b478ec277&e=645b3b1338).

The Biden Administration is becoming more sinister by the day.

Its goal is to label ordinary conservatives like you and me "domestic terrorists."

_And they're using the partisan FBI to do it, because it's the only way they can stop the America First movement from gaining ground_.

[**That's why I'm in urgent need your support today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=dc3a8afe4b&e=645b3b1338).

[**A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or more to my reelection campaign will help me retain my seat in Congress so I can check the power of the Deep State and the FBI**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=f5ceb7dc5f&e=645b3b1338).

Thank you in advance for helping me in this crucial mission.
---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=06ce281d97&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The FBI will now investigate conservative parents who have attended school board meetings.

They want to label parents who oppose mask mandates and CRT as "domestic terrorists."

[**_Chip into my reelection campaign today and help me fight back before it's too late_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=346af2f8ba&e=645b3b1338).

body:
This is bad news. Biden’s FBI is going to start investigating concerned parents protesting at local school board meetings.
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zekq595fr1lcg366vs37lop1lb16lbhlp5gu6kr0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cth66o74c9h2bs "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

This is bad news.

Biden's FBI is going to start investigating concerned parents protesting at local school board meetings.

Why are parents angry?
* Schools are teaching**radical leftist indoctrination to kids **as young as kindergarten.
* **Antifa****** has even infiltrated schools as teachers.
* _Even more horrifying, sexually explicit books have been found in grade school libraries!_

Parents have every right to be angry at what's happening to education. _While no parent should ever become violent_ , protest is a fundamental right of every person, parents included.

Here's a solution to fight back.

**I am the author of the popular Tuttle Twins series of books. The Tuttle Twins teaches kids about liberty, limited government, free markets, and personal responsibility. **

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37279628/310610456/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211008zinke_tb_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjMxMDlkYS03YjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EO1AUmEBWR-Fwa_DDuptfoft3MBZEH6xodQvkCYW4g=)

Friend, Our Republican opponent and Trump’s former Interior Secretary likes to brag about his Montana roots and living the #MontanaLife, but where he actually lives has always been in question. We now know just how much of his time is spent outside Montana. Take a look at today’s _Politico Magazine_ cover story: “Ryan Zinke is Running for Office Again in Montana. On Instagram, He’s Often in Santa Barbara.” The story goes on to detail how Montana residents hardly see Zinke in their communities, and that “It’s long been known that Zinke splits his time between Whitefish and Santa Barbara, California, where his wife owns property and a yacht.” Zinke may try to brand himself as a man of Montana, but when he doesn’t even live here half the time and most of his campaign contributions are coming from out-of-state donors, you have to ask, _who is he really trying to represent in Congress?_ **Laurie on the other hand has been living and serving her small town in Montana for decades, and 80 percent of our first quarter donors were from right here in the Treasure State.** Montanans deserve a full-time Montanan, someone who shares their experiences and struggles, representing them — not a guy who spends half his time living a life of luxury in an entirely different state. **[If you agree, rush $10 or whatever you can to help elect Laurie, a full-time representative and state legislator, to serve the people of Montana in Congress>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37279629/310610461/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211008zinke_tb_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjMxMDlkYS03YjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5EO1AUmEBWR-Fwa_DDuptfoft3MBZEH6xodQvkCYW4g=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| | **BREAKING: North Carolina Lieutenant Governor Mark Robinson just referred to the LGBTQ community as “filth.”** Mark Robinson, one of Madison Cawthorn’s close political allies, was just caught on film making truly reprehensible comments, referring to the LGBTQ community as “filth.” **We cannot tolerate this type of bigotry from any elected official, and as WNC’s representative, Cawthorn should denounce his ally Robinson’s comments _immediately._** [**Chip in $10 to my campaign right now to not only defeat Cawthorn, but to bring real leadership to NC-11 and move forward on the values of love, hope, and empathy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37280074/310611884/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211008_FR_RobinsonComment_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODgxZTVjOC03YzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KK8IrfidkTnbtZ0qFNmwprm62LS3ebSpTLoxKdLt7PY=) | | | [Chip in ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37280075/310611885/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211008_FR_RobinsonComment_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODgxZTVjOC03YzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KK8IrfidkTnbtZ0qFNmwprm62LS3ebSpTLoxKdLt7PY=)

As a gay woman and a minister -- who works every day to promote LGBTQ equality across the South -- this could not hit closer to home for me. LGBTQ people are equal, are beautiful, and deserve to be fully protected under the law. That’s the message that our community -- especially LGBTQ youth -- need to hear from elected officials.
**Defeating this type of extremism and bigotry is a big part of why I’m running for Congress.**
I’m running to deliver the kind of leadership that WNC needs and deserves. That means a politics where everyone is welcome, where we talk about love and hope, and where we move forward together.
It also means being a representative to all of your constituents and letting voters know exactly what you stand for. NC-11 voters deserve to know whether Cawthorn denounces or agrees with Robinson’s hateful remarks.
[**If you’re with us, will you donate $10 or more to help us fight back against hatred and discrimination, and instead spread the message of love, hope, and empathy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37280076/310611886/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211008_FR_RobinsonComment_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODgxZTVjOC03YzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KK8IrfidkTnbtZ0qFNmwprm62LS3ebSpTLoxKdLt7PY=)

clean_body: | = | | BREAKING: North Carolina Lieutenant Governor Mark Robinson just referred to the LGBTQ community as “filth.” Mark Robinson, one of Madison Cawthorn’s close political allies, was just caught on film making truly reprehensible comments, referring to the LGBTQ community as “filth.” We cannot tolerate this type of bigotry from any elected official, and as WNC’s representative, Cawthorn should denounce his ally Robinson’s comments immediately. = | | | = As a gay woman and a minister -- who works every day to promote LGBTQ equality across the South -- this could not hit closer to home for me. LGBTQ people are equal, are beautiful, and deserve to be fully protected under the law. That’s the message that our community -- especially LGBTQ youth -- need to hear from elected officials. Defeating this type of extremism and bigotry is a big part of why I’m running for Congress. I’m running to deliver the kind of leadership that WNC needs and deserves. That means a politics where everyone is welcome, where we talk about love and hope, and where we move forward together. It also means being a representative to all of your constituents and letting voters know exactly what you stand for. NC-11 voters deserve to know whether Cawthorn denounces or agrees with Robinson’s hateful remarks. = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Together, we will remove extremism from our community and forge a new path forward. \-- Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: AndyBeshear.com
subject: Kentucky's COVID-19 recovery
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Peter, The past two years have been challenging for folks here in Kentucky and across our country. But despite all of the challenges we've faced, Andy's priority has been putting Kentucky first. Peter,

The past two years have been challenging for folks here in Kentucky and across our country. But despite all of the challenges we've faced, Andy's priority has been putting Kentucky first.

Throughout the pandemic, he's made necessary decisions to keep Kentuckians safe, protect essential workers, and grow our economy. We're proud of the accomplishments under his leadership, and we wanted to make sure you were up to speed. **Since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, Andy:**
* Reached across the aisle to expand voting options ahead of the 2020 election to minimize in-person contact;
* Made tough decisions that put people over politics, saving the lives of thousands of Kentuckians;
* Oversaw the state's successful testing and vaccination programs;
* Proposed bonuses for essential workers;
* Announced 270 new economic development projects;
* Utilized the $1.3 billion from the American Rescue Plan to expand broadband, ensure clean water, and build new school buildings;
* Led Kentucky's best economic year on record.

In times of crisis, public servants should put citizens' well-being above politics. That's exactly what Andy has done.

Kentucky is currently a leader in the South in vaccinations. Now, with the dangerous Delta variant spreading through the Commonwealth, it's more important than ever that we keep using every available resource to fight COVID-19, as we have been.

Andy is committed _to continue_ doing everything it takes to put COVID-19 behind us by tackling all that's ahead. Having you on board in this fight means that nothing is impossible.

Onward,

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. clean_body: Peter, The past two years have been challenging for folks here in Kentucky and across our country. But despite all of the challenges we've faced, Andy's priority has been putting Kentucky first. Peter, The past two years have been challenging for folks here in Kentucky and across our country. But despite all of the challenges we've faced, Andy's priority has been putting Kentucky first. Throughout the pandemic, he's made necessary decisions to keep Kentuckians safe, protect essential workers, and grow our economy. We're proud of the accomplishments under his leadership, and we wanted to make sure you were up to speed. Since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, Andy: Reached across the aisle to expand voting options ahead of the 2020 election to minimize in-person contact; Made tough decisions that put people over politics, saving the lives of thousands of Kentuckians; Oversaw the state's successful testing and vaccination programs; Proposed bonuses for essential workers; Announced 270 new economic development projects; Utilized the $1.3 billion from the American Rescue Plan to expand broadband, ensure clean water, and build new school buildings; Led Kentucky's best economic year on record. In times of crisis, public servants should put citizens' well-being above politics. That's exactly what Andy has done. Kentucky is currently a leader in the South in vaccinations. Now, with the dangerous Delta variant spreading through the Commonwealth, it's more important than ever that we keep using every available resource to fight COVID-19, as we have been. Andy is committed to continue doing everything it takes to put COVID-19 behind us by tackling all that's ahead. Having you on board in this fight means that nothing is impossible. name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Help us knock on doors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Here’s what’s next for the Erica Smith team »
#
Hey there,
Knock knock.
_Who’s there?_
Needle.
_Needle who?_
Needle little help right now, open the door!
Sorry but as terrible as that joke was, we had to! Because today we’re talking all about doors.
We need your help, because we’re trying to stop viewing doors as walls. Instead, we hope doors can be a bridge to bring together folks across North Carolina. We want to change hearts and minds and let EVERYONE know that there is a place for them in our moral movement.
[**_That’s why for every dollar you donate, we’re going to knock on a door in a county that Trump won in 2020. Can you donate $5 today****, so we can knock on 5 doors?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19753?t=1&akid=531%2E3698%2ENFbG9X)
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19753?t=2&akid=531%2E3698%2ENFbG9X)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19878?refcode=em20211008-531&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=531%2E3698%2ENFbG9X)**
We’re not leaving any community behind. That’s a sentiment that has been absent for far too long in the politics of every party. Through the division, we see an opportunity for community. Flipping North Carolina blue is going to require us to concede nothing and fight for every single vote.
[**_Can you help us knock on as many doors as possible by donating $5 today****? If we don’t build broad support behind Erica Smith, we could lose the chance to have progressive representation from North Carolina in the U.S. Senate._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/19753?t=22&akid=531%2E3698%2ENFbG9X)
Together,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211008-531-footer&t=23&refcode2=531_3698_NFbG9X&akid=531%2E3698%2ENFbG9X)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=531%2E3698%2ENFbG9X)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=531%2E3698%2ENFbG9X)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc
body:
With just 25 days left in the campaign, we are marching toward victory in November! Early voting counts are coming in every day, and they
| [ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW4Vz72hX2ytW2X32hS7j_cJHW7Kkhd54yqsXZN48YKbt3lSbNV1-WJV7Cg-fyMkNTBs1CrX-W46vSp43_JZ6bVxY0LJ9jG63jW5SSmpw5VnmkPW575cbN5xqxN3V3h7ly5601TDW2-XQK26gkqPcW31NBW16kP3d4Vkx3kb1kWQ_FN50s8dgt8_3nW62ZxlM3dRMwrW3M_GBR38WY6fW9dHzN487b9wNW5bwPPr5VSysnN2sjGJHstgfbW5F9QBx8vWFPtM5lFNSQn3GmV55tLj6PSF8RW7YYQVx4S2LKrW11552L5mkwCRW3q46SG8CDs8VW158L3x7B0J7n3gSl1)

Dear Friends, With just _25 days left_ in the campaign, we are marching toward victory in November! Early voting counts are coming in every day, and they have my opponent scared. Terry McAuliffe is on his heels and he will say anything to win, like a typical 40-year career politician. I am encouraged every day by your energy, and I cannot wait to see what else the next few weeks has to offer. If you have not already voted, I encourage you to head to the polls with ten friends before early voting ends on October 30th! You can find your polling location or register to vote by clicking the button below. Let's go, Virginia!
---
| [ **I'M VOTING FOR GLENN!** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW4Vz72hX2ytW2X32hS7j_cJHW7Kkhd54yqsXZN48YKbt3lSbNV1-WJV7CgQz_W4qGLmR5Fd_6MW8DNrJG4gjfSNW7G_dTW4qMCWRW5TVg797tPkhmW48LBVT7K0fP8N5yl_JZN-YjlW1jJSK590mkdyW4wJkbL19YVKDW2MJ3Ny3csP2RW923jj794vYQWW2qChq149g6DSW1zLgkc2t_YRJW1-Dy51373JqfN61xQQNn755pW7rnmy03RQ9vxN3QXlLQDM2KsW83WhyK4Jzv7cW3_SBpr91nNv0W4CRPVr2nQhsMVc5g1B6F6jPPVkvkrx3JZQj_W5-QqdF68Zztx3kmH1)
---
| | |
---|---|---
In case you missed it, at last week's debate Terry McAuliffe showed us his heart and made the disqualifying statement that "[parents don't matter.](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW4Vz72hX2ytW2X32hS7j_cJHW7Kkhd54yqsXZN48YKbN3lSc3V1-WJV7CgK18W3mhQBZ2QKRd_W4pgMyG1QGmNcW29KrsT5J60rbW4Zxc1J8Y2pvKW1bJf545m30GrW3PQ3WR98ZkhYW23PW2R4MmLD6W6JHJ732CxJQ0W80qkH2727G4rW7mFJmc7gHNg4W4SRgdg4WyKG2W7_0_N51Dyxj1W15XDpQ8Lqc1KW3frM196JlQmzVHJxXw1kJ8WSW8zmNyJ1XcrJ5W1cH89q6Ld_RtW8PLCTP7D_lRPW4DzMF63tbG2rW16vhg63MQYswW7lY7Yz5nCxjgW1p6yGd2HtGzdW2z9l7b829pwrW6N55T640lqr23kXx1)" As your next governor, I will never put government and politicians between parents, which is why I launched a new, family-led mobilization effort in direct response to my opponent's claim that parents should not have a say in their child's education. Parents Matter is a movement of families, parents, children, and caring neighbors who will stand up to Terry and reject his attack on a parent's fundamental right to their children's education. You can let my opponent know what you think about his most recent comments and join our movement by clicking the button below!
---
| [ **PARENTS MATTER!** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW4Vz72hX2ytW2X32hS7j_cJHW7Kkhd54yqsXZN48YKbt3lSbNV1-WJV7CgQmZW2gczvX4S-Q8XW6MBjg21_Qx68Vm8-KQ7D9VqFVNyD0T1TGBP4W8W4ms83g8ZJ7W98TkK71Pgg7RW3_NbQ83SfvJrN7105dvC11DlW6S0cCZ4BNZ1VVQmNzX924gtvW7k4vYq1MfGWHW82mCcd75pZWsN7JvCzRhqQzKN6tChrnbmfJ9VdW_9D914K8DW5S7qbz1DGsscW4MMVqp3cn_gSW8s1mhb1FBdCnN6ZlVWRsbMSfW6pRj0W5C4C3RW79c6S95TCy05N8r3jxcg3YH03lxr1)
---
[ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW4Vz72hX2ytW2X32hS7j_cJHW7Kkhd54yqsXZN48YKb93lSbtV1-WJV7CgWmzW1Tm5Z_8jbY1tW83y8s57y4PNCW5tRtCm4qH8XHW2pqZyN8LN28SW2CJJzR4BtrytW5thbMg9f4sYGV5wvtl86YF2TW19K7YW8NgQXMW4TrXJg2zRQHGW377Ss86D_DWCW4WhmsZ6xWlD9W7SjxKc3HJc7vW234n-n5n0llGN8NPFQ09__lPW4BwCSz61M7QkW8kKJtb592XZcW8xmM3L52jdTQW3_-5s-5B5-FvW1gJKz633ylCSN4qY62sj-Vs63gLY1)
---
| | |
---|---|---
I had an amazing time visiting with students at Virginia Technical Academy earlier this week. Our students have suffered because of extended school closings, lowered school standards, and political agendas under the current Democratic administration in Richmond. On day one, I will empower parents and restore commonsense to our classrooms by investing in education. My Day One Game Plan includes the largest education budget in Virginia's history! We will restore high expectations in education to get every student college or career ready, rebuild crumbling schools, raise teacher pay, and invest in programs like the ones offered at VTA. Click the button below to see how I will restore excellence in education as your next governor.
---
| [ **DAY ONE GAME PLAN** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW4Vz72hX2ytW2X32hS7j_cJHW7Kkhd54yqsXZN48YKbt3lSbNV1-WJV7CgMNzW12gZzV50d4M7W6LpjX83swwFrW5Cxsn57YCR_gW75YBnR5d0V6tW8N1KqB5NY43mW61hrvk1b15G4W30HJx72RZF-YW3Fmy7K7lbchSW64MyG52g_zp5W973WVz6Lc8b0W81hVt86NcL3cW6Dvs9T2CVpYZM61ymzWyT63VRLkyb3Sb1LcW9byxkf58sVgWW1z1RNl5bcFBJW30N3Fd3cLV18W4GVd8b4rR4qDW6N6VQ16CYgRrW2B_zYb3VRstbW7Z144Q264XRvW5bt27n6Nt7pG2XL1)
---
---

| | |
---|---|---
Your support and energy are making a difference! Early voting numbers are making Terry scared, and he is scrambling to find anything that will turn people against me. There is too much at stake in this election for us not to keep moving forward. Make sure to head to the polls this week so that Terry does not get a second chance to recycle his failed policies. Remember, early voting ends on October 30th and Election Day is November 2nd.
---
Bring friends and vote early!
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---
| [ **EARLY VOTING INFORMATION** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VW4Vz72hX2ytW2X32hS7j_cJHW7Kkhd54yqsXZN48YKbt3lSbNV1-WJV7CgKSmN2xp9QQcD0xgW22TQkY5ylBZHVzcQ3Q6c8PjLW5tgWVJ6X0YsfW27RF4D7lsKRxW5Lj7yn5BlxhGW4Fpwxl1YJpbKW3HxDVJ5Gj78cW1cNKyT5w6Z8LW5VjtyB1bmYbXW22-GCm21kWL1W3qyRhT9l0JXBW3ZQf024bl-X_W66zvjq7xSwd2W8crstZ1F1k53W4bJMCg1rbnj-W3bw27r5V-zwSW89fFFB21NhLLW7P3n6x4mj4BgW9c5z7P3R9mL-W3ZPQsZ1Cj4TyW7mvvln1FjRDQ320y1)

Parents Matter is a movement of families, parents, children, and caring neighbors who will stand up to Terry and reject his attack on a parent's fundamental right to their children's education. You can let my opponent know what you think about his most recent comments and join our movement by clicking the button below! | | | | ---|---|--- I had an amazing time visiting with students at Virginia Technical Academy earlier this week. Our students have suffered because of extended school closings, lowered school standards, and political agendas under the current Democratic administration in Richmond. On day one, I will empower parents and restore commonsense to our classrooms by investing in education. My Day One Game Plan includes the largest education budget in Virginia's history! We will restore high expectations in education to get every student college or career ready, rebuild crumbling schools, raise teacher pay, and invest in programs like the ones offered at VTA. Click the button below to see how I will restore excellence in education as your next governor. | | | | ---|---|--- Your support and energy are making a difference! Early voting numbers are making Terry scared, and he is scrambling to find anything that will turn people against me. There is too much at stake in this election for us not to keep moving forward. Make sure to head to the polls this week so that Terry does not get a second chance to recycle his failed policies. Remember, early voting ends on October 30th and Election Day is November 2nd. Bring friends and vote early! Glenn Youngkin | Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc. Not authorized by any other candidate. Youngkin for Governor, PO Box 3950, Merrifield, VA 22116

body:
Would you vote for the Republican candidate in your state and local elections, or would you vote for the Democrat? |

**POLL: IF ELECTIONS WERE HELD TODAY, WOULD YOU VOTE REPUBLICAN OR DEMOCRAT?**

If the midterm elections were held today, who would you cast your ballot for? **[Would you vote for the Republican candidate in your state and local elections, or would you vote for the Democrat?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=732b110b91c54506b44fc9c76050d743&_e=52twSinpko5AIt5nvvGUIaL5-ND8LLLyqKH1k-eM92wI38VVuEA1zdKTtVVk3VK3G89agb-nyojQ6YPz13v7nLq9KGB38kn6Gl07Hm6KE-JFPc9mJi0LxBTMLtlyrX6fL1v8eZOYStbWQgBg5mXvNy5Td41Q41otU0KadN3hcZBwTZIF2uq3oVPQ4G3-TL0lBT1L2GU_8rjeV1LKEiu-LujnTBMYrJ7D7U0zQtONoOxzeQf2CWyVhcaH8d1yoqercbGAiFQBYPuSvsqqtIP0UNeVZIwQTrtjOLF47Vc9i_obHdHdbqG2woEK0ojmo9rEBYkqgk3JIYbQuhJtKW4pTeVykMVV9n3cpcoV4vC-DFg2Q4Rqo4zYsbhSJuQeZIcNAEnoIEhZ5Kf_kzS4TmwBSWfRJicB9rjOoDvCaZF69zR13UZjIf44izJpsGPA2Hc9lR8ULaMW3h1yUo-sl-bt6-rJhOh6EYQBcnJvtMayeQw%3D)** Or neither?

We understand that not every one of you reading this right now lives in a state that is holding a Senate election next year. We just want to know whether or not the general mood of the country favors Democrats or Republicans at the present time.

**Please take 15 seconds to let us know how you’re feeling about the current state of affairs.**

[** REPUBLICAN OR DEMOCRAT?
WHO WOULD YOU VOTE FOR->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=732b110b91c54506b44fc9c76050d743&_e=52twSinpko5AIt5nvvGUIaL5-ND8LLLyqKH1k-eM92wI38VVuEA1zdKTtVVk3VK3G89agb-nyojQ6YPz13v7nLq9KGB38kn6Gl07Hm6KE-JFPc9mJi0LxBTMLtlyrX6fL1v8eZOYStbWQgBg5mXvNy5Td41Q41otU0KadN3hcZBwTZIF2uq3oVPQ4G3-TL0lBT1L2GU_8rjeV1LKEiu-LujnTBMYrJ7D7U0zQtONoOxzeQf2CWyVhcaH8d1yoqercbGAiFQBYPuSvsqqtIP0UMh3dF8fw7qTxYyC-JVtCMZfJ7sdWzfntVxyUiLhaZtybugSAjtQ3Pz8RfTkjV17NNwJDdQNyi3kEXwC_2X99-030P8bz_Jt1OfCPvziWmZWtETPLoaSqEzbdCZQxc5j3Fm4pTGLxF04-wuZyexPfNI3Fyoxm3LTdn-aCSMgnX02qyNc2yUWPGqiu3S51EJwNELmZHjEg602jp9c-RcnZqk%3D)

Thanks,
NRSC Polling Department

[**Every American Hero who sends in just ten dollars before Trump 's rally will be honored as a Top Trump Patriot. There's only one catch: it's TOMORROW -- so you must respond immediately >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58493279:6lNdZw2N2:m:1:3253819041:8832E89133D3FC3E9C5ECBD0041ACB57:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: October Newsletter!
body:
This month, we are focusing on police reform. | | |
#### OCTOBER NEWSLETTER
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b4474c73fbf1/october-newsletter?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
### A Note from Jahmal:

It's important to me that I use this campaign and this platform to highlight why we are fighting for change. This month, I am taking the time to shine a light on the injustices Black & Brown people face at the hands of police. This is more than just a policy platform. As a Black man, this is personal.

I've been pulled over in Indiana, Illinois, Wisconsin, Nebraska and Oklahoma. Each time I've gotten stopped I didn't know if I was going to die.

In Wahoo, Nebraska an officer pulled me over, handcuffed me, and put me in the backseat of the squad car. Then, he proceeded to drive through a cornfield at top speed. I bounced around the back seat like a rag doll. He pulled up to a barn and two large dogs came out. He said he'd forgotten something at his house. I waited. 30 minutes later he came out and took me to a police station. That’s not police officer behavior, that’s KKK behavior.

This isn't a new story. This happens all the time to people of color in America. I know this has happened to some of you too. I hope that you will take some time this month to **share your stories with me**.

I appreciate the support that you have given me that has gotten us to a point where I can share these stories and advocate for real change. Thank you. I am humbled by the support you have given me so far. If you're able, please **consider making a donation[here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=e79007b82c&e=339f142c50)**! Let's keep pushing and be #AboutThatAction! Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole
---
| |
## THE ROAD SO FAR
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=4d03793cb1&e=339f142c50)
---
On August 19th, I was joined by community members at The Comedy Bar! It was so wonderful to take some time and laugh. We need laughter. Thanks to Comedy Bar and everyone who came out to support!
---
I was featured in the Silver Room's Randomly Selected podcast. It was a blast to talk to Mario, and I appreciate all the love the episode got. If you missed it, listen [here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=66ada7ce41&e=339f142c50)!
|
---
|
---
| |
## JOIN ME
---
|
---
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=1a8bba6fcc&e=339f142c50)
---
Join me and community stakeholders on **Wednesday, October 13th** for a rally about the failures of **Chicago's consent decree** , and why we need to push for change at the federal level, in addition to statewide reforms.
| [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=e36dc28c69&e=339f142c50)
---
On Tuesday, **October 26 at 12pm CT/ 1pm ET** , I will be speaking with **Professor Alex Vitale** about his book **"The End of Policing."** A Zoom link to the conversation will be sent out prior to the event. Register (for free) [here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=66851ccfc7&e=339f142c50)!
|

They aren’t trying to inspire change in our state, **they want to get rid of the progress we’ve made together entirely.** _That’s not going to happen on my watch._

clean_body: | | | | | Folks, I’ll keep this simple: | | | To be clear, the five Republicans that are running against me make up the most far-right field in Nevada’s history. If any of them are elected, it would mean inaction on climate change, a state government that refuses to advocate for workers’ rights, and leadership that sides with big pharma over people. They aren’t trying to inspire change in our state, they want to get rid of the progress we’ve made together entirely. That’s not going to happen on my watch. It’s up to all of us to be the first line of defense against Trump-like leadership taking hold in Nevada. What do you say, are you in this fight with us? | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support. | Dear Patriot, Biden's Department of "Justice" is persecuting innocent Americans. And you or I might be next on their list. **It's no secret that the Obama DOJ targeted members of the Trump campaign in 2016.** Their actions during that election are well-documented and shameful. But since then it has gotten so much worse. They are now targeting ordinary Americans for having dissenting political views. Mothers who simply want to advocate for their children's education. Citizens who want to peacefully make their voices heard. All of those people are now in immediate danger of being labeled "domestic terrorists" and detained by a rogue DOJ. Attorney General Merrick Garland announced that he will be using the brute power of the DOJ to suppress parents who dare question the teaching of Critical Race Theory by their local schools. The message is clear: if you speak up, they will come after you. You and I have two options in front of us today: **1\. Cower in fear as Joe Biden's DOJ criminalizes dissent, and attacks the very fabric of American liberty** ... or ... **2\. Stand up against the DOJ, refuse to be silenced, and fight for our freedom** I know which path I am going to take. I will not let American liberty die at the hands of a rogue Department of "Justice." But I need you to stand with me in this fight. My advisors are worried that the DOJ will use the same tactics that they used against President Trump, to defeat me in my upcoming Senate race. I must be prepared for whatever they throw my way, and that means I have no choice but to ask patriots like you for help. [Will you help me stand against Biden's DOJ by pitching in $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3D_3ap_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7p6dzkQXPfczA8W7Ubw390F-2FkDbIas3L6A-2FgRiZUIJlCbADsX9rSXFFuCBkvIy7pZg9f2PDNeU9NanXfweT23vTMBbZGquT5m-2BFe79sNRfexBA-2FXNmNAgmC30Yn88nAh84BCZ-2FijLyUhj4i2xV1S5-2FqSG3764dnJ4-2FC4q6ysr6FlnXPM42WRgnWAFF1iWLf64Q-2Bz5yQKzmUlimzP0dB17RdKhvOn-2FL5bz5xRnSMAsUWu2PjpKMPFVdgVuCP30Gjte2ewFhEQRNTc09Nx-2F2cQVH6Sj3MR4W1pAJfEcg1zIPC6i05g0FHBJGsiEKOABSQkuVOPIMYLouF64pMAXOQTpeg-3D-3D) The DOJ wants you to be afraid. Joe Biden and Merrick Garland are hoping that you'll stay home and keep quiet out of fear of being targeted by them. They want to prevent Americans from speaking out against the government in any way. These are the type of tactics I would expect in a place like China, not the United States. I refuse to cower in fear. I will defend these parents with everything I have against the vast power of the DOJ. But my advisors are concerned about what might be next if I take on this fight. Some have even suggested that they might target me the same way they targeted President Trump in 2016. With a Senate campaign coming up, that could put me in serious danger. [I need you to help defend me against whatever they might throw my way. Can you pitch in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DkeoC_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7p6dzkQXPfczA8W7Ubw390F-2FkDbIas3L6A-2FgRiZUIJlCbADsX9rSXFFuCBkvIy7pZg9f2PDNeU9NanXfweT23vTMBbZGquT5m-2BFe79sNRfexBA-2FXNmNAgmC30Yn88nAh84BCZ-2FijLyUhj4i2xV1S5-2FrxkBEFlQmhnt7xn510ErQIEjFoptrN4q4UARZNJ2iBdZCMbMWBvXwgYCHOJjItaHHYP6GNO-2BWAPF-2BbhiScDWU48F8phOdy0hxhKHMZjp7C8n4ZBOBtANHEj-2BzcJlkaic5FuxUZBFQrahm-2FeDcTC3FEwNptqmm-2Fc80-2Fh7CAxS8o10ui-2BHE0r-2Fv8bmgubwQP5ZQ-3D-3D) In Liberty, Rand Paul

clean_body: watch out for his DOJ | | | | | | | Dear Patriot, Biden's Department of "Justice" is persecuting innocent Americans. And you or I might be next on their list. It's no secret that the Obama DOJ targeted members of the Trump campaign in 2016. Their actions during that election are well-documented and shameful. But since then it has gotten so much worse. They are now targeting ordinary Americans for having dissenting political views. Mothers who simply want to advocate for their children's education. Citizens who want to peacefully make their voices heard. All of those people are now in immediate danger of being labeled "domestic terrorists" and detained by a rogue DOJ. Attorney General Merrick Garland announced that he will be using the brute power of the DOJ to suppress parents who dare question the teaching of Critical Race Theory by their local schools. The message is clear: if you speak up, they will come after you. You and I have two options in front of us today: 1\. Cower in fear as Joe Biden's DOJ criminalizes dissent, and attacks the very fabric of American liberty ... or ... 2\. Stand up against the DOJ, refuse to be silenced, and fight for our freedom I know which path I am going to take. I will not let American liberty die at the hands of a rogue Department of "Justice." But I need you to stand with me in this fight. My advisors are worried that the DOJ will use the same tactics that they used against President Trump, to defeat me in my upcoming Senate race. I must be prepared for whatever they throw my way, and that means I have no choice but to ask patriots like you for help. The DOJ wants you to be afraid. Joe Biden and Merrick Garland are hoping that you'll stay home and keep quiet out of fear of being targeted by them. They want to prevent Americans from speaking out against the government in any way. These are the type of tactics I would expect in a place like China, not the United States. I refuse to cower in fear. I will defend these parents with everything I have against the vast power of the DOJ. But my advisors are concerned about what might be next if I take on this fight. Some have even suggested that they might target me the same way they targeted President Trump in 2016. With a Senate campaign coming up, that could put me in serious danger. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | **** P.S. Biden's DOJ is punishing ordinary American citizens for dissenting against Critical Race Theory in schools. In fact, they are even treating these innocent parents as "domestic terrorists." I give you my word, I will defend these parents with everything I have. But with a huge Senate race coming up, my advisors are worried what the DOJ might have up their sleeve to target me if I stand in their way. | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate | No longer want to receive these emails? . name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20Monssen?=
subject: Phony Conservative Marjorie Taylor Greene Wastes Tax Dollars on Campaign-Style Mailings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Strahan for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9f19e61e77ce/businesswoman-jennifer-strahan-announces-challenge-to-marjorie-taylor-greene-in-ga-5131370?e=daf3f68050)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Jake Monssen, jake@strahanforcongress.com
---
| | **PHONY CONSERVATIVE MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE WASTES TAX DOLLARS ON CAMPAIGN-STYLE MAILINGS**

_Jennifer Strahan calls on MTG to refund taxpayers_
---
| **DALLAS, Ga** : Jennifer Strahan, conservative candidate for Congress in Georgia's 14th congressional district, called on incumbent congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene to refund taxpayers for blatantly wasting money on campaign-style self-promotion mailers in violation of congressional rules.

"This is not how true conservatives govern and is just the latest example of Marjorie Taylor Greene saying one thing to Georgians and doing another in Washington. Congresswoman Greene should reimburse taxpayers for this blatant waste of tax money to promote her campaign in violation of congressional rules," said Strahan.
---
|
---
|
---
| "We need a Representative who will work to cut wasteful spending and who will put Georgians first. We deserve competent constituent services and a congresswoman who can get things done for Georgia," Strahan continued.

As a _Roll Call_ article explains:

_"Members in both chambers have the privilege known as mail franking, which uses their signatures instead of stamps to send mail to constituents. The cost of sending mail — which technically can be anything from post cards to Facebook advertisements — comes out of House members' office budgets, which are made _[_available_](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=00cf6731b9&e=daf3f68050) _ by the Chief Administrative Officer of the House ..._

_"A franking _[_commission_](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=3c36f98fbe&e=daf3f68050) _ of six House members has to sign off on all pieces of franked mail before they’re sent, and there are measures in place to ensure members can’t use their mailing privileges to bolster campaigns._

_"Members aren't allowed, for example, to make partisan points or criticize their colleagues in franked mail." -- _[_https://www.rollcall.com/2016/08/10/house-members-send-mail-on-taxpayers-dime-vulnerable-ones-do-it-much-more/_](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=0263a7e53d&e=daf3f68050)

"These mailings are clearly partisan and political in nature and are indistinguishable from campaign mail, which is a violation of franking rules," said Strahan.
---
| | Paid for by Strahan for Congress
---
| |
---

You can [update your preferences](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=9ca26a5c2f&e=daf3f68050&c=d05230641d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://StrahanForCongress.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=21a96cd50be879ed37d24b0ca&id=9ca26a5c2f&e=daf3f68050&c=d05230641d).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: David and Goliath Situation in Texas House
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5831fad4249c/prayer-action-for-texas-house-to-save-girls-sports-14819030?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| |
# Dear Friend,
Due to WOKE culture, our Texas K-12 girl athletes in public schools are facing the threat of competing with biological males in sports. We’re supporting HB 25 (Swanson-HD 150) which will codify UIL rules in Texas law to ensure students play sports according to their sex assigned at birth. Texans, we are in a David and Goliath situation. The Goliath of big businesses is urging Texas policymakers to NOT protect Texas biological girl athletes. They are pressuring lawmakers to “do nothing” and let the current loopholes in our Texas sports policy stand. If our lawmakers don’t act quickly and effectively, their inaction will place approximately 300,000+ girl athletes in Texas public schools 7-12 at risk to compete with biological males. [https://www.texascompetes.org/blog/Texas-competes-2021-open-business-letter/](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=746bdec870&e=01c99b7fbd) We need your prayers and phone calls now more than ever. Texas stands on the precipice regarding the protection of women's rights. PRAY: Texas policymakers will follow David’s example in 1 Samuel 17- to have faith in God and stand up against the Goliath of big businesses.
ACTION:
* Phone Representative Ashby (512) 463-0508.
* Thank him as Chair of Constitutional Rights & Remedies for passing HB 25 out of committee on Wednesday, October 6.
* Respectfully ask that the committee report be sent to the calendar committee ASAP so the clock doesn’t run out on scheduling HB 25 for a timely hearing.

* Phone Speaker Phelan (512) 463-1000 and thank him for prioritizing HB 25. Ask him to make sure this bill gets through Calendar Committee as quickly as possible, gets a floor vote, and becomes law.
* Phone your Representative and ask them to support HB 25. Find your representative at [https://house.texas.gov/members/find-your-representative/](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=fdac8a244f&e=01c99b7fbd)

Talking points:
* HB 25 is preemptive and codifies female athlete protection under Title IX, a federal law that restricts discrimination on the basis of sex in educational settings.
* Boys playing on girls’ sports teams are a safety hazard.
* The House needs to vote HB 25 legislation out early next week to allow process time so it becomes Texas Law.

Blessings, __
#

---
| | | | | | | [](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=c770e78533&e=01c99b7fbd)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c474%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=14dzdZ4pvSXE8fZGg6UpeQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66984%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z%2f2sR9O39UY8K6BrcbFGWg&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66995%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AE2QteFtKmZG%2bSF6JerRZw&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66984%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z%2f2sR9O39UY8K6BrcbFGWg&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66996%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fOs%2bGTMJXbb3fGbN3NSVTw&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66997%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9aL7kCfYoBb%2bv7NCNLi9BQ&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66998%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lp3vIkzOORqM76reGXuSvQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c474%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=14dzdZ4pvSXE8fZGg6UpeQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c474%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=14dzdZ4pvSXE8fZGg6UpeQ&sysid=1)

Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his ONLINE college classes until he takes the vaccine! If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next! We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 _

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37282419/310618923/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDRlMDdjOC04MzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5OCns_ecs_WQlr32FZ1agrtiQ5fbWqKBw48Gy29JtI=)

Peter, I'll be honest with you. When campaigns like ours really try to talk about policy and why it's so important (like we're about to do now), a lot of people tune out, get bored, and delete our emails.

**I hope you're not one of those people, Peter. Because this will make a difference in _your_ life.**

As you may know, Democrats in Congress are going through a hard slog right now trying to pass some critical legislation.

That includes extending the debt ceiling, strengthening and protecting voting rights, modernizing infrastructure, and of course passing the Build Back Better Act.

**The Build Back Better Act is President Biden’s flagship agenda that would revolutionize our social safety nets and combat climate change.**

But that's not all. The Build Back Better Act would also:
* Fund community colleges
* Make childcare more affordable
* Expand Medicare
* Fund comprehensive paid medical leave
* Transition towards a clean energy economy

But Peter, passing the Build Back Better Act won’t be an easy battle. Republicans are doing E‐V‐E‐R‐Y‐T‐H‐I‐N‐G they can to obstruct our progress and steal our House and Senate majorities away from us before we can create meaningful change. _Even California Democrats like me aren’t safe!_

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Don’t let radical Virginia Republicans win
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37282670/310619602/-2023814932?refcode=20211008.6_VEA_10BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2M4YzIxNS04MzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cYUvpsRZcE8TmtWT6hoPRAKbDYmSnOyHMigucrdDGII=)

| | Derek, we need the support of every Democrat in the country right now in Virginia.

A far-right PAC that calls itself the “NRA for families” just launched a barrage of attacks against Terry and we need the resources to correct the record.

_**[Will you chip in to Terry’s campaign right now? We need to raise $150,000 by midnight to keep our ads on the air — it’s the only way we’ll be able to correct the record.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37282671/310619603/-2023814932?refcode=20211008.6_VEA_10BI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2M4YzIxNS04MzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cYUvpsRZcE8TmtWT6hoPRAKbDYmSnOyHMigucrdDGII=)**_

This new ad is being run by a shadowy organization called the American Principles Project PAC. They are so out there they actually believe calling themselves the “NRA for families” is a good thing.

_**Kirsten also met with community members in Cochise County to hear more about the issues they face and the values they want reflected in Congress. **_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37282752/310619938/558373307?refcode=X_100821_CampaignUpdate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGE0MmMyZS04NTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYSA4u0x2HtD9W5pZKfzwQ-B9Dgd1ku2v2cZAH0WyGA=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37282754/310619939/41694283?refcode=X_100821_CampaignUpdate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGE0MmMyZS04NTI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bYSA4u0x2HtD9W5pZKfzwQ-B9Dgd1ku2v2cZAH0WyGA=)

_**Kirsten was proud to join her colleagues at the Southern Arizona Water Users Association meeting last week. **__**As an environmental attorney and water policy expert, Kirsten understands the science and the urgency to conserve our natural resources and find solutions to ensure Arizona has a safe, reliable water supply for the future.**_
Can you believe all of that happened in just the first couple weeks of this month? Well you better, because Kirsten and Team Engel are only getting started!
We'll continue to keep you updated on all things Southern Arizona and our fight to keep AZ-02 blue, but for now we wish you a safe and pleasant weekend.

Thanks!
\-- Team Engel

Fellow Conservative,

During my time in the House of Representatives, I have had the privilege of working alongside Representative Ted Budd from North Carolina. **_Ted has decided to take the America First Fight to the US Senate and I am fully endorsing him because I know he has what it takes. Will you join me?_** | [**SUPPORT TED BUDD FOR US SENATE OF NORTH CAROLINA**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=84b5f992ac354db1af113954350b2e54&_e=pTsu1vro5XFNy9VcxjodO78pj1ksDgehPt7iV-5b61hGf6B5nIzGt7_60kCPEv3dyMTxreFytaB--W5Vuf2InIznYRonR9vVFVA-__toLkHUU_alSyW1nPk61iD6OaUA0140QWYrgtFnm4IWa9_dRjJN_GlBtqVOagBAxnz42ELbao2Byatq1d_S1TPQF2WemUAD-0e27gZ-Z5xhFGm63r8iGx-Mq4i6lnOQgNm8Nr_w66dL9bEKFqcSLv3qRHyOsLqw8-JAGDcWk2jbfqG8p4HAol6xsQG4bSpqJ6EnfxDef-MQ_MxoCB51xiIvvmH-0lIuCShyUiikcBRMG_JP37McbCrOIuBWpKQAhvQWXdOXyjfM1rVJehvHivFcrK3ujrnSUdPSwjpCIvL_q1wMUvr1rP1VQQnqGscCIgXMcb1RpC7dArrqrfs446hSY7DBlbCKRMMmYtpEL64B-6oE7Q%3D%3D)

**Ted Budd’s campaign has already been endorsed by President Trump because he knows that Ted will continue the America First Agenda. If we want to protect our country and stop the Radical Socialists we must continue to elect strong Conservative Leaders who believe in common-sense solutions.**

The Radical Left has shown us that they cannot be trusted. We need to send leaders to Washington that will hold them accountable. Our country will not succeed when we have runaway spending, open borders, and weak leaders calling the shots. Will you join me in helping get Ted Budd to the US Senate to fix this mess?

clean_body: ENDORSEMENT ANNOUNCEMENT! | Fellow Conservative, During my time in the House of Representatives, I have had the privilege of working alongside Representative Ted Budd from North Carolina. Ted has decided to take the America First Fight to the US Senate and I am fully endorsing him because I know he has what it takes. Will you join me? | Ted Budd’s campaign has already been endorsed by President Trump because he knows that Ted will continue the America First Agenda. If we want to protect our country and stop the Radical Socialists we must continue to elect strong Conservative Leaders who believe in common-sense solutions. The Radical Left has shown us that they cannot be trusted. We need to send leaders to Washington that will hold them accountable. Our country will not succeed when we have runaway spending, open borders, and weak leaders calling the shots. Will you join me in helping get Ted Budd to the US Senate to fix this mess? If we want to defeat the Democrat Senate Majority in 2022, we must come together as a party and support like‐minded leaders who can get the job done. Ted Budd is the man for the job. For Liberty and the Rule of Law, Chip Roy U.S. Congressman, TX ‐ 21 Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

# We are in this to fight!
#
## I jumped in this race to go to Washington to help Ga-10!

The Texas state legislature passed a ban against all abortions after 6 weeks and this was held up by the U.S. Supreme Court. Many women do not even realize that they are pregnant at this point. Now, we are celebrating a court’s ruling to put the bill on hold, but this will have a direct impact on states with GOP strongholds, including Georgia.

Abortion is a personal and complex healthcare issue that should be made between and woman and her doctor. Not her legislator.

As your next Congresswoman, I will fight for women to have quality, affordable, and accessible reproductive healthcare. Please join me in this fight by supporting my campaign with a donation, sign up to volunteer, and stay in the loop with everything that is going on in my campaign.

ALERT: MORE THAN HALF OF THE COUNTRY HAS MADE IT CLEAR THAT BIDEN’S LIBERAL LEADERSHIP IS FAILING US. There’s too much at stake to leave a liberal majority at his fingertips. Join me now to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and take back our country. Friend, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris promised a lot. They told America they’d restore our nation. Bring back unity. Inspire optimism. Now, 8 months later, it's safe to say they’ve completely failed at that. Recent polls show approval ratings are in the low 40s and Americans are NOT optimistic about the future \- in the FIRST YEAR of their administration! And it's not hard to guess why. Let's look at his accomplishments so far: Mixed messages and confusion on COVID Rising prices for gas, groceries, and essential services all over the country A complete, utter failure in Afghanistan that abandoned thousands of American citizens and military equipment after withdrawal An infrastructure bill that looks more like the Green New Deal than a plan for roads and bridges One over the top spending bill after the other that promises billions to special interests and little to the American families and businesses struggling after liberal lockdowns And if liberals stay in control in Washington, there’s no doubt this list of failures will TRIPLE or QUADRUPLE by the time Biden is up for re-election. That’s why I am asking you to chip in now to help me defeat Biden’s liberal majority in 2022 and TAKE BACK THE HOUSE. More than ever, Americans need real leadership. But with liberals in control of Congress and Biden in the White House, we’re facing one crisis after another. We just cannot afford to continue like this. We need to TAKE BACK THE HOUSE and take back our country. Please, join me and chip in now, before it’s too late: ** Thank you in advance. Best, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Christy Smith
subject: Want to know what sucks about Mike Garcia and education?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37283181/310621124/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmZiOWQ0My04NzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O3PX5vBO84KJ2UEHbOibPH5rXJ0gVFf6hm0is3smFS8=&emci=d1aac111-8628-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=62fb9d43-8728-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

I've spent a lot of time in education in my career. From working at the Department of Education and founding the Valencia Valley Technological Education Foundation to running for my local school board, I have fought for every student in CA-25 to have access to a quality education.

One of my biggest motivations in this race -- and my motivation for every election I have been a part of -- is a deep desire to improve our school system because schools are what got me to where I am today.

But let me tell you what really sucks. Mike Garcia votes against the students of this district every single chance he gets. Here's an example: The American Rescue Plan brought nearly $170 billion in much-needed funding to our students and public schools, funding that would increase health and safety -- Representative Mike Garcia voted against it.

**In these times especially, I know how important education is, and I'm ready to put everything on the line for our students and their futures.**

**[When I get to Congress I promise I will fight tooth and nail for education, but I cannot do it without you. clean_body: | Peter, I've spent a lot of time in education in my career. From working at the Department of Education and founding the Valencia Valley Technological Education Foundation to running for my local school board, I have fought for every student in CA-25 to have access to a quality education. One of my biggest motivations in this race -- and my motivation for every election I have been a part of -- is a deep desire to improve our school system because schools are what got me to where I am today. But let me tell you what really sucks. Mike Garcia votes against the students of this district every single chance he gets. Here's an example: The American Rescue Plan brought nearly $170 billion in much-needed funding to our students and public schools, funding that would increase health and safety -- Representative Mike Garcia voted against it. The climate crisis is here, Peter.

In the past year alone our communities have experienced record heat waves, destructive mudslides, draining rivers and drought, and smoky skies like we’ve never seen before. As a pediatrician, I’ve seen firsthand how climate change has a disproportionate impact on low-income communities and communities of color.

I’ve been working to combat climate change for years. In med school, I fought along with the Union of Concerned Scientists on combating climate change. I was proud our work received national attention: President Obama named me a Champion of Change.

Yet it feels like we’ve made little progress since then.

The reality is, we need to take immediate action if we’re going to combat extreme weather and protect our planet for future generations.

And I’m ready to make that commitment. But this campaign isn’t just about my opinions and plans, it’s about all of us as a team. We’re building a people-powered movement and that means we need to work together.

That’s why I want to hear your input, too: **[how concerned are you about the climate crisis? Do you think it needs to be one of Congress’ top priorities? Let me know in this quick survey >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37284174/310623406/-1808509617?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWJlMTM3OC04YjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oHuEXLInqQE_-JnCgSJiUV9tDoAKC9mgFrBpO0mdZ0g=&emci=8feb2713-8228-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6abe1378-8b28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12666102)**

Folks,

On January 6th, a Trump-supporting mob attacked the US Capitol, and now Kevin McCarthy is trying to hide the truth about what happened that day.

We all watched as these insurrectionists attacked Capitol police officers, defiled the most hallowed places in our democracy, and tried to stop a rightfully elected president from taking office.

**In our view, that amounts to one thing: Treason.**

But we want to make sure you agree with us here, folks. name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8874%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KyvOOhxnPZWv7vGcthkrKQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15821%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q2UTYm%2b2XEO%2bGIGZCYcRFA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15822%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3YV60q3YzATSxyITyKhVrw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15822%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3YV60q3YzATSxyITyKhVrw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8874%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KyvOOhxnPZWv7vGcthkrKQ&sysid=1)_

name: Women Vets + Taking the Hill
subject: Join us on Oct 21 for Women Vets + Allies in Congress in DC!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

There are more than 2 million living women veterans in the United States. [_**Only 8 have ever been elected to serve in Congress.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/YXt4qEbhJh9giRqV3gcZxX94TjL1sAkrAIV4Edzxqo0=)

At Taking the Hill, we're working to change that by supporting women veterans and military family members of integrity for Congress. And with just over one year to go until the midterm elections, now is the most critical time to provide that support!

That's why we are organizing an event on [_**October 21st at 6:30 pm ET in Washington, DC**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/6-vSmBnL9_A4ylfP-H9KEvkE7F7VA1wXfyiNYrvTldU=) to celebrate the past, present, and future of women veterans in Congress. We will be joined by women veteran leaders like [_**Rep. Chrissy Houlahan and Elaine Luria**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/6-vSmBnL9_A4ylfP-H9KEvkE7F7VA1wXfyiNYrvTldU=), as well as their allies on the Hill like[ _**Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto and Rep. Julia Brownley.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/6-vSmBnL9_A4ylfP-H9KEvkE7F7VA1wXfyiNYrvTldU=) We will celebrate and may be joined by other women veterans and allies like Sen. Tammy Duckworth and Reps. Mikie Sherrill, Elissa Slotkin, and Abigail Spanberger.

There are two ways you can support us on this incredible evening of service, celebration, and history:

1) [_**RSVP for a ticket to attend in person and meet our women veteran leaders!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/6-vSmBnL9_A4ylfP-H9KEvkE7F7VA1wXfyiNYrvTldU=) Space is limited; sign up today! We will send you the location and event details once you've signed up.
2) [_**Chip in right now to help us raise $10,000 toward our Women Veterans Leadership Fund,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/YXt4qEbhJh9giRqV3gcZxX94TjL1sAkrAIV4Edzxqo0=) which helps recruit and equip future women veterans to run for Congress and win.

We'll be observing mask-wearing and social distancing at the event to keep everyone safe. But we really can't do this work without you! We hope to see you and [_**appreciate your generous support**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/6-vSmBnL9_A4ylfP-H9KEvkE7F7VA1wXfyiNYrvTldU=) as we work to elect more - MANY more - women veterans and allies to Congress!

Yours in service,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/SPz646ZnRmUSov0JgEgDJyRhs1Ny5W1wB3fM9LlhOG8=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/rT1KKDfY-Y8DaE2jeLagWPonQw8rfF_vJegD4uEDiKo= "https://act.myngp.com/el/rTlvZElgvQ2sWEcYlm7joiVgJZZLnPZZ17i4ngQpZ9A=/rT1KKDfY-Y8DaE2jeLagWPonQw8rfF_vJegD4uEDiKo=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Paid for by Taking the Hill

Thank you, Josh Mandel Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County Republican Party Federal Account.
