name: Michael Bennet
subject: Why running a grassroots campaign is important to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37285301/310625922/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2VhN2FhNy04ZjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp5xmT7KVDyfUHy98oOJKjn05zAYxuUeNgXUhDh23p4=)
Friend, I have yet to meet a single American who believes the problem with our politics is there is not enough money in it. That’s why it’s so important to me that I run a grassroots-driven campaign, and why I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. There’s a reason why D.C. gets a bad reputation, and why Americans’ trust in politicians is at an all time low. Voters can see what’s going on — elected officials take money from corporate special interests, and that money comes with strings. Then these lobbyists and corporations influence politicians to do their bidding. And their bidding often leads to inaction in the form of tough votes never taken, bills we can’t pass despite urgent calls from constituents, and science-based evidence politicians willfully ignore. It’s frustrating to witness and it’s why I'm rejecting corporate special-interest money in favor of talking to my constituents and focusing on improving the lives of everyday Coloradans. It’s high time to tackle the influence of money in politics, and I’ve been working in the Senate to do just that. **Your trust is worth much more to me than any corporate PAC check.** But that means we have to make up our fundraising in other ways in order to compete with Republicans who gladly accept those corporate PAC checks. Which is why I rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $20 dollars at a time in order to run my campaign the right way. It takes a lot of small-dollar donations in order to make up the difference, but that’s the beauty of our campaign: a huge group of supporters standing together can produce just as much power as the large corporations or federal lobbyists. **So, I’m asking you to make one of those contributions today. Please chip in any amount — whatever makes sense for you — to my campaign today.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37285302/310625923/-699711448?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20211008_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2VhN2FhNy04ZjI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fp5xmT7KVDyfUHy98oOJKjn05zAYxuUeNgXUhDh23p4=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, I have yet to meet a single American who believes the problem with our politics is there is not enough money in it. That’s why it’s so important to me that I run a grassroots-driven campaign, and why I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. There’s a reason why D.C. gets a bad reputation, and why Americans’ trust in politicians is at an all time low. Voters can see what’s going on — elected officials take money from corporate special interests, and that money comes with strings. Then these lobbyists and corporations influence politicians to do their bidding. And their bidding often leads to inaction in the form of tough votes never taken, bills we can’t pass despite urgent calls from constituents, and science-based evidence politicians willfully ignore. It’s frustrating to witness and it’s why I'm rejecting corporate special-interest money in favor of talking to my constituents and focusing on improving the lives of everyday Coloradans. It’s high time to tackle the influence of money in politics, and I’ve been working in the Senate to do just that. Your trust is worth much more to me than any corporate PAC check. But that means we have to make up our fundraising in other ways in order to compete with Republicans who gladly accept those corporate PAC checks. Which is why I rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $20 dollars at a time in order to run my campaign the right way. It takes a lot of small-dollar donations in order to make up the difference, but that’s the beauty of our campaign: a huge group of supporters standing together can produce just as much power as the large corporations or federal lobbyists. So, I’m asking you to make one of those contributions today. Please chip in any amount — whatever makes sense for you — to my campaign today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = It’s an honor to work for you and with you. Thanks for being on this team, — Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Karen Bass
subject: How we bring LA together [VIDEO]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022
body:
Let's talk about the "how"
Team --

All eyes are on Los Angeles to see how we rebuild in the face of COVID-19 and once-in-a-generation systemic challenges. We all know the issues facing our city -- homelessness, affordable housing, stagnant wages, obstacles for small businesses, and more. Now it's time to talk about the HOW. **How will we work together to tackle the kitchen table issues we all care about?**

I'm ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work for you as the next mayor of Los Angeles. And I want you to hear directly from me what my plans are for the city we love.

**[Please, take a minute to hear about my plans for Los Angeles, then chip in to support my campaign.](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1nYv42HxCnZWIe1TGcVp2d-4YMsq_lyLWed5A6hKOE=/lCerBnLU_MpJel5f6-rG2nbLcl7o2zHCeU3fk-oc8Zw=?ms=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1nYv42HxCnZWIe1TGcVp2d-4YMsq_lyLWed5A6hKOE=/lCerBnLU_MpJel5f6-rG2nbLcl7o2zHCeU3fk-oc8Zw=?ms=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alimg&refcode=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alimg&source=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alimg&utm_campaign=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alimg&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

It doesn't matter where you live. You deserve a mayor who will show up and work for you, someone who will take this pandemic seriously and who will unapologetically fight for social and economic justice on behalf of all Angelenos -- not just the well-off and well-known.

Since we launched our campaign last week, I've received an outpouring of support from local leaders, activists, and Angelenos who are tired of the status quo. I'm determined to bring community activism straight to the mayor's office, and that means this campaign is funded by and for the people.

**[Rebuilding Los Angeles for everyone will take support from folks in every community. I can't do it alone. Watch my announcement video, then chip in to help me get this campaign off the ground.](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1nYv42HxCnZWIe1TGcVp2d-4YMsq_lyLWed5A6hKOE=/lCerBnLU_MpJel5f6-rG2nbLcl7o2zHCeU3fk-oc8Zw=?ms=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of LA. Thanks to LA's matching funds program, donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1nYv42HxCnZWIe1TGcVp2d-4YMsq_lyLWed5A6hKOE=/lCerBnLU_MpJel5f6-rG2nbLcl7o2zHCeU3fk-oc8Zw=?ms=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alftr&refcode=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alftr&source=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alftr&utm_campaign=em21_211008_vidlch_fvid_gq_act___KB_ettx_alftr&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)

name: Team Jayapal
subject: You’re definitely going to want to see this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, in a few moments, [**we’re going to ask you to chip in any amount toward Pramila’s continued fight in Congress for the Build Back Better Act that makes long-overdue investments in working people, families, and our communities.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211008?refcode=em20211008-707&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=707_420207_D_g8VL&akid=707%2E420207%2ED_g8VL) But before we do, we wanted to highlight what the Huffington Post just said about Pramila and the power of our progressive movement:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211008?refcode=em20211008-707&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=707_420207_D_g8VL&akid=707%2E420207%2ED_g8VL)
> _“Last week, something unusual happened: The Congressional Progressive Caucus won a clear, if temporary, victory against the more conservative members of the House Democratic Caucus._
> _House Speaker Nancy Pelosi (D-Calif.) conceded to pressure from the Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC) on Sept. 30 when she delayed a promised vote on the bipartisan infrastructure bill favored by conservative Democrats._
> _The House’s 96-person progressive bloc, once dismissed as too large and ideologically inchoate to wield real power, had made clear that it had the votes to tank the infrastructure bill, pending firmer guarantees about the passage of the more progressive Build Back Better budget reconciliation package.”_
Pramila first ran for office because she didn’t see enough leaders prioritizing the issues that impacted her community the most — the debilitating cost of health care, a lack of safe and affordable housing, our inhumane immigration system, a failure to support workers and their families, a lack of urgently needed climate action, and the systemic racism that compounds all of these issues.
And together, we built a people-first movement to send her to Congress — backed by small-dollar contributions from supporters just like you, not the corporate interests who already wield far too much power on Capitol Hill. **We did so because we knew Pramila would meet any challenge with the kind of compassionate, people-first leadership her district — and the entire country — deserves. And now, we have a real champion fighting for us in the halls of Congress.**
**[**If you’re still with Pramila in the fight for progressive change that lifts up working people and our communities, can you chip in $3 or any amount right now to fuel her push for President Biden’s Build Back Better Act?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211008?refcode=em20211008-707&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=707_420207_D_g8VL&akid=707%2E420207%2ED_g8VL) _Every dollar puts our movement in a stronger position for the make-or-break work ahead:_**
**[Chip in $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20211008?refcode=em20211008-707&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=707_420207_D_g8VL&akid=707%2E420207%2ED_g8VL)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211008-707-footer&t=24&refcode2=707_420207_D_g8VL&akid=707%2E420207%2ED_g8VL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=707%2E420207%2ED_g8VL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=707%2E420207%2ED_g8VL)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:
Private citizens and law enforcement are hard at work while Biden takes to distance himself. |

| | Dear Friend, As Joe Biden and Kamala Harris continue to totally ignore the crisis at the southern border, Republican Governors like Greg Abbott and Ron DeSantis, patriotic citizens, and our law enforcement have been hard at work trying to keep America secure.

| Without Republican leadership and these brave private citizens who are funding the wall, our border would be even MORE wide open. **We want to say thank you to the conservative leaders who have stepped up and worked together to secure our southern border!** So we’ve put together a card and want to add as many names as possible to show support - so will you add your name to say thanks to these brave Americans?
---

clean_body: Private citizens and law enforcement are hard at work while Biden takes to distance himself. | | | | | Dear Friend, As Joe Biden and Kamala Harris continue to totally ignore the crisis at the southern border, Republican Governors like Greg Abbott and Ron DeSantis, patriotic citizens, and our law enforcement have been hard at work trying to keep America secure. | | | Without Republican leadership and these brave private citizens who are funding the wall, our border would be even MORE wide open. We want to say thank you to the conservative leaders who have stepped up and worked together to secure our southern border! So we’ve put together a card and want to add as many names as possible to show support - so will you add your name to say thanks to these brave Americans? | "SIGN THE CARD AND SAY "THANKS"" | The ongoing border crisis is a direct result of reckless liberal policies. Joe Biden has made it very clear to the world that our borders are open and anyone can come in. Thankfully, we have America First fighters to step up and address the situation despite Biden's incompetence. And with your support, Amanda Makki can work with conservatives across America and take back the House in 2022 and finally fulfill the federal government's obligation to secure the border. | "DONATE $5" | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $100" | "DONATE ANY AMOUNT" | Thank you for joining us, Team Makki | Amanda Makki for Congress| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Amanda Makki, All rights reserved.

Peter,
There is a significant lack of leadership in the White House. We don’t even know if Joe Biden is in charge anymore because he is on vacation 3 out of 7 days of the week!

The border crisis rages on, the withdrawal of Afghanistan is still a national embarrassment, and now Biden's justice department is _**targeting parents who question Critical Race Theory**_.

_**President Trump knew how to lead — Trump's policies put AMERICA FIRST!**_

The lack of leadership skills in the West Wing is frightening. Join our team today as we fight to take back the Senate and take back America. **We can get back to being an America-First nation, but we must _TAKE A STAND!_**
[**HELP US FIGHT BACK >>>**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0bb45c115d2f4b5d9dbc068171b01841&_e=TvpRdeGsk17j_ngAEsq7g6JpMeXhlRNSDy3rEH0RwjrAxW79DeGxKwbSrvs0vKL-c7eLtgkde-bxghR4mGr5dmCn6lu7qK6gVuW1EJ5CxilgvN6l7HGpzU0Qjs1Ip50Zo25Ey_UUMQy2pAtR7sZ1_lqg85zivuhn55hZ0IJHyScUAfQOwxKhZ--a91PDp26PhG1xIWz4KcIIsb38-DCxsYsk81QklBSM44r8Cij1Va3LQp1cfkPwi2iZBMiglvoM6yaQsRe-Ol9ZfedHEBBh5fp1I-vJsKcDmb0mSZ8JIpjfoYV8VCoVeF1l3XuK_sih1DjBnZWDy0TDcWaHubbGmYz6uYfp1YgnLfyaDRwr6hxgOtZoOGbzPCq_2YRGcoCzExMJpdPYcXgcdFbdBJ1QA8gOsFuUKZdlEOw1jyL2ygE%3D)

body:
**OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER** **Katie Britt****Receives****Alabama Farmers
Federation's FarmPAC Endorsement** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGcgYfwPuFp_PjOr6tVwoJQvPpPk8r1Pm8Dxz3pBZiwq9Bi0miv0nz-PT3gfEstONEoNehBnzT5aHLzToO3lQPHO5pSNjOTYtMy_Jq68o4yCjhImNS-QtpbUnVPmHWfa6RVtO0JXQ7nVFd_6L-LLaJzRPMtrbMzEvP-2AF5NKqhLmf5hz_j6e3lNTOzPC24_laBepDEfhcR9Y9HgNyd8twTCdIkhQDssmqZaUHC_ryYoEgg41bcBpANoCJegeLwFTZI%3D) I am proud and excited to announce that the Alabama Farmers Federation's FarmPAC has endorsed our campaign! Alabama’s farmers work tirelessly every day to feed and clothe America, and they are incredible examples of the type of work ethic and patriotism that have made the U.S. the country we know and love. It is clear that our state’s farmers know that I will fight most effectively to defend our Christian conservative values and work to grow opportunity and jobs in every local community in Alabama. [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGcgYfwPuFp_PjOr6tVwoJQvPpPk8r1Pm8Dxz3pBZiwq9Ku1rheNeSHwk1eEjjM4Q-QwUKL_DLKNW7VOPepXFpOeLUALdFzZaPmii7Bm__XNydIIabe5GEvouWhdxbAfR_NQ4gGYBVVDfTTUvlmeFNQn6IiLIu4u_mYj7Px3hHQFRk37OfHWyuN8zMEnPDRcPdXq4pT-KBA9Xu8trIsDJZ81rgeciXmzvOuXzhfOAEBKA3o04nI3CPLA1HOYicQPKIw%3D) **Katie Britt Raises $1.5M In Third Quarter** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGc5AhrzFY1T50PbgwWwrPbtr_213iWuVmlQVobF8YiK6WWg3drlbykZ_8HiLJJa87i-ID2AKX6g1j-E51RDC6B7Kk-qwJhOzjPLef6j1BEWTQ1nWhqavlEaO0-NENcKv7ikJPag-NJlF4K_-cu8SxEmNPJhcu8yZC5dagr0O5Z3XQMzXrmsR1TSwoXpE5Mmd1wN0mXYqn1LHpg4SqdGPXTkEKN2NUfuQcgHBPTTdLSPS6LBzB73LJuXXMU2p4a1rL1uDG7vvYFiHdztbk2GrXkD) Another quarter down, and another big win for [#TeamBritt](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGeX3D3GD8tD48UGg1dVr6pHGdcu55G8vooKE-eX7awldv-qm1JvGP8sigxl6V33RADLj7BLlGzleQf6q-a2f4aMzX2xJkQEvM2zBRAAgl_dVEQ3njnQfSVvofky0MEIrq6DtFZkqlDcNql8ANasiQYpCnRBymuGrIH2U-np7GaAnFcGcPRSx5vhYsLnaSce-BdRknBCHYnSKR26WwT57fF11nFEYwqReKLyUyy6W6NkyCOamwGJ_Ld4d02MpnnsnU_F1cJ_ByKOa_HNx-X50b5VZ_Eg67Ta7O8WJCKKp8G2LR_mvQmDI85vWcwYHxqX_6P1WmJ2Fv3M155rsfn4142fjSPk-fkvp3TA0q1ksH22VzsFU5ATs1I2_Z9z0_xG183ONiviUartXlM9hAMXpAS1g9A0qQfSXvMcqVKh7UwvxMB47nPFf6V_cU25BdS3lClMZNqszwDO3_molCmjrBOCSkmCN0B2nDveY2RbNiun_X4vq5GKzPr3EIDjn-Du_sE%3D)! We are especially proud that 88% of the money we have raised thus far has come from Alabamians, and 95% last quarter came from individuals. This grassroots movement is just getting started! “I am grateful and excited that so many Alabamians are jumping on board our campaign to save the America we know and love,” said Katie Britt. “Our Alabama First message is resonating strongly with hardworking families in every corner of our state who want to protect our Christian conservative values and ensure Alabama always has a seat at the table. The enthusiasm we are seeing firsthand on the campaign trail is incredible, and to have so many people all-in this far out from the election is telling. The people of Alabama are already making it clear that they will elect fresh blood in 2022, and I will work tirelessly every day in the U.S. Senate to make our state proud and to grow good-paying jobs and opportunity for generations to come. Together, we will preserve the American Dream for our children and our children’s children.” [**LIKE AND SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGc5AhrzFY1T50PbgwWwrPbtr_213iWuVmlQVobF8YiK6WWg3drlbykZ_8HiLJJa87hLHw_RMWK4WjkoxvHlLI-Dl1PzVgLdWQ-gC05jzaPsSqXDRH6whHk2Y31G6TbAfUu5QJk7sljMRAk71b7GkXbyUiykSwyJsRj8TH-7rQre05SAOsNfP41U9QhR6x5DiYYjig3EpZDgnfCjXdW_goKYmYqwsmkpHZSQKesUpNXJ8h4X8D_y5TtIAhuTlpmxvxiy0HgLZSUUWDVc_bu6NIFa) **Students For Katie Britt Coalition Launches** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGc5AhrzFY1T50PbgwWwrPbt2t6wig6uHPoQjrJCGd1vGf1XOWm4RXPL9ag7s5-MqR4azxUTunbEgtUDoWf_BWgyRxWbgIxxaYHFSleuL1H-TR8ZtpT37T_usZiv28WljDETkRNTFiWWCFKMW_L9E9bW2SkufxqmED7B060dMVWcNVIUl5d00HtDoTJUXPOPgaB5WRpouPXa1yBYKqvCWT4gof41ZJXckO5PDJnQRjON36UG5lWediO2MpVzvFgBCbcedzzSoNtOPE3LfLbXHFla) We are excited to see the Students for Katie Britt coalition launch! Here’s what founding cochairs Jake Yohn and Caleb Smith said: “The future of our state is on the ballot, and Katie Britt has made it clear she is the right choice at the right time for Alabama. We’re going to prove that Alabama is ready for new blood in 2022. Katie understands that it’s time for the next generation to get off the sidelines in order to preserve the America we know and love for generations to come. The Students for Britt coalition is fired up for much-needed change in Washington, and we know that Katie Britt is the person who will deliver the real results Alabama needs. Anyone interested in joining this fight on behalf of our great state should sign up today. This is a grassroots movement, and we’re just getting started.” Read more about the coalition below: [ **LIKE & SHARE POST**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGc5AhrzFY1T50PbgwWwrPbt2t6wig6uHPoQjrJCGd1vGf1XOWm4RXPL9ag7s5-MqR4OTHcTDa2T69GH_B2lGtgb70TWfJCYtKnV_kjplK5gAeF9l-NoffvSDuWFuYS78dHtKWjW7AfGKBwCYQP9yTp8IC0cIdY_8oZeL-MfmBvrhS8k75oTMr0kyOf95TK3_SYiCF_vfX087D9kqDjUpXa0oy4aN_KQ6LyDVYWFV7CLEAOhgv7EAg3opAMxot6jU9RPUzT0x4sv1dBSgwnm4jsP) **Katie Waves Green Flag At Talladega Superspeedway** [](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGc5AhrzFY1T50PbgwWwrPbtFApJKYSAObO3wyJfQEqYEURQpq7FbiJJQk6igNPdj2CbfBFV1FyzyVhLS7-_belM2y1CLH3WcqgTQMSBrpwYQBxgAhfc93eKBBE7YlH0WS7t43zlA64d2426VJejycE7q8HSkoWrRJho4eI9U_NQhBl0iEV4psWEP6o2YInxWS6ZQS_C8j24kcUgix555sNrHhUSoSaLNKkAnhR3nmQwZBxPdLOep3VLX6Ck7wnc1izDPK2kOHmWJ6ZcpIv3NV0B) What an incredible day! One to check off the bucket list — I had the honor of waving the green flag at [Talladega Superspeedway](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=2e5e21da43e84c8abfb6d4bc3dcdf401&_e=NLO7UZrG7aczcuV_clZxnfFqmcZgNVgbRST8Jn9yxGdAzlfQoKrH7dDBEg0-hGtbL4yWxIIUSoJSuLKC7XcNou1d_S1zS7bFSeksiZKR9uNR3RUOdUwLFCXgICp21KMGvQRSfWGDx7JFsln_5uzOBQ28CN1zPHwZ8l4rajFz7esrVmN4AneTRQCkE5JGUQKt7xyZ37qb1KAwHr3uVQj0fA96ABT_5jhWr0HacPDyM0cVqUjd_kCqiY0m7SslmdVOeAREtulPVEoSlb3Hq-jA6oobZRlszHNZnhZzBxAHqfYLTZxM0IrjEtaIwzJ22xqFUqRqhCkQFij2HqW9Cn4baEKe_ri3CpCNkgMIBY_4EA4jqSqBnJyQojWRak3IUdF1fXAHrJM1Ap80MGOF3tA__-vQE63u3vWiY7H7yH1Vvvrw7uXTrii2cMnMZ4mEN4Wa0WqDWpIsWrwzd29Qy7UKFP3pgkViAuQs04EobjqobKx-iAiO3iLl6y8QGbUzIO1kpQxQeBoMouROR9XBUl8jAA%3D%3D) and visiting with so many tremendous fans who stuck it out, rain or shine, this weekend to make this race so special. clean_body: OFFICIAL BRITT FOR ALABAMA NEWSLETTER Katie BrittReceivesAlabama Farmers Federation's FarmPAC Endorsement I am proud and excited to announce that the Alabama Farmers Federation's FarmPAC has endorsed our campaign! Alabama’s farmers work tirelessly every day to feed and clothe America, and they are incredible examples of the type of work ethic and patriotism that have made the U.S. the country we know and love. It is clear that our state’s farmers know that I will fight most effectively to defend our Christian conservative values and work to grow opportunity and jobs in every local community in Alabama. Katie Britt Raises $1.5M In Third Quarter Another quarter down, and another big win for ! We are especially proud that 88% of the money we have raised thus far has come from Alabamians, and 95% last quarter came from individuals. This grassroots movement is just getting started! “I am grateful and excited that so many Alabamians are jumping on board our campaign to save the America we know and love,” said Katie Britt. “Our Alabama First message is resonating strongly with hardworking families in every corner of our state who want to protect our Christian conservative values and ensure Alabama always has a seat at the table. The enthusiasm we are seeing firsthand on the campaign trail is incredible, and to have so many people all-in this far out from the election is telling. The people of Alabama are already making it clear that they will elect fresh blood in 2022, and I will work tirelessly every day in the U.S. Senate to make our state proud and to grow good-paying jobs and opportunity for generations to come. Together, we will preserve the American Dream for our children and our children’s children.” Students For Katie Britt Coalition Launches We are excited to see the Students for Katie Britt coalition launch! Here’s what founding cochairs Jake Yohn and Caleb Smith said: “The future of our state is on the ballot, and Katie Britt has made it clear she is the right choice at the right time for Alabama. We’re going to prove that Alabama is ready for new blood in 2022. Katie understands that it’s time for the next generation to get off the sidelines in order to preserve the America we know and love for generations to come. The Students for Britt coalition is fired up for much-needed change in Washington, and we know that Katie Britt is the person who will deliver the real results Alabama needs. Anyone interested in joining this fight on behalf of our great state should sign up today. This is a grassroots movement, and we’re just getting started.” Read more about the coalition below: Katie Waves Green Flag At Talladega Superspeedway What an incredible day! One to check off the bucket list — I had the honor of waving the green flag at and visiting with so many tremendous fans who stuck it out, rain or shine, this weekend to make this race so special. Finished the evening visiting with farmers in Macon County. We won’t stop working to get our message out! Follow Katie On Social Media: | | | | ---|---|--- SIGN UP FOR SMS ALERTS: TEXT "KATIE" TO 484848 Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

subject: How does any of this make sense?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE CASTILLO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Let’s break down how the liberals think ... (hint: not logically) Yep, it’s got me scratching my head too. There is no logic when it comes to the Liberal's thinking. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=03a1871b01ba4ecc83a1b9bc0cb1c7fe&_e=3ey0-_X9vaI-0G-GeX8TKZcyrKxRwt6lTn67s_oI2d9Ak31669-xZapBcblHvm2SqBU7b2nElzbDN-SREw9vxS2UJsyNMp1y1eiir4HgFW8IiQ-1MKiod4AbJ3A9w13USGGXhssz7QUDZ1inhgEoXhrR7CuyT03UaOxWpC-zayt8gf392171ugy-QIRFZBn0f0-SndxdSNquGsCSwuYlJM3wXECZACWA4kje4hG9xDKeaRuVfsA7rFWzdAh0PIaAoNidLMnrtcnTblrbCEiJHXqN3AbAzYDB2FmTKkoDmQfnWtH-U7AOoSmb0NQ2iyFBY39R-GnGxTa8q2fIRxhV4KYZJ9sYrIW1d3rzFltpJiCQbHHEHjJ1DdMABKg6TYsefoO4D0wnmRrLvR3hBN_mKULuX8ELAmFNIE-5E5pVXnKBdO34-2XH7iUCHIR3xxDlHCL_jG4p0PCnjk_eSxYbZSv2YmfUL1kd7QbHsMcdPuI%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Let’s break down how the liberals think ...

**Liberal Logic #1:** Unvaccinated illegals can enter through unsecured borders no problem, but Americans face strict COVID protocols when it comes to working, eating, and traveling

**Liberal Logic #2:** How to deal with a border crisis: stop building the wall to secure our borders and stop enforcing immigration laws

**Liberal Logic #3:** Hospitals are understaffed due to COVID so we should fire the unvaccinated staff

**Liberal Logic #4:** Ruthless Taliban are taking over Afghanistan so we should leave the country and leave Americans, our weapons, and innocent people behind

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Weekend update for our team
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

It’s been an important week, and I wanted to pass along an update before the weekend.

On Wednesday, we asked for your help calling on Governor DeSantis to apply for $2.3 billion in federal funding for schools. Yesterday, his administration finally did it.

Your voices made a difference. This is a win for students, parents, and teachers across Florida.

Unfortunately, DeSantis continues to put our children at risk. Yesterday, our department released data showing that COVID-19 cases were up to 2.6 times lower in school districts with mask requirements than those without.

DeSantis is withholding this data because he wants to play politics with the pandemic instead of doing what’s right for our students, teachers, and communities.

We’ve continued to fight back against his dangerous, politicized handling of the COVID-19 crisis. But we need your help to keep the pressure on throughout this campaign.

Team, children and families across Florida can’t afford another four years of Ron DeSantis. If you’re with us on this, click here to chip in before the weekend and help power our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-oct-21?refcode=108nf]

For so many of us, these fights are personal. DeSantis will sacrifice the safety and best interests of our kids for political gain. Every single child in Florida deserves better.

Thanks for being with us in the fight.

Warmly,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

body:
Friends, Democrat Secretary of State Katie Hobbs continues her radical proposals to forever alter election laws in Arizona in direct defiance of the Supreme Court’s ruling in __Brnovich v. DNC__. **_This is just flat wrong._**
First, Democrats tried to overturn Arizona’s ban on ballot harvesting and allow out of precinct voting. Now, they’re attempting to tilt future elections into their column. [**Demand Dems follow election laws >>>**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=a4e744a3cfff4c7ebd696414cf65b289&_e=eNhi4bQD1Vxt5wujUhztJcsUrwLgEyyHnM104tuLXJwk8RAVYJMw-EFr12ZPgf-tLSWBy5gC4cCnOwOZylkqupSzI_aC8mxl7PhOF6QWBoZTar_DO0lQeZ_KoQCFI0hnq67DPW-OvmCXoraqACJsl3RbTTCkcZbKOQaCOZVwbUDIHGiOyF2wnLcaEbdLcjg6HDHinRJtwOmRFQAmV85ZbnyBXQ5YnpNljxfXlIKR35xjATReJCcULwHC__9ABlUV04rwWFfWX7NTW1Geqyw5isaYJBd1C_piGHWrP2ityqmWSzmVGOeQ0AX3b19zvdTL-_eTqfoLpeBAqRp6vwMt81kVR6kAONL5wkB9Gas3kuLv_53unJDPHVE1oxQ0-cW0YKpUrWO4nvqeAr6JMebuEDp3zFKJIawzW6iBl5aLhygxQd3YLes0ObqChRMPXAhqi9Kz4ii6F0lSsSNsXc9snY51KKOWhudMEFU76IfAGMA%3D) As your next Attorney General, I’ll enforce Arizona’s election laws and stop Democrats like Katie Hobbs when they try to subvert them.**I will prosecute voter fraud to the fullest extent of the law.**

clean_body: Friends, Democrat Secretary of State Katie Hobbs continues her radical proposals to forever alter election laws in Arizona in direct defiance of the Supreme Court’s ruling in Brnovich v. DNC. This is just flat wrong. First, Democrats tried to overturn Arizona’s ban on ballot harvesting and allow out of precinct voting. Now, they’re attempting to tilt future elections into their column. As your next Attorney General, I’ll enforce Arizona’s election laws and stop Democrats like Katie Hobbs when they try to subvert them.I will prosecute voter fraud to the fullest extent of the law. Too often, these crimes are either ignored or float by with a simple slap on the wrist. I will ensure those violating election laws are held accountable to the full extent of the law. It’s time that conservatives across the state stand up for election integrity before it’s too late. Will you join me in this crucial battle impacting all Arizonans? Thank you for your continued support, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Facebook Just Banned Action 4 Liberty
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_banned_a4l&n=1)
---
October 8th, 2021
## Facebook Just Banned Action 4 Liberty
The Facebook Authoritarians [unpublished and banned our popular Action 4 Liberty page](https://www.action4liberty.com/facebook_unpublished_and_banned_action_4_liberty_page?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_banned_a4l&n=2) this afternoon, citing a violation against their **Communist Standards** on "graphic violence" - despite not providing details of the alleged violation. There were only two posts submitted today. One was a meme of Bill Murray saying "So, if we lie to the government, it's a felony. If they lie to us, it's politics" and an article from the Daily Caller entitled "Vaccine Mandate Enforcement Threatens To Create A Second Economic Crisis". Action 4 Liberty posts a lot about fighting against vaccine mandates, which Facebook recently announced it would crack down on. In August, one of our **Stop Vaccine Mandates** ads was taken down by Facebook that had the potential of reaching one million Minnesotans. Over the last couple years, we've spent over **$50,000 in ads** on Facebook to alert voters about important political issues at the Capitol or in their communities. This ban, which likely could be permanent, will interfere with our supporters ability to hear an alternative to the mainstream, COVID narrative. We suspect that's the motivation behind the move. No one will stop us from doing what we do though. Whether it's the State Fair taking down our "King Walz" sign or a bunch of woke, tech authoritarians in Silicon Valley, Action 4 Liberty will continue leading this fight to protect your liberty. **Our field team is out doorknocking** right now to Stop Vaccine Mandates in Minnesota. The mission continues! **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_banned_a4l&n=3 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_banned_a4l&n=3)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_banned_a4l&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_banned_a4l&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_banned_a4l&n=6), software for leaders.

name: Wes Gobar, Evergreen Action
subject: Personal, powerful, urgent, popular
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
You need to read or watch this.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3914?t=3&akid=12590%2E53494%2EKy-BhD) Friend, Yesterday, I was proud to stand with Senators Ed Markey, Tina Smith, Ron Wyden, and Chris Van Hollen—as well as Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr. from the Hip Hop Caucus and Nikayla Jefferson from the Sunrise Movement—on the steps of the Capitol. Together, we each spoke to the critical importance of a simple message: **No climate, no deal.** The stories we told were personal and powerful. The solutions we proposed are urgent and popular. [**_And at this make-or-break moment, I'm asking you to watch clips from this rally and share them with your communities on social media today. (Really, that's actually me below, flanked by Senators Smith, Markey, and Van Hollen!)_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3914?t=4&akid=12590%2E53494%2EKy-BhD) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3914?t=5&akid=12590%2E53494%2EKy-BhD) | [SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3915?t=6&akid=12590%2E53494%2EKy-BhD)
---

[SHARE ON INSTAGRAM](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3916?t=7&akid=12590%2E53494%2EKy-BhD)
---

[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3917?t=8&akid=12590%2E53494%2EKy-BhD)
---
Here's my personal story:
Earlier this summer, when it seemed like bipartisan negotiations threatened our climate negotiations, dozens of members of Congress stood up to say no climate, no deal—including these four senators, who have proven themselves climate champions.
There's no second chance to deliver on Biden's climate agenda. **And any deal that doesn't fully fund climate is a raw deal for our communities.**
Personally, I'm thinking of my own community in Virginia. Our coast is flooding. Entire neighborhoods are underwater and will soon be uninhabitable.
But it doesn't matter where you are in the U.S. The climate crisis is here. One in every three Americans experienced a climate disaster this summer alone. You or someone you know has been affected by the climate crisis.
For Black communities especially, these investments are life and death. From Hurricane Katrina to Hurricane Ida, we are sick and tired of the same communities being left behind after climate disasters.
We need the Clean Electricity Performance Program, clean energy tax credits, and so much more in order to put the U.S. on a path to cut pollution in half by 2030. These are investments in jobs and justice that will finally put Black, brown, and poor communities at the heart of a thriving clean energy economy—not just on the frontlines of the climate crisis.
When Biden faces world leaders in Glasgow at COP26 at the end of the month, they won't ask him if he built roads and bridges with Republican votes. They will ask him if he met his climate commitments.
And when Biden gets home, he'll have to answer to communities like mine in Virginia, too.
This bill is the climate agenda that the public overwhelmingly wants—and now we just need to summon the public will to get it over the finish line.
**So let's make sure that Biden can tell the world we passed a damn good bill.**
[**_Share my story and those of Senators Ed Markey, Ron Wyden, Chris Van Hollen, and Tina Smith, Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr., and Nikayla Jefferson with your friends and family today. Let's rally some hearts and minds around this make-or-break moment._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3914?t=9&akid=12590%2E53494%2EKy-BhD)
No climate, no deal,
Wes Gobar
Coalitions Lead, Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=12590%2E53494%2EKy-BhD).Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible.| PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

clean_body: You need to read or watch this. | Friend, Yesterday, I was proud to stand with Senators Ed Markey, Tina Smith, Ron Wyden, and Chris Van Hollen—as well as Rev. Lennox Yearwood Jr. from the Hip Hop Caucus and Nikayla Jefferson from the Sunrise Movement—on the steps of the Capitol. Together, we each spoke to the critical importance of a simple message: No climate, no deal. The stories we told were personal and powerful. The solutions we proposed are urgent and popular. | Here's my personal story: Earlier this summer, when it seemed like bipartisan negotiations threatened our climate negotiations, dozens of members of Congress stood up to say no climate, no deal—including these four senators, who have proven themselves climate champions. There's no second chance to deliver on Biden's climate agenda. And any deal that doesn't fully fund climate is a raw deal for our communities. Personally, I'm thinking of my own community in Virginia. Our coast is flooding. Entire neighborhoods are underwater and will soon be uninhabitable. But it doesn't matter where you are in the U.S. The climate crisis is here. One in every three Americans experienced a climate disaster this summer alone. You or someone you know has been affected by the climate crisis. For Black communities especially, these investments are life and death. From Hurricane Katrina to Hurricane Ida, we are sick and tired of the same communities being left behind after climate disasters. We need the Clean Electricity Performance Program, clean energy tax credits, and so much more in order to put the U.S. on a path to cut pollution in half by 2030. These are investments in jobs and justice that will finally put Black, brown, and poor communities at the heart of a thriving clean energy economy—not just on the frontlines of the climate crisis. When Biden faces world leaders in Glasgow at COP26 at the end of the month, they won't ask him if he built roads and bridges with Republican votes. They will ask him if he met his climate commitments. And when Biden gets home, he'll have to answer to communities like mine in Virginia, too. This bill is the climate agenda that the public overwhelmingly wants—and now we just need to summon the public will to get it over the finish line. So let's make sure that Biden can tell the world we passed a damn good bill. No climate, no deal, Wes Gobar Coalitions Lead, Evergreen Action

name: John Fetterman
subject: One quick action to keep PA union strong »
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let’s use the power of our campaign to stand in solidarity with striking workers.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211008-2944-header&t=1&akid=2944%2E434096%2EAsA_kR)
Hey Peter — if you’re able, I’m asking for your support for this amazing union, during a challenging time, as they stand up for what’s right. 🇺🇸
[**Our BCTGM Local 374G, from the Kellogg’s plant in Lancaster, PA, are currently on the picket lines and are asking for our support and solidarity:**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=2&akid=2944%2E434096%2EAsA_kR)
[****](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=3&akid=2944%2E434096%2EAsA_kR)
The union way of life is sacred, and we should *always* protect it. Weekends, the eight-hour workday, benefits — we have all that thanks to unions and the centuries-long labor movement that built this nation.
[**That’s why I’m respectfully asking you to please chip in and support BCTGM Local 374G as they strike for a fair contract.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=4&akid=2944%2E434096%2EAsA_kR)
**[Support the Strike Fund »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32626?t=5&akid=2944%2E434096%2EAsA_kR)**
In the face of unprecedented attacks on workers and the right to form a union, we must support our unions and pass the PRO Act — a crucial piece of legislation to put power back into the hands of workers, strengthen our unions, and expand the union way of life for all workers across America.
Thank you for helping Pennsylvania stay #UnionStrong.
In solidarity,
John

John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211008-2944-footer&t=6&refcode2=2944_434096_AsA_kR&akid=2944%2E434096%2EAsA_kR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2944%2E434096%2EAsA_kR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2944%2E434096%2EAsA_kR)

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, With the crisis at the border, Democrats trying to spend America into oblivion, inflation continuing to rise, and a continually underperforming job market, now more than ever we need a grassroots, America First U.S. Senator in Ohio who will fight for you and your family. That’s why Jane works so hard, week in and week out, to earn your vote to be your voice in Washington. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Jane Timken Proves She is Ohio's Grassroots Candidate with Over 3,200 Donors Statewide** This week the campaign announced our third quarter fundraising haul of over $1.7 million, with more than $3.1 million cash on hand. Our robust statewide network of support counts **3,200 donors** across the state for the race, including **1,200 Ohio donors** in this quarter alone. Jane is running for Ohio, in Ohio, supported by Ohioans. With 90% of our third quarter support coming from Ohioans and 80% for the entire campaign, our latest report proves that Jane is Ohio’s grassroots candidate in this race. **From The Trail** On Monday, Jane visited Holmes County for a meet and greet with new and old supporters. Jane shared her vision for the U.S. Senate and had a great discussion and questions about the issues at the forefront of voters’ minds. On Tuesday, Jane joined the Republican Club of Scioto County for their Reagan Day Dinner. The Party of Lincoln and Reagan is alive and well and dinner was brought in by Portsmouth institution The Scioto Ribber. Delicious! **Jane Timken on War Room** Jane joined Steve Bannon’s War Room: Pandemic in studio this week to talk about her America First campaign for U.S. Senate. [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f28a79369f754e26a0a333d240917a96&_e=m5UBEi3I2zEMpSSetXbEsRlHtCkAAXvcSK66raGKFp8wkjk6sSvcPznqFDgphkjvSe6R0dLmWz6KaJGaNOHqa3qnNHmb3P4DF3cfy7aZf6UGb4NtbbHdz18kUQBSvwqXOsipplEoBU8xKPivDhKlqM86TT2JDHlGNtwgvyiv2oc4CtMgwDCNvE3PpXWM2QxDnf7v7oOIliztJJRqdISz7Un3RX-IbM5kzU6Cch8QW1w0xQpk-MBk81pJXZLZ3E7T2tStIgLSLTecY6A52gv2HLQ9HbUD8g0Q9sAr3ovwqWECBEAA0Slr6qYH5GG_7WKL) Now more than ever, leadership matters. We need leaders like Jane that will stand up for our country, not cower and cave to the Democrats. Click the image above and check out the full interview! **Join the Team!** Our campaign has the best grassroots operation in the state, if not the country! With over 500,000 voter contacts so far this year, we aren’t slowing down and we aren’t quitting. If you or someone you know wants to volunteer or intern for the campaign, [fill out the application here](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f28a79369f754e26a0a333d240917a96&_e=m5UBEi3I2zEMpSSetXbEsXq3yx15aVP-J1p6D1ZMLEa8wDmRi6UJMuXd8cpDJcUie2rJ9zRq_a5zWFAFLc0YUbSAIq4xikDteuESJVku7jVJNjwu6UVPvI2r_Jgr6__931OJHGVJ0M1gs-_v6lI_r1zM8gv0IpWjtdCpk9PLSu5pvSkQnJLEqullEfmz7WaZvqJEKPecUwLQWVgyFJIUlgNSRFeswgaunKXReRFvQeecwAgf35JChVI6VA-cFnyEu4_LXmTkUdlgSY5SYIJSp0UkMddsMTMt2Bt-R-r5reb5cPaMyeJ_fMxpwxmX3Ct9Z0LLlwqgp2ixbYh7w3hOWjYUEVXNQh9vODNWVf5pzKM%3D) and one of our great field directors will be in contact shortly. I hope everyone has a great weekend. Sincerely, Rob Secaur Campaign Manager Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_s=f28a79369f754e26a0a333d240917a96&_t=jFUWOklAzQMBmUt-p-LVkEF6YJ3yc9fH8ZdQcWaj_X-7RlUcemQLnrvBpULs5Rsujo2r7WAXqTczqtKCp5r3D5RtNOPMprTrgNSuzZNURl3-4dS5JHPZGffpZ5huEvT344WxUh1PvEe15-hxWTALH6hmBJ_5bjE4Sc5EVsSoKdU%3D) | | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f28a79369f754e26a0a333d240917a96&_e=m5UBEi3I2zEMpSSetXbEsZyhG8_vyE2JIk1xTYy6bCB31d5yukdxv_TvZrB-jxqXeKfrvGqXPU-XQDNKDL9D5D09sS93lh2kICd2t_WlZWkbK-WsyMAGxCS3dFGhgm4zdmKuo_vGcqiduYBIkEqo8swlFK2beFW2roXCkG_85hyGs__MxVOfLJy-9HfLz7o5TzhSOyhJaRgvzjNsWO4QJkWiGpNQPw1SGCbkrC3ReuYTHi3FLW-lUppCIkL63haDcuU5JgX3hA4w4iV81l-Rr3AX7kmZX6AiTXLD-kTkI8Q%3D) | [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=f28a79369f754e26a0a333d240917a96&_e=ROIu6xUhrup9aEAViXZ2fr7K4oqRnpLwsZiJVUAhBZk_arEwISuj5DIvh3rl1PoeuFosobRiBxHRepAx-uU0kwHaCoRpzvAo5H_RtAu0bYdDiiygynjebmwOc1Wj4MB_AWck1HCkB2c0nqGNZJun8F5ylwYkUKOiCa4r0ZjA5cyL7grM2uze4FUXa_zcMCqfGiCpkov0pvQ1Qmfs67w6cfQOy635tkny0F7HEexyvaMOWcXW0RdAEYp6iu3eBVwP0a8DZJPHyijtRUiQAUcFtA%3D%3D)

body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XjSiRDHD-31LLAC8Jf5wQ-G-eyPVcVl1FdpvWDDOog6hbHQbu19HR3BezWkcyEy6AZQIOaYs1K8JZRHkmFYwugSOkkje7lpOdu_TjnfP_UVmmxqFwc09ho3gzya1QL95mQ4xDVJ8mLXEuiyXKqZeBZcjXl9HwE5ps-nyfbE1TSphyzTrfgvpxyRKHmx4uTVOescHOMcq6ZVuqHwOeDBn9awS0xmhDofOrviQ5d8zw41kX90ZbZ9VNhnNjHJJ93-vqeKdEkYMCsYyCW94L0EN8-XP7l8TY4_44gePzPy_2trbzDm5vVO3Gte6f9tkATf5FQ/3fz/hyqYac4DTiqEmmYn_hqSig/h0/PlTy897ZAYrkfpe6T3mnRPfUE9GgubYVkhVgR2j-4kA)
Derek, I’m going to try and be as civil as I can about this.

Millionaire Republican J.D. Vance launched his campaign for Senate. You know as well as I do -- a guy who calls affordable childcare “class war against normal people” doesn’t belong anywhere near the Senate.

We can’t let his announcement derail us from expanding our Democratic majority -- political experts say that Ohio’s open Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip.

[**Our grassroots team CAN win, but only with the resources to stay strong in what will be one of the most competitive and expensive races of 2022 -- can I count on you to be one of the 345 supporters we need to split a contribution between my campaign and Common Good of $25 or more by midnight tonight?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xt8M-38eWkJTM0YXplrKN-HdqBOc4v0wsuB6HSRusygYdb0px0oZ52c9ylDwPmAW087L1GVsZKf_Ab75XUhZq1qidGD1VJGJ6mMkRwOElU-zRGaCuu_0JBMt3r_oY14jfkzLJZSn5kp3G1i8XAaT-Je_nmzz8uQzSYEn_4Kq_vR4iR-RD4EBbmpkCKE8sZPiqnjChKTIRELiRKbvUuQlquSDImO0WbWe81LctEG3AB8H-UnKI_whPJSJTfKANByGSDspePV7gIHryl0bK6jSpCwiI7h-t6lDsUz8iMoKCe169JjUeYJ0yR7G-dw4buGsoKpcTqypW26rNbZMZg8b4N8/3fz/hyqYac4DTiqEmmYn_hqSig/h1/8JIaq_I93AFr0kYxD6BV0AN7x1LnTNQH6o0dU3PasH4) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XjSiRDHD-31LLAC8Jf5wQ-Ed4njb_HrsfSqUzb8-j7NrTRLEou2s2-IP2BGRSUPUeosrRGGOvZr6uFD95O5lEzwKJ3pPFVsu0whn1WBf5qTrg6rHwVVEhWcDjCjbYtPU5kpABplLoHGofYDqoTdV_bIYtXrOQ1rqc2N9ytDJRshP0Pkc0wmnR4RXUSICtrfN_wavOaZ5RqQot8P4PLUmY-FcFRM9pRQE8rGQBFJBGIqQkKJN6YofoROxRUkNPBbKVaU5yYyY9mvlu0YrTkE4aVyVlLUC6ocZru-k1F3bpwxoLufkhiZDDcFruy-PBWFuaw/3fz/hyqYac4DTiqEmmYn_hqSig/h2/lQTytcTUxy3d4Hr74iZJrD1A-y64JvkhvrMkRFpYJdc)

Vance doesn’t have a clue about the needs of hardworking Americans, but what he DOES have is the full backing of Trump’s billionaire friends and a Republican Super PAC with over $10 million at its disposal.

I won’t let Vance shift the conversation away from everyday Ohioans and their needs. I’m here to run a campaign that is 100% focused on putting workers front and center. **But I need your help to make sure that we’re the loudest voice in the room --[pitch in now to help get our message out and organize across the state!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7XjSiRDHD-31LLAC8Jf5wQ-HXdI2vwjfXyxT7sb8oQFuCl0ZGrVwxzUS9I4-jpy_qos27TLCbRaU62f1NO0L1S1rCEv3ooa43vLOM1RO8bm662WiDi0SvHYGrs9oe507qDCfogNkF9JjKglG1-8E_3FCliarXDvd_zadYDvCK4TOnmbZkXiewRBTlkh9OSpzXutjU07h-Bc6cJUFnmO82W_B13-UiPcQ_dDY_D4En0V16V3XIeEsBYshkUEQNf87leHdomCwfiM50tJh-v9vgwSEGVAaf5LT-N1r34cZG8iyMs5CA4XLAs5X0djslVnNCmQ/3fz/hyqYac4DTiqEmmYn_hqSig/h3/DftUGA9IfHe9MjTFRUgtlZ97q1HuGEojiss3_oVLloI)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Countering the Misinformation about My Busy Week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
As you likely heard reported by the media, this week while serving as Acting Governor, I issued an Executive Order... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/campaign-update-10-08-21?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b978817840&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Dear Friends,
---
| As you likely heard reported by the media, this week while serving as Acting Governor, I issued an Executive Order aimed at protecting individual Liberty. This EO prevented state entities, including public schools and universities, from conditioning access on vaccination status or producing proof of a negative covid test. It is not the proper role of government to monitor people's health. I trust you as an individual to take the necessary and proper precautions that make sense for your personal situation. Unsurprisingly, Gov. Little didn't like my Executive Order. He wants his state agencies to be able to demand proof of a negative covid test and to slam their doors in the face of those individuals who prefer not to comply. Rather than admit his real reasoning, however, Little tried to argue that I didn't have the authority to issue an Executive Order. Perhaps he needs to reread our state constitution. Article IV, Section 12 of the Idaho Constitution is clear. It reads as follows: "LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR TO ACT AS GOVERNOR. In case of the failure to qualify, the impeachment, or conviction of treason, felony, or other infamous crime of the governor, or his death, removal from office, resignation, absence from the state, or inability to discharge the powers and duties of his office, the powers, duties and emoluments of the office for the residue of the term, or until the disability shall cease, shall devolve upon the lieutenant governor." Let's focus on the relevant portions here: "In case of ... absence from the state ... the powers, duties and emoluments of the office for the residue of the term, or until the disability shall cease, shall devolve upon the lieutenant governor." Idaho Code Section 67-805A(2) is even more explicit. "In case of temporary inability to perform his duties, or in the case of his temporary absence from the state, the lieutenant governor shall perform such duties as acting governor until the disability is removed, or until the governor returns to the state." Is anyone confused? When Gov. Little has a "temporary absence from the state," it is my duty and responsibility to "perform such duties as acting governor" "until the governor returns to the state." That's exactly what I did.
---
|
---
|
## Idaho National Guard
---
| The mainstream media also claimed this week that I tried to deploy the National Guard. This is simply untrue. The backstory here is that I have been actively inquiring about immigration and border security since early July. I have repeatedly reached out to the governor's office in an effort to find meaningful solutions to the ongoing border crisis. I did not deploy or call for the deployment of the National Guard. I sent a letter to the Adjutant General inquiring about the process for deployment, should such a step be necessary. As Acting Governor, It is important that I understand all aspects of the job so that I can properly serve the people of Idaho. Interestingly, it was the Governor's office that chose to bring national attention to this issue be leaking my direct email to the Adjutant General to the media.
---
|
---
|
## The Passing of Pete Coulson
---
| It is with great sadness I inform you that our friend, Education Task Force member, and great American Patriot Pete Coulson has passed away. I am deeply saddened by this news. Everyone who knew Pete loved him. He will be greatly missed. Please keep his family in your prayers.
---
|
---
|
---
|
## Campaign Update
---
| In addition to everything else happening this week, I had some interviews and I was able to spend time meeting with Idahoans and listening to their concerns. On Wednesday, I was on the Kevin Miller Show discussing the border and what steps we need to take to secure it. You can listen to the interview [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=fb8698c4ad&e=823fa8e224). Also, on Wednesday, I spoke with Stephanie Hamill on OAN about education in Idaho. You can watch that interview [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=c2a34107b0&e=823fa8e224). On Thursday, I had two separate interviews with Newsmax, which you can watch [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b4ef18ad4e&e=823fa8e224) and [**HERE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=4c71036510&e=823fa8e224). The best part about campaigning is getting out and meeting face-to-face with Idahoans! On Sunday, I went to church at the Capitol church with Marty and Rachel Flichel. I was given a tour of the Dress for Success facilities and got to hear more about the program. Monday was the Ada County Volunteer Pizza Party where I met with a full house of supporters who wanted to get involved with the campaign. On Tuesday, we had a Meet and Greet with business owners in Garden City to discuss the issues they have faced over the course of the pandemic. The Ada County Lincoln Day was on Wednesday. I was honored to lead the crowd in saying the Pledge of Allegiance. Also on Wednesday, I had the privilege of attending the ribbon cutting ceremony for the Adult & Teen Challenge facility in Twin Falls. This new facility will be able to serve up to 24 women. Congratulations to all who have helped to make this a success! On Thursday, we met with a group of 100 conservative women to discuss our campaign platform and goals.
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
## We Must Push Back
---
| Across our state, the moderates and leftists are coming together to oppose conservatives who believe in individual liberty and personal choice. It's at the point where some so-called Republicans are actually encouraging Democrats to lie and register as Republicans in order to vote for leftists in the Republican Primary. Idaho is at a critical juncture in its history. The choices we make today will determine our trajectory for years to come. Conservatives must come together to defeat the anti-freedom crusaders who are operating fraudulently under the Republican banner. I'm running for Idaho Governor as a consistent, principled conservative because I want to **_Make Idaho Free Again!_** We must restore the principles of individual liberty, state sovereignty, and traditional conservative values. I strongly believe in these foundational principles and I know that you believe in them too. Will you help push back against the moderates and leftists who are working to undermine Idaho's conservative values?
---
| [Help us push back!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=62fa673873&e=823fa8e224 "Help us push back!")
---
| Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=9b7414e630&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=17c38fd244&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=6885ace848&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e9e1452c15&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=31195aa013&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.

body:
CNN is already calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, The Cook Political Report downgraded my chances of defending this seat, and now this new poll has me 2 points behind my extremist opponent.
#
Team, **a brand-new poll shows me 2 POINTS behind my Trump-endorsed opponent.**
And now, I'm about to fall short of my make-or-break midnight fundraising goal. I have _nowhere_ else to turn, and Senator Rosen suggested I reach out to you, **[so I'm urgently asking you to split $5 before tonight’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37287968/310652254/142162327?refcode=jr_em_nd_211008_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjNlYjhlZi05ZDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec60F8YjPOC-dwbkpgANRXLXGR_WL-xVzvXROlUwlBU=)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37287969/310652255/142162327?refcode=jr_em_nd_211008_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjNlYjhlZi05ZDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec60F8YjPOC-dwbkpgANRXLXGR_WL-xVzvXROlUwlBU=)**
This news couldn't have come at a worse time: CNN is already calling me one of the _most vulnerable senators_ in the country, The Cook Political Report _downgraded_ my chances of defending this seat, and now this new poll has me 2 points behind my extremist opponent
**The GOP only needs ONE seat to flip the Senate -- and it's clear they've got their sights set on Nevada.** GOP outside groups have poured more than $1 million into attack ads to defeat me -- and this new poll shows their efforts could be working.
I cannot afford to lose any more ground, team, and Democrats cannot afford to lose in Nevada -- not with Senate control hinging on my race. This poll is still within the margin of error, so I can turn this around, but it needs to happen now. That's why I'm counting on your immediate grassroots support to make it possible:
**[Please, will you split $5 or more to my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help us defend the Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37287970/310652256/142162327?refcode=jr_em_nd_211008_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjNlYjhlZi05ZDI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ec60F8YjPOC-dwbkpgANRXLXGR_WL-xVzvXROlUwlBU=)**
I truly can't do this without you. Thank you so much for giving what you can at this critical moment.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine Cortez Masto

name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: The Texas Senate's latest attempt to restrict voting rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

If there's one thing we can say about the Texas GOP, it's this: They're
consistent.

Rather than focusing on fixing our power grid or protecting Texans from
the COVID-19 pandemic, Governor Abbott and the GOP-led state legislature
have been singularly focused on suppressing the rights of Texans this
year.

Last month, Governor Abbott signed one of the most extreme voter
suppression bills in the country, SB 1, into law. Now, the Texas Senate is
attempting to restrict voting even further after former President Donald
Trump asked for an investigation into the 2020 election in Texas — and
let's be clear: The Texas Secretary of State's Office declared the 2020
election as "safe and secure."

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47033?refcode=ema20211008-157302&t=1001&akid=157302%2E444211%2E4Mvl0C ]The Texas Tribune Headline

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47033?refcode=ema20211008-157302&t=1002&akid=157302%2E444211%2E4Mvl0C ]For
months Powered by People has been doing the work day-in and day-out to
fight against voter suppression and register new Texas voters. And no
matter what Republicans throw at us, we'll continue doing that work.
Please donate $3 or more today to help our volunteers
continue fighting for our democracy on all fronts.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47033?refcode=ema20211008-157302&amount=3&t=1021&akid=157302%2E444211%2E4Mvl0C ]Contribute $3

While Texas Republicans are trying to take away Texans' votes, Powered by
People is building an inclusive democracy. Our volunteers are registering
new voters and encouraging others in their communities to become Volunteer
Deputy Registrars so that they can do the same.

Defeating bad actors in Texas isn't going to be easy — it will take a
multi-year effort centered around community organizing and voter
registration. That's why Powered by People is doing the work now, with
just over a year to go until the next statewide election.

Your
support allows Powered by People to bring more people into our democracy
so that we can build a better, more responsive government and elect
leaders that truly represent the people of Texas. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/47033?refcode=ema20211008-157302&t=1022&akid=157302%2E444211%2E4Mvl0C ]Will you chip in
$3 or more to support our work to register new voters,
fight against voter suppression, and protect our democracy?

Thank you for your support,

Powered by People

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Stand with Florida to secure our border!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Time to close the border |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=083df6e073&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Our Southern border is WIDE OPEN and Biden is rolling out the welcome mat to hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants.

_Florida is fighting back. I'm asking you to help me join the fight!_

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to take back Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=aa7c05c3a1&e=afa21b7626), in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto, a Democrat who believes in open borders!**

Just last week, over 12,000 Haitians made their way over 2000 miles from Haiti to Texas.

Why are these people coming? Because Biden is trying to break American immigration law and change voting patterns by illegal immigration.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=43362d3099&e=afa21b7626)
---
| It's not about hating immigrants for me. I married a LEGAL immigrant. But, as Gov. DeSantis said, this situation is a public safety danger.

This from his own website:

_“We’ve got to take every effort we can to make sure that we’re protecting the people of Florida, and that’s what we’re doing here today,” DeSantis said at a press conference in Fort Myers, where he also announced the state is suing President Joe Biden’s administration over its immigration practices.

DeSantis also tapped former North Florida U.S. Attorney Larry Keefe to be the state’s “public safety czar,” a position whose responsibilities include carrying out the governor’s new executive order, lobbying the Legislature and advising the governor on “relevant issues.” His annual salary was not immediately disclosed.

The actions in Florida on Tuesday come as the situation at the U.S-Mexico border gets national attention amid a surge in border crossings and as immigration becomes a key issue heading into the 2022 midterm elections.

DeSantis’ executive order comes after Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas said between 10,000 and 12,000 Haitians were released into the U.S. until their pending asylum cases are heard by an immigration judge.

Another 5,000 Haitians are being processed by DHS and 3,000 Haitians are in detention. About 4,000 Haitians were deported by plane between September 19 and September 27, according to DHS statistics._

I applaud Gov. DeSantis. He is using what power he has to resist Biden's incompetence and destruction.

**But that's not enough. The Federal government shouldn't be doing very much, but guarding our borders is one thing we must do better!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=330094b28d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Biden would rather spread false claims about our brave Border Patrol, than fix the broken border. That's the truth.**

Biden can't get anything right. DeSantis gets everything right. We need to bring Florida's America First policies to DC!

I need to defeat Darren Soto to get there. He's a big open borders Biden cheerleader. Help me beat him!

_I will stand up for America against Biden. Darren Soto will not._

clean_body: Time to close the border | | | | Hi Peter, Our Southern border is WIDE OPEN and Biden is rolling out the welcome mat to hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants. Florida is fighting back. I'm asking you to help me join the fight! My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet , in the Orlando area. It's currently held by Darren Soto, a Democrat who believes in open borders! Just last week, over 12,000 Haitians made their way over 2000 miles from Haiti to Texas. Why are these people coming? Because Biden is trying to break American immigration law and change voting patterns by illegal immigration. | | It's not about hating immigrants for me. I married a LEGAL immigrant. But, as Gov. DeSantis said, this situation is a public safety danger. This from his own website: “We’ve got to take every effort we can to make sure that we’re protecting the people of Florida, and that’s what we’re doing here today,” DeSantis said at a press conference in Fort Myers, where he also announced the state is suing President Joe Biden’s administration over its immigration practices. DeSantis also tapped former North Florida U.S. Attorney Larry Keefe to be the state’s “public safety czar,” a position whose responsibilities include carrying out the governor’s new executive order, lobbying the Legislature and advising the governor on “relevant issues.” His annual salary was not immediately disclosed. The actions in Florida on Tuesday come as the situation at the U.S-Mexico border gets national attention amid a surge in border crossings and as immigration becomes a key issue heading into the 2022 midterm elections. DeSantis’ executive order comes after Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas said between 10,000 and 12,000 Haitians were released into the U.S. until their pending asylum cases are heard by an immigration judge. Another 5,000 Haitians are being processed by DHS and 3,000 Haitians are in detention. About 4,000 Haitians were deported by plane between September 19 and September 27, according to DHS statistics. I applaud Gov. DeSantis. He is using what power he has to resist Biden's incompetence and destruction. But that's not enough. The Federal government shouldn't be doing very much, but guarding our borders is one thing we must do better! | | Biden would rather spread false claims about our brave Border Patrol, than fix the broken border. That's the truth. Biden can't get anything right. DeSantis gets everything right. We need to bring Florida's America First policies to DC! I need to defeat Darren Soto to get there. name: Team AOC
subject: Infrastructure, reconciliation, and holding the line: Explained
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Let’s catch up on the infrastructure bill and the reconciliation bill.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211008-2580-header&t=1&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk)
The media coverage of the infrastructure bill and the ‘reconciliation bill’ before Congress can be a bit confusing and mystifying. (What does reconciliation even mean?!). **We’re going to catch you up in this email below.**
**It’s a longer read, but it’s important to understand this transformative moment we’re in.**
It all began in May when President Biden put forth an ambitious set of proposals known as the Build Back Better Agenda, designed to help our country come back stronger from the pandemic. It included approximately $6 trillion worth of investments in pre-k, childcare, climate change, affordable housing and more.
Republicans immediately pushed back on this historic spending — suggesting that we should only focus on ‘traditional infrastructure’ spending — and a small bipartisan group of Senators stripped major priorities from the President’s plan. Working with the White House, they eventually agreed on a framework for the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill.
But Alexandria and her colleagues spoke out on our need to deliver on the priorities that voters elected us to fight for, and stipulated that **they would only vote to pass this small-scale infrastructure bill if another bill that meets the needs of working families and addresses the climate crisis was passed at the same time.** Congressional leaders agreed and decided to pass these priorities through Congress in a process known as ‘budget reconciliation,’ which only requires a simple majority in the Senate to pass, rather than the 60 votes normally required.
After much additional back and forth between the Senate and the House, they agreed to pass a $3.5 trillion reconciliation package along with the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill. This would be used to expand Medicare to cover vision, dental and hearing; make pre-k universal; provide paid family and medical leave; create a Civilian Climate Corps and fight climate change, and much more.
This reconciliation package is no more, and no less, than President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda. It's the promises that we campaigned on and what the American people voted for — and sent Democrats to the House, Senate, and White House to deliver.
**And, by the way, we're going to pay for it by taxing the very wealthy and corporations.**
Despite the fact that this reconciliation package has incredibly popular and widely-supported policies, conservative Democrats are _still_ working to strip down and altogether stop the Build Back Better Agenda in favor of only passing the smaller Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill that was largely designed to keep corporate lobbyists happy.
The entire House Progressive Caucus is focused on passing Biden’s full agenda — that means keeping our promise to hold the line and refusing to vote on the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill until reconciliation passes first.
We’re essentially saying they get the bill they want, and we get ours — per the original agreement. Fair, right? But if we vote for the Bipartisan Infrastructure Bill first — alone — we do not have the assurances necessary to believe that the Build Back Better Agenda will pass afterwards, and lower-income, working-class families, and communities of color will be left behind.
**Alexandria is not going to let that happen.**
Many of the arguments that are holding things up are concerns about the price tag. But let’s be clear: This is about so much more than $1.5 trillion vs. $3.5 trillion — _it’s about the impact that working people will feel in their daily lives._
When we talk about topline numbers, there’s a lot hidden in that discussion. It’s easy for Senators like Joe Manchin to hide behind a number and simply say “this is too expensive.” It’s harder to vocally reject popular ideas like universal pre-K, expanding medicare, or the child tax credit — but the effect is same. It’s like saying, _"You can either feed your child, recover from your c-section, or have childcare so you can go to work — but I don’t think you should be able to do all three."_
The people deserve to know what substantive programs they’re willing to gut.
It’s unfortunate that we — as Democrats — have to compromise with ourselves for an ambitious agenda for working people. Free community college should be a standard. Climate action in line with science should be a given. Cutting child poverty in half is a _good_ thing.
These are the things we believe are worth standing up for. **It’s time to think big, do what we were elected to do, and reject the "something is better than nothing" argument.**
We believe there is a path to get this done. And Alexandria will continue to hold the line.
**[This is a moment when we need all hands on deck. If you agree with Alexandria that it's time for our government to prioritize the needs of working people over keeping billionaires and rich corporations comfortable, add your name to say you support the policies in the Build Back Better agenda.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/sign/build-back-better-act-2/?source=em20211008-2580-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=2&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk)**
In addition, we encourage you to reach out to your representatives to make sure they support the Build Back Better Agenda.
Thank you for fighting alongside Alexandria for real change, and we’ll continue to keep you informed as things progress.
– Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211008?refcode=em20211008-2580-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=3&refcode2=2580_2526796_bzmtDk&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211008-2580-P_ENG_EXP_LEG&t=4&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2580%2E2526796%2EbzmtDk)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
