name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Just wrapped on MSNBC re: Donald Trump and Sen. Grassley's rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I'm not going to mince words here...
| | |
---
Peter – I just wrapped my appearance on MSNBC's The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell where I talked about Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) rallying with Donald Trump here in Iowa tomorrow. [**If you're with me in this fight to defeat Sen. Grassley and the extremism of the Republican party, can I ask you to chip in a grassroots donation of whatever you can right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37290336/310658859/-926345391?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk314-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWY0YjVmZC1hYzI4LWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=StR27yw_u-bfkDtZBGQ_Fe3uvAijZuBDYe31yNjzbA8=)
I'm not going to mince words here: Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories, radicalism and anti-democratic sentiments have no place in our state or anywhere else in our country. Yet Sen. Grassley's choosing to stand side-by-side with him during a MAGA rally. Sen. Grassley’s implicit – and sometimes explicit – endorsement of Trump’s rhetoric is entirely unacceptable. Frankly, I believe it makes him unfit to serve.
Our state deserves a senator who will fight for working families instead of spreading dangerous conspiracy theories – and our country deserves a Senate that will do the same. If we win here in Iowa, we can guarantee both, and our path to victory in Iowa has never been clearer.
**You see, Iowans are done with Sen. Grassley – only 27% of voters want to reelect him.****** The momentum is on our side, and I can promise you that no one is going to work harder than me to flip this seat blue. But it’s clear that Trump will do everything he can to take back the Senate majority and make sure Sen. Grassley is reelected. I fully intend to win, but I need you to stand with me.
**I know that days like these are long – but we have to meet the moment when we're called upon. So today I'm humbly asking you to contribute to my campaign to help me flip Iowa blue and stop Trump from taking back the Senate. ****[Please, can you donate $5 – or whatever you can spare – to counter Trump's attacks, defeat Sen. clean_body: I'm not going to mince words here... | | | Peter – I just wrapped my appearance on MSNBC's The Last Word with Lawrence O'Donnell where I talked about Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) rallying with Donald Trump here in Iowa tomorrow. = I'm not going to mince words here: Trump's dangerous conspiracy theories, radicalism and anti-democratic sentiments have no place in our state or anywhere else in our country. Yet Sen. Grassley's choosing to stand side-by-side with him during a MAGA rally. Sen. Grassley’s implicit – and sometimes explicit – endorsement of Trump’s rhetoric is entirely unacceptable. Frankly, I believe it makes him unfit to serve. Our state deserves a senator who will fight for working families instead of spreading dangerous conspiracy theories – and our country deserves a Senate that will do the same. If we win here in Iowa, we can guarantee both, and our path to victory in Iowa has never been clearer. You see, Iowans are done with Sen. Grassley – only 27% of voters want to reelect him.** The momentum is on our side, and I can promise you that no one is going to work harder than me to flip this seat blue. But it’s clear that Trump will do everything he can to take back the Senate majority and make sure Sen. Grassley is reelected. I fully intend to win, but I need you to stand with me. I know that days like these are long – but we have to meet the moment when we're called upon. So today I'm humbly asking you to contribute to my campaign to help me flip Iowa blue and stop Trump from taking back the Senate. **= | | = Thank you for always being in my corner. I know that, together, we're going to win. – Abby = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

**Biden To Illegal Immigrants: Come On In****😡**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e95ecf1e8b6b4fa189be54ef67116361&_e=-10iWZOQWIuGMaW2b8EoBObNMEreSxWAiU_bNDH9C8vIG2VXnF-0w6BFpgXHKLUelWHdJJgClhRAYUGg1pyah8_kA1Q_knxyr-o_KcvfgxWx8CJiKsqOz45DerQYU8B950Sjn-bXrL27FdRoBbg-5daufQdpdup3gQq14yi0j7Gku18-1Hxf3NHk2PrhtrWxos8SYD6yzIp4slkubWcNuiqTrsfWXapeSTXUJYSS_nG9CMohgGAEnTtnIy0jHSGPUYAjktsxLHfh4MLjdm7jOTNoD8Pc-gdTHKLuQxWajmgGTCF-ypxxNGWHdKkgpJg4ZtRSx4WdR46Ga88imVpEDhvqIHGiWijdWraiWxi7OslM2N5rsXpQvnu3bh0Nin1A)
I hate to say I told you so...but Republicans have been warning about our border crisis, and now all our warnings are being realized. We warned that Joe Biden’s lax immigration policies were essentially a welcome mat to millions of migrants. We were right. Did the Biden administration listen?

Not. At. All.

Biden, Harris, and the rest of his administration stuck their heads in the sand and doubled down on a dangerous open-border agenda.

Now, to make matters worse, the Biden administration [announced](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=e95ecf1e8b6b4fa189be54ef67116361&_e=-10iWZOQWIuGMaW2b8EoBObNMEreSxWAiU_bNDH9C8vIG2VXnF-0w6BFpgXHKLUelWHdJJgClhRAYUGg1pyah8_kA1Q_knxyr-o_KcvfgxWx8CJiKsqOz45DerQYU8B950Sjn-bXrL27FdRoBbg-5ZrNZDwkjcgDWEVKkA5FVIwb7A3Hi7MSlNZA1Oj4s7RG0fM5Om_cNkVNTJPQLjvzp944yi2VLvUdvu2wfACTazubOWXtpAIPO2CarK_ClqrByRfttzqVEm0rIJiYLg9jVpcbX5_vSJoRwZnjr2gb_uZirnQqLG1bY7gXIffD-XQ2B83wP4EHSkCPnUCwqDo2MHPnczd5-8sldDTdkJv895b7jlLXJ2-QwLkrhehYOw4b) that immigration status alone will not be a basis for deportation. In other words, if a migrant breaks our law and comes to America illegally, the U.S. government will NOT deport him, We have to wait for the illegal immigrant to break a different law.

This is insane.

No borders, no accountability, and no end in sight. Joe Biden created the crisis on our southern border, and this will be his legacy.
|

body:
I've officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> |
[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkE9v4yAQxT8NuWHhwX_wwYckdpRdVV0pVXu1MExjWowjjFt1P31xmvawp5XQSPyY95h5uoaszDhuTA0M0pQxAZyzvEjSpGW7ZhfBVrRZsT9UJGOjPEupgpmctOhDoqZxM9Q9AxRpXnAmK8GxyAC10qLPuWa9FNXG1kMIl5nwLYFDPDOqxWPybpxHvZpEFlCOdEA_qwEtNU5FZuXi1EDfjMaJ6hdPPeGHJYzdPC1eIeGNxzcCxYqUHC_SnF2EX7IbH1GbZYwUR2lshLOKl-9lu2N7etgf27uubbvm96m72z7e74_06VfT_ulO7dMKv3-YXEAXotopS4_933suTq_5OkDnrNHx4R84X6Euoci5KKmuMqRZlae050pSeC4qznUu-optfK0v78ZaMxdlDPq8DnuNN65lzfNHTcodAViWaAlwTRL-x3hthn2s4eOCP8qbaXLLBEjZfALK2p0t)

---
Friend,

Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream.

He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League.

That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams.

**[I want to tell you why I am running for United States Senate.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkEFv4yAQhX8NuWHhAZv44EMSE6VV1ZWy2lwtAjSmwtjCOGn__eJsstLeVkJIfMN7M_N0DYwzala2BgJ5TsgaKCVFmeWZINtmm8BmLVi521eIkV5epFTRDl46E2Kmhn7V1SC54jmhqshNCVIzoFAWjEnCFdNnunJ1F-M4IbpBsE9nMmoOJrtZH4xeTBKLRva4M2FSnXHYepWYk7NXHb5abQasPwMOiO7n2LfTMAdlEG2CuSIoF6RkP0p78Qn-kT14b7Sd-0RNL61LcFLp8Vy2PYjjz91BvLVCtM3rsX3b_HrfHfDppRE_2qM4LfDZYfDR-JjUXjnsL7fXjbiOX0uj1jurl8K_cLpDzVMadM2xrpjBrCpyfKZKYvgoK0p1sT5XZBVqPd6sc3YqeQr6sgx7jzet5ezHd434FgHMc7IEuCcJ_2O8fIZduuP3aP4qH6bZIxNAvPkN726d8A)**

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkE9v4yAQxT8NuWHZg_8efEhip9mqaqVsW2l7sTBMYlaAI4wb5dsvTtM97GklNBK_mfdgnqwhLVKGK1VDDEkSxyUwFmd5lERtvGk2AazLNs23u4qkseEnzoVXo-UanY_EaFZDLRlkfdmXwPO851AkSSbSY3JMYpkxVvUrXQ_enyfC1gR24UwoZofRRVmHcjEJzCM3dEA3iQE1VVYEpvlsxUA_lcSRyt-OOsJ2szfdNM5OIGGNw08C-YIEN2euTjbAL9mdG5RqNoGi4UoHOIlw-V6227eHn9t9-9S1bdc8Hrqn9dvzdk_ffzTtS3do3xf4_cJoPVof1FZo-vxwwl_m9aNc2p3VSobGP3C6QVlAnrGyoLJKkaZVltCeCU7hmFeMyazsq3jlanm-KK3VlBch6NPy2Vu8YS2tjteaFBsCMM_BEuCWJPyP8TIM21D99Yx_lXfT6J4JkKL5A5D5nSQ)
>From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams.

But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground.

_It's time for that to change._

Friend, I am proud to call myself a conservative.

I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility.

I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams – just like I did.

I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us – not divide us.

**[I want you to hear directly from me about why I'm running for the United States Senate, so I am asking you to please watch my campaign video.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkM1uwjAQhJ_G3Bwl6_wecgASoFXVSlTlGjn2Qlw5DnIcKt6-DoUeeqpkreRvd8bekSXEWcxwoUoIIYrCMAfGwiQNoqAOV9XKg2Vex-l6U5A47PmJc-HUYLhG6wIx9IuuTLjIWVvkaR5BGwmGUgDG2MYJiyIB7UKXnXPnkbAlgY0_I4rJYvCljEU5m3jmkPe0QzuKDjVVRnim-WRERy9K4kDlp6WWsM3k-mYcJiuQsMrihUA6I8H7M1cn4-GP7M57lGrqPcWeK-3hKPzlsWyzq_fv61390tR1Uz3vm5flx-t6Rw9PVf3W7OvDDB8vDMahcV5thKZZtzxuK8anrW83RivpG3_geIMygzRheUZlESONiySiLROcwjEtGJNJ3hbhwpby_KW0VmOa-aBP82dv8fq1tDpeS5KtCMA0eUuAW5LwH-N5GNa-uusZf5V30-CeCZCs-gbVq50J) **

Friend, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support.

Sincerely,
[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkEFv4yAQhX8NuWHhwQb74EMSk6ZVtZWyaq8WARJTYWxh3Kr_fnGa7mFPK6GR-Gbeg3m6gYIX1GxsAwTynJAKKCUly_JMkF27S2BbiYLtDzUqyCCvUqpoRy-dCTFT47DpG8M1OzMgNZWkIuUFDHDFElOFVirnG9f0MU4zolsEh3Rmo5Zgsk_rg9GrSWLRyAH3JsyqNw5brxJzcvGqxx9WmxHr94ADooclDt08LkEZRNtgPhCwFSk5TNJefYLfsjsfjLbLkKgZpHUJzipdfpbtjuL0e38Uz50QXft06p63r7_2R_z22IqX7iTeVvjzwuij8TGpvXJYTLtzpcvX40Nqd95ZnRr_wPkGNQdW0opjXRcGF3WZ4zNVEsOF1ZTqsjrXZBMaPX1a5-zMeAr6un72Fm9ay9nLV4P4DgEsS7IEuCUJ_2O8DsM-1fg1mb_Ku2l2zwQQb_8AyPuc7Q)

Republican for United States Senate

clean_body: I've officially launched my campaign for United States Senate, and I want to personally share why I am running. Watch Now >> | Friend, Many years ago, a kid from the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, started down the path to achieve the American Dream. He worked extremely hard, put his faith in God, and never gave up when the going got tough. That kid went on to win the Heisman Trophy in college football and set records as a running back in the National Football League. That kid was me. I have been blessed to live the American Dream, and now I am dedicating my life to ensuring every American has the same opportunity to achieve their dreams. From my family and community, I learned the value of hard work. From competing in sports, I learned about teamwork and determination. My family taught me it doesn't matter where you come from or the color of your skin. If you make sacrifices and put in the work, you can achieve your dreams. But over the years, I learned that politicians in Washington are more concerned with pitting us against each other than finding common ground. It's time for that to change. Friend, I am proud to call myself a conservative. I believe in smaller government, a strong military, and personal responsibility. I want to make sure everyone in this country who works hard has the opportunity to achieve their dreams – just like I did. I believe that the American Dream is still achievable, but we must send leaders to Washington who will unite us – not divide us. Friend, this country is worth fighting for, and it's up to us to keep the American Dream alive for future generations. I hope I can earn your support. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate P.S. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

The USPS is in utter turmoil because of Trump’s Postmaster General Louis DeJoy.

[**DeJoy has been racing to DESTROY the Post Office:**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnV7Q3_9PgzWm4Cx24Zm74WWli7NpX4yxO-PTBA97JcV0KvddDdJDyByorHrNdTKvJPd-8-Cvnm_wa1cGBbIckrVvGwrjSFC6mLKk2WlzgSt22dHGtwpKRwapem2Cvczx7GGlAOnJo_S_JftdPLP15TzoPf34kHYd8w3wmN-atRU9-DLAaaJmcC1qBLlPEk79Z-hfPKIlyRkv80-ahgWYqShjBt35l7QdhEqBH76lnTtWyzZsKAYkxcijZ7Et6dwwZohC-UQKCPG-MT2Oqidepu3icKDd-POorUAGzHPdzeIhMc9xthl0aWy9g-PkHz_-g/3fz/hPfES4xtTAKQnNfHhNiIzw/h6/nDMfiTbUy8hrxEuQxYEmQyRg6eiyYOtrelCTs6BQb3k)

* RAISING the price of first-class stamps
* FORCING intentional mail delays
* _And so much more!_

And despite public outcry, National Republicans [**_STILL_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnV7Q3_9PgzWm4Cx24Zm74WWli7NpX4yxO-PTBA97JcV0KvddDdJDyByorHrNdTKvJPd-8-Cvnm_wa1cGBbIckrVvGwrjSFC6mLKk2WlzgSt22dHGtwpKRwapem2Cvczx5AZohGZ-cn-BhMqEmuW_hp8LcSIpdmZs3tRLqMJ3zZUJdwYRAmdoxsJWdPhJdbISXPYUWMHiN-3XCtp-zzz_Kq88ctyMo7q1mXazkzsCYq2L_zCfPsgwBVDeuKbsU2SrkOh9hXFsM567-w4-Sb0ARSjQZqbUfwLiJZybJZrBF2J6meMu9SbXZxCnjN8sf49jA/3fz/hPfES4xtTAKQnNfHhNiIzw/h7/iF4JDyGPlrHil9tQQIghZMUmqn-w4tCcBsnu-IRiVYQ) want to help DeJoy by privatizing the Post Office -- [_this could devastate Vote-by-Mail accessibility._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnV7Q3_9PgzWm4Cx24Zm74WWli7NpX4yxO-PTBA97JcV0KvddDdJDyByorHrNdTKvJPd-8-Cvnm_wa1cGBbIckrVvGwrjSFC6mLKk2WlzgSt22dHGtwpKRwapem2Cvczx7JQoGxk4_JNfwCPnXEadMRBoGMgnAvD9jo8wIgLe1nDiY1NJO-kiT542Zobd3l3PL5EuwV0vuJ0OOFLp7WI0z9Zhkyoh7iaK1VCSXhodpOX8D_zvFicBGWSIDSLOEktHTbBXJD7bj4vjC2-gwVJKsJXg1WWMtDd7YMCKsyUVqBQeRsKvtaN5bE3SLXNYp7FAM/3fz/hPfES4xtTAKQnNfHhNiIzw/h8/6QpBig7yYXcCWOa14B1-ieC-_hycVPuHLvHzbhGd3fY)

[So we’re asking our Cresco supporters to do what they can to protect the USPS!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnV7Q3_9PgzWm4Cx24Zm74WWli7NpX4yxO-PTBA97JcV0KvddDdJDyByorHrNdTKvJPd-8-Cvnm_wa1cGBbIckrVvGwrjSFC6mLKk2WlzgSt22dHGtwpKRwapem2Cvczx5_XcU96-MOMLSYETRKOacYUUYmo-fdchVqB2Dj3JyykRQYevIHbwtvoQbST-3T8ET_X-uzQNJ-zESdQzmVrBsP7gJTYXuVSPIkeyC61UmXG7-lGEqg2_8xJ7gqHr0wkVbU4CXprpafaGRYuu4Ci8bojjIYnBSZ-GMnlqZVCv1kQ0J6v1GW4s6qXfCwnjmmdhY/3fz/hPfES4xtTAKQnNfHhNiIzw/h9/s7ewTelSohHxUmv22dBLkRipFdPLBFvqQtmS1xdxoSA)
